subject: Are you still a committed Republican voter, Peter?

body:
We’re taking “patriot” back to its original meaning
#
We’re taking “patriot” back to its original meaning, Peter:
**pa·tri·ot** (noun)
_a person who vigorously supports their country and is prepared to defend it against enemies or detractors_
As oligarchs wage an unfettered war to control every aspect of our government in order to enrich themselves, it has never been more important to elect real patriots up and down the ballot who are ready to hold them accountable and defend our democracy. And we need your help to do it.

body:
Voter Action Project
CFPM: Florida holds special primary election to fill vacancies in U.S. House
There are two big states holding special elections on April 1, Team. The state of Florida is holding a special election to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives, following cabinet nominations by President Donald Trump.
Why are these special elections important? Opponents of voting rights hold a 3 seat majority -- 218 to 215 -- in the House. One media report after another tells the tale -- Speaker Mike Johnson is having a hard time wrangling them all to vote for his priorities, and any dent made in that majority will make it harder for them to pass bills that harm voting rights this year or next.
It all starts with the American Confidence in Elections (ACE) Act which would nationalize voter suppression and the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act, which would add onerous voter ID requirements, potentially disenfranchising millions of married women who changed their last names. Those bills are just the tip of the suppressive iceberg, with many in Congress looking to follow the election lies to policies that disenfranchise voters and make Trump happy.
We can stop all that with huge voter turnout in these Florida specials. But we need your help to make voters in Florida aware of these special elections, when early voting starts, how to request a new mail-in ballot, and so much more.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: My Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025
body:
Standing Will Cost You
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | | STANDING UP WILL COST YOU
---
---
| Friends, Standing comes at a cost. President Trump came inches from losing his life, standing for us. When most would have retreated, he charged forward. He is the epitome of courage, bravery and overcoming fierce persecution. President Trump is an inspiration to us all.
Watching the persecution of President Trump as they came after him personally, politically, financially, to include multiple failed assassination attempts, has hopefully opened your eyes.
President Trump is not alone. Other politicians including myself have also suffered persecution for taking a stand against the political establishment.
While nothing compares to what President Trump endured, those who have followed my journey know that I'm no stranger to political persecution and opposition from the political establishment.
For standing against the authoritarians, I've endured an illegal censure for standing with President Trump on J6, had a plexiglass wall built around my desk on the floor of the Virginia Senate for refusing to wear a mask for standing against Covid mandates, had my committee assignments and seniority stripped from me and put in the corner of the Democrat controlled Senate floor for stating the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen. I stated the truth. The 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and presented numerous bills to put the guardrails back on our elections.
The political establishment paid operatives to take me out, personally, politically, professionally and financially. And yet I stood.
I stood up for your gun rights, your right not to wear a mask or be forced to get the Covid jab. I called for a full forensic audit of the 2020 Presidential election, paper ballots and hand counts on an election day, not a season.
For standing, I was a victim of lawfare and years of harassment by a former disgruntled aide.
I have a history of standing up for you. I'm battle tested and proven.
Of those running for Governor you have to ask yourself, do all of the candidates have a history of standing or folding?
Did they accept the covid mandates in 2020 or did they stand up and fight for your individual rights?
Did they defend President Trump when he correctly claimed that the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen or did they just go along with Liz Cheney who tried to instead prosecute and imprison those standing up for our Constitutional Republic?
Did they stand up for you when it wasn't popular to do so and when they would face personal persecution?
You can count on me. I've stood up for you in the past, and you can count on me to stand for you in the future.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# MY FAITH IN JESUS
---
|
# WHY I STAND
---
| My faith in God through Jesus is central to who I am. It doesn't mean I'm perfect, but through all of the trials, persecution and struggles, it's my faith that I turn to and from which I draw strength during the good times and the more challenging times.
I accepted Jesus into my heart when I was in the 2nd grade. As a young teen and young adult my relationship with the Lord became more personal. I felt compelled to go on several missions trips and while in college at Virginia Tech was very involved with Campus Crusade for Christ, which is now called Cru.
It was during my college years that I began to study the Bible and my faith strengthened. I remember spending my spring break in Daytona sharing the gospel of Christ with people on the beach.
As a young adult who worked full time in management in the finance and banking field, I spent some week nights and weekends visiting people who had visited our church and led several small group Bible studies.
As a young mother, I left corporate America to raise and homeschool our 4 children under a religious exemption statue. It was then I began to volunteer for the Family Foundation and led various programs and coops for homeschool families seeking opportunities for their children. It was also then that I began to volunteer for various political campaigns for conservative Republicans.
One thing lead to another and my volunteerism lead to serving as campaign staff, political director and even campaign manager for various federal, state and local elected officials.
Ultimately, I would run and win a state senate seat, overcoming a 28 year incumbent. I served in the Virginia Senate for 8 years from 2016 to 2023, until I was "defeated" by 375 mail-in and early votes out of 22,000 votes, in which my campaign was denied overseeing of the early voting machines.
I contested the race, but was ultimately ignored by the Virginia State Board of Elections and the Republican Party of Virginia. We sought justice legally, but we were ignored. The people of Senate District 12 were disenfranchised but no one had the boldness to investigate our concern, despite our best efforts to fight the injustice. It was a frustrating experience but at the end of the day I trusted the Lord to ultimately bring justice.
Many of you have heard me say the Holy Spirit is my GPS. That is true.
Like many of you, I too get distracted and take the longer route because I wasn't paying attention. However, my heart is to put God first every morning, listen to His voice and follow the path that He has laid before me through doors that I believe He opens and closes. While I believe my loss was nefarious at best, it was a door God closed. And one I had a hard time accepting because of the appearance of cheating.
I've had former employees who had worked for me in the past and been good to literally stab me in the back. They accepted money from other elected officials who I had challenged on various policies to betray and defame my good character and reputation. They came after me politically, professionally and personally. A Richmond General District Court judge granted me a protective order against one employee who continues to follow me to this day.
Why? Because I wasn't popular with the other politicians. I wouldn't just go along to get along. I took a stand.
Life begins at conception, not 15 weeks, for starters. I refused to approve a Health and Human Resources Cabinet member because they refused to reverse Governor Northam's position regarding healthcare providers ability to prescribe ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid.
I refused to rejoin the Republican Senate Caucus until the leader resigned because he had introduced bills to increase taxes and even introduced a gun control bill. I could not in good conscience sit under a leader who was introducing bills only a Democrat would introduce. Standing came at a cost.
I had my committee assignments taken away, my seniority taken away and my seat moved to the farthest side of the Virginia Senate chamber and my colleagues . All in an attempt to shame me into submission.
No matter what they did to me or said about me, I chose to stand.
---
|
# TAKING A STAND DURING COVID
---
|
# REFUSING TO WEAR A MASK
---
| During Covid, I refused to wear a mask. As a result, the Senate staff built a plexiglass wall around my desk. I referred to as my "Wall of Freedom."
Overnight, we saw America become a socialist nation. Our basic ability to breathe was now being governed by an overreaching tyrannical government.
Even the manufacturer of the masks printed a disclaimer stating the masks did not protect people from the spread of viruses. In fact, it was later proven that masks actually cause harm and increase a person's chances of contracting a respiratory virus.
I introduced many bills to make it illegal for employers, educators and even small businesses from violating our civil rights. These decisions of body autonomy we could determine for ourselves. I called on the government to stop restricting our ability to work, get educated or simply perform everyday activities like shop and visit the doctor for simply refusing the experimental jab.
I introduced legislation that would allow doctors to prescribe ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid.
---
| |
---
| Our Constitutional rights were being violated and I had to take a stand, no matter the cost. Wearing a mask or not should have been a choice, not a mandate.
---
| |
---
| My colleagues complied with the mandates. I did not. I was both isolated and ostracized by my colleagues for standing. The Senate Clerk staff put my desk at the back of the room in a far corner. They tried to break me, but I stood strong.
---
| |
---
| During the height of Covid, I was running for Governor. During the day I would serve in the Senate of Virginia. In the evenings, I campaigned across the state. No mask. No vaccine. People were desperate for someone who would stand up for them under the Constitutional mandates.
---
| |
---
| Here's a picture of the Virginia Senate in 2021, during the height of Covid. We were forced to meet at the Science Museum of Virginia so that we could comply with social distancing mandates, which we've now discovered were a hoax and nothing more than political science.
---
| |
---
| During the height of Covid, who stood up for you? Who fought the unconstitutional mandates? I did. And it came at a cost.
---
| |
---
| Who can you count on to stand with you in the future? Who has had the courage, fortitude and history of standing with you in the past?
Standing wasn't easy. Even comedian Jimmy Kimmel mocked me nationally for refusing to wear a mask. They wanted to break me, but I stood strong in the midst of isolation, being mocked and ridiculed.
I continued to challenge the mask and vaccine mandates. They were making decisions based on political science, not science. Today, 4 years later, we know know the truth.
You can count on me. I've stood with you in the past. I will stand with you in the future.
---
| | [WRIC INTERVIEW](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BtqR5_SdACXHcl6uaptvtLMAlJjWIgaWQy9jKdwGY1ALn4HRPm25QZezCK7xnCrND9GmJ4SrO5Hc05mpjv06TNlSPWMv48PZTDZCllow2YCcJIDzsb_hEKK1_wG8wgBEm46cnfsTwS3PEkiCCOwgmychpQVDDrTF8ziGd6A9R7oCwkpp2Cpb0jRnZ3KtF6GbYtVifSZgohRqiZwvKSuuBD1fZ1tNcrowliPsNOFjNCkNH7FxXf69Al4gcfkotiJV&c=cMOllLHxO2JDzugjKACz68ONGQNGyyFmkamJNnRdn-n5gwOXWnKbUA==&ch=zzUQqAE5xVGzN1nUjeZEW1BEjmrZhSmA0t3sdcmKYMgTgX5gO--aJw==)
---
|
# I STAND FOR MEDICAL FREEDOM
---
| I did not get the jab. And I fought for your right not to get the jab. The government should not mandate an experimental "vaccine."
---
| |
---
|

---
| |
---
| Dr. Sheila Furey, the President of VAMFA Virginia Medical Freedom Alliance and I worked very closely together on legislation that I sponsored to push back against onerous and unconstitutional mandates.
---
|

---
| |
---
| Pictured: Dr. Robert Malone, Senator Amanda Chase and Dr. Paul Marik.
Dr. Robert Malone was the inventor of the Covid vaccine. Although he took the jab, he later withdrew his support and is now actively exposing the truth about the side effects of the vaccine, to include death.
Dr. Paul Marik spoke as a subject matter expert on several of my medical freedom bills. People want choice not mandates.
---
|
# STANDING FOR THE 2ND AMENDMENT
---
| Many of you heard me speak at the 2020 VCDL Legislative Day at the Capitol when there were well over 50,000 gun loving Virginians who arrived in Virginia.
You can trust me to protect your gun rights. To me it's personal. You can trust me to stand up for the 2nd Amendment.
---
| |
---
| | [LISTEN HERE VCDL 2020 RALLY](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BtqR5_SdACXHcl6uaptvtLMAlJjWIgaWQy9jKdwGY1ALn4HRPm25QZezCK7xnCrN5Foz4GYuIDjfbkOtc7t4ckP6mLbuUJ1aXVSpdqo1MaVrmi63g3wqKqSYZhaHCiKFDMtwQWGxOkbzqk1zqFx5bZZh0cmMh3-bJjmFD872E_GLkR00Yr-XurdtwyXvSmh7&c=cMOllLHxO2JDzugjKACz68ONGQNGyyFmkamJNnRdn-n5gwOXWnKbUA==&ch=zzUQqAE5xVGzN1nUjeZEW1BEjmrZhSmA0t3sdcmKYMgTgX5gO--aJw==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Some politicians say that they support the 2nd Amendment. I have both a public history and legislative record of opposing gun control. Action should trump rhetoric. I've actually introduced legislation to repeal the gun control laws that the Democrat controlled General Assembly passed in 2020.
---
| |
---
| After I was assaulted on multiple occasions on Capitol grounds, I decided to open carry. It worked. The national protestors that flooded our state capitol finally stopped laying hands on me. I believe with all of my heart that guns save lives. I also believe an armed society is a polite society.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Many have taken this picture out of context. My team and I were standing on Bank Street in front of the Virginia Capitol in Richmond with hundreds of pro-2nd Amendment supporters from all walks of life.
---
| |
---
| July 4, 2020, I was asked to be speak at a Pro-2nd Amendment Rally in downtown Richmond at our state capitol. I was told it was too dangerous to go. Both Antifa and BLM were supposed to be there. My security team and I made the decision to go anyway. Keep in mind the Richmond Police and just been demoralized by Democrat Mayor Levar Stoney. This picture was taken in the streets of Richmond.
---
| The Democrat Trifecta of 2020 passed scores of gun control legislation like one gun a month, universal background checks, red flag laws and gun free zones could not be created by localities. I spoke out against these bills that were a violation of both our U.S. Constitution and our Virginia Constitution. The Democrats controlled the Virginia Senate, the Virginia House and Governor Ralph Northam was Governor. Legislatively, there was nothing we could do. We didn't have the votes. So I chose to go public and expose to the American people what the Democrats were doing.
---
| |
---
Bloomberg and others nefarious actors were dumping millions of dollars into Virginia. It was an all out war on our 2nd Amendment rights. While I knew we didn't have the votes, I chose to be creative and get vocal.
---
|
---
| To implement socialism, I knew they would first come for our guns. And they did. Instead of protecting individual rights for people to protect themselves, the Democrats were more interested in protecting the criminals, including violent offenders.
---
| |
---
|
# STANDING UP FOR INNOCENT LIFE
THOSE WHO CAN'T SPEAK UP FOR THEMSELVES
---
| The Pro-family, non-profit group, The Family Foundation issues a legislative scorecard so that Virginians can see how their legislator scores on pro-family issues.
For my entire 8 year legislative career, year after year from 2016 through 2023, I received a perfect score of 100%.
You can trust that I will stand for life, because I have a voting record you can trust. Not just my words.
---
| |
---
| Life begins at fertilization. Even 98% of scientists agree. I introduced a Life Begins at Conception bill. The Senate Rules Committee refused to make a motion to vote up or down on the bill. If they voted for the bill, they would have to agree that life begins at conception. If they voted down the bill, they would oppose the opinion of 98% of scientists.
---
| |
---
| I've been honored to speak at Family Foundation organized pro-life rallies at the Virginia State Capitol. After SCOTUS overturned the Landmark Roe vs Wade Case, CNN asked for an interview. I'm not afraid to stand for life.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | [CNN INTERVIEW after DOBBS DECISION](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BtqR5_SdACXHcl6uaptvtLMAlJjWIgaWQy9jKdwGY1ALn4HRPm25Qeo4n4YRJBj9RIJzMeuElrcwpXQm_nCsZBkHQqxojV5k6FpM9qKhrkn0D90WUMrMKUya9yG7ebKWZ_ZX4V1VcPWJZhp2vDF_NtsKbGv4wT7R&c=cMOllLHxO2JDzugjKACz68ONGQNGyyFmkamJNnRdn-n5gwOXWnKbUA==&ch=zzUQqAE5xVGzN1nUjeZEW1BEjmrZhSmA0t3sdcmKYMgTgX5gO--aJw==)
---
| I led the effort in the Virginia Senate to defeat the so called Equal Right Amendment, a failed amendment that was resurrected from the 70s. The false claim was that it should be passed to give women equal rights and codify it in the Constitution. The real agenda was to promote gender fluidity, a concept that seemed so foreign until today. I was an outspoken leader against the so called Equal Rights Amendment.
Listen as I speak against SJR 284 on the floor of the Virginia Senate.
---
| | [](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BtqR5_SdACXHcl6uaptvtLMAlJjWIgaWQy9jKdwGY1ALn4HRPm25QZezCK7xnCrNQN5QwL90tomhKorGnlsYR3dmqnIkXZkfY9iNv_-dDAHZ0Dxl2TBPeRpVsnaFGdOMpoyvDCrgSUobL9pSE-h7Ptsrs22eRjki&c=cMOllLHxO2JDzugjKACz68ONGQNGyyFmkamJNnRdn-n5gwOXWnKbUA==&ch=zzUQqAE5xVGzN1nUjeZEW1BEjmrZhSmA0t3sdcmKYMgTgX5gO--aJw==)
---
| I've worked under two Democrat governors and one Republican governor. There are different strategies that have to be used for each. Under a Democrat governor, we know pro-life legislation will not pass. So do we continue to introduce legislation even when we know it will not pass?
I believe that we should and I do. It's important that we put legislators on the record so that voters know how they will vote when we do have the votes and it does count.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| The late Virginia Senator Eva Mae Scott (R-Amelia) and I speak at a press conference organized by The Family Foundation against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment.
---
|
# STANDING UP FOR SECURE ELECTIONS
MAKING SURE YOUR VOTE COUNTS
---
| | When voters in my senate district went to cast their vote in 2020, many said that they couldn't vote because someone had already cast their vote for them. I was determined to investigate and get to the bottom of this, despite efforts to be shamed into not questioning the 2020 Presidential Election results.
---
| |
---
| I flew to Arizona to witness the first ever full forensic audit so that I knew what legislation to introduce in Virginia. Clearly there was a national effort to steal our elections and what they were doing in Arizona was happening all across the country, but only Republican controlled legislators were able to investigate. I worked very closely with the Arizona legislature. My hope was to have a full forensic audit right here in Virginia, but the legislature was completely controlled by the Democrats. So I sought to expose what was happening across the country, and eventually right here in Virginia.
---
| |
---
| Pictured: Arizona State Senator Wendy Rodgers, Senator Amanda Chase, Representative Mark Finchem and Senator Sonny Borrelli.
---
| |
---
| The Voter Confidence Restoration Act was just one of many bills that I introduced to put the guardrails back on our Virginia elections and restore voter confidence in our elections. While my goal was ultimately a full forensic audit of the 2020 election, I knew that wouldn't happen with a Democrat controlled legislature. So, I led the effort to simply go back to our Virginia Election Law best practices prior to covid, back when we required photo ID to vote, we had an election day instead of an election season and there were no drop boxes.
---
| |
---
| While in South Dakota at the Mike Lindell Cyber Symposium I founded the National Election Integrity Caucus for legislators across the country. Together we worked on and shared legislative ideas and bills to assist with our election integrity efforts.
---
| |
---
|
# STANDING UP ON JAN 6
---
| I was there on January 6. But I did not go into the nation's Capitol. Many of us believed the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and joining the protest at the Capitol in DC with President Trump to exercise our First Amendment right to free speech and to contest the election results. We were counting on Vice President Mike Pence to do the right thing. Unfortunately, he did not and his political career is over. I stand up for true election integrity. As a result, I was censured by the Virginia Senate with 3 Republicans joining.
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
#

---
|
# STANDING UP FOR SAFER COMMUNITIES
LOCKING UP VIOLENT CRIMINALS
---
| Over the past 8 years, I have introduced legislation to support our law enforcement to include the Law Enforcement Bill of Rights. I voted against repealing qualified immunity.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
|
# YOU CAN TRUST ME TO STAND
---
| When you are considering who you are going to support for Governor, ask yourself who has a history of standing up for the people?
Who can best beat Abigail Spamberger in November?
Please commit to collecting signatures to get me name on the ballot. We only have until April 3 to get over 10,000 signatures, 400 in each Congressional District. Please be sure to reach us at craig@chaseforva.com or me at amanda@chaseforva.com if you have any questions.
You know that I'm pro-life, pro-gun, pro-school choice, pro-medical freedom, pro-election integrity because I have a history of fighting for you and have a voting record you can trust.
I have 8 years of experience as a Virginia Senator. Plus I have an 8 year voting record you can trust.
Please join Team Chase today and help us collect signatures today!
---
| |
---
| Virginia State Senator 2016-2023

clean_body: Standing Will Cost You | | | | | | | | | | | STANDING UP WILL COST YOU | Friends, Standing comes at a cost. President Trump came inches from losing his life, standing for us. When most would have retreated, he charged forward. He is the epitome of courage, bravery and overcoming fierce persecution. President Trump is an inspiration to us all. Watching the persecution of President Trump as they came after him personally, politically, financially, to include multiple failed assassination attempts, has hopefully opened your eyes. President Trump is not alone. Other politicians including myself have also suffered persecution for taking a stand against the political establishment. While nothing compares to what President Trump endured, those who have followed my journey know that I'm no stranger to political persecution and opposition from the political establishment. For standing against the authoritarians, I've endured an illegal censure for standing with President Trump on J6, had a plexiglass wall built around my desk on the floor of the Virginia Senate for refusing to wear a mask for standing against Covid mandates, had my committee assignments and seniority stripped from me and put in the corner of the Democrat controlled Senate floor for stating the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen. I stated the truth. The 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and presented numerous bills to put the guardrails back on our elections. The political establishment paid operatives to take me out, personally, politically, professionally and financially. And yet I stood. I stood up for your gun rights, your right not to wear a mask or be forced to get the Covid jab. I called for a full forensic audit of the 2020 Presidential election, paper ballots and hand counts on an election day, not a season. For standing, I was a victim of lawfare and years of harassment by a former disgruntled aide. I have a history of standing up for you. I'm battle tested and proven. Of those running for Governor you have to ask yourself, do all of the candidates have a history of standing or folding? Did they accept the covid mandates in 2020 or did they stand up and fight for your individual rights? Did they defend President Trump when he correctly claimed that the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen or did they just go along with Liz Cheney who tried to instead prosecute and imprison those standing up for our Constitutional Republic? Did they stand up for you when it wasn't popular to do so and when they would face personal persecution? You can count on me. I've stood up for you in the past, and you can count on me to stand for you in the future. | | | | | | | MY FAITH IN JESUS | WHY I STAND | My faith in God through Jesus is central to who I am. It doesn't mean I'm perfect, but through all of the trials, persecution and struggles, it's my faith that I turn to and from which I draw strength during the good times and the more challenging times. I accepted Jesus into my heart when I was in the 2nd grade. As a young teen and young adult my relationship with the Lord became more personal. I felt compelled to go on several missions trips and while in college at Virginia Tech was very involved with Campus Crusade for Christ, which is now called Cru. It was during my college years that I began to study the Bible and my faith strengthened. I remember spending my spring break in Daytona sharing the gospel of Christ with people on the beach. As a young adult who worked full time in management in the finance and banking field, I spent some week nights and weekends visiting people who had visited our church and led several small group Bible studies. As a young mother, I left corporate America to raise and homeschool our 4 children under a religious exemption statue. It was then I began to volunteer for the Family Foundation and led various programs and coops for homeschool families seeking opportunities for their children. It was also then that I began to volunteer for various political campaigns for conservative Republicans. One thing lead to another and my volunteerism lead to serving as campaign staff, political director and even campaign manager for various federal, state and local elected officials. Ultimately, I would run and win a state senate seat, overcoming a 28 year incumbent. I served in the Virginia Senate for 8 years from 2016 to 2023, until I was "defeated" by 375 mail-in and early votes out of 22,000 votes, in which my campaign was denied overseeing of the early voting machines. I contested the race, but was ultimately ignored by the Virginia State Board of Elections and the Republican Party of Virginia. We sought justice legally, but we were ignored. The people of Senate District 12 were disenfranchised but no one had the boldness to investigate our concern, despite our best efforts to fight the injustice. It was a frustrating experience but at the end of the day I trusted the Lord to ultimately bring justice. Many of you have heard me say the Holy Spirit is my GPS. That is true. Like many of you, I too get distracted and take the longer route because I wasn't paying attention. However, my heart is to put God first every morning, listen to His voice and follow the path that He has laid before me through doors that I believe He opens and closes. While I believe my loss was nefarious at best, it was a door God closed. And one I had a hard time accepting because of the appearance of cheating. I've had former employees who had worked for me in the past and been good to literally stab me in the back. They accepted money from other elected officials who I had challenged on various policies to betray and defame my good character and reputation. They came after me politically, professionally and personally. A Richmond General District Court judge granted me a protective order against one employee who continues to follow me to this day. Why? Because I wasn't popular with the other politicians. I wouldn't just go along to get along. I took a stand. Life begins at conception, not 15 weeks, for starters. I refused to approve a Health and Human Resources Cabinet member because they refused to reverse Governor Northam's position regarding healthcare providers ability to prescribe ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid. I refused to rejoin the Republican Senate Caucus until the leader resigned because he had introduced bills to increase taxes and even introduced a gun control bill. I could not in good conscience sit under a leader who was introducing bills only a Democrat would introduce. Standing came at a cost. I had my committee assignments taken away, my seniority taken away and my seat moved to the farthest side of the Virginia Senate chamber and my colleagues . All in an attempt to shame me into submission. No matter what they did to me or said about me, I chose to stand. | TAKING A STAND DURING COVID | REFUSING TO WEAR A MASK | During Covid, I refused to wear a mask. As a result, the Senate staff built a plexiglass wall around my desk. I referred to as my "Wall of Freedom." Overnight, we saw America become a socialist nation. Our basic ability to breathe was now being governed by an overreaching tyrannical government. Even the manufacturer of the masks printed a disclaimer stating the masks did not protect people from the spread of viruses. In fact, it was later proven that masks actually cause harm and increase a person's chances of contracting a respiratory virus. I introduced many bills to make it illegal for employers, educators and even small businesses from violating our civil rights. These decisions of body autonomy we could determine for ourselves. I called on the government to stop restricting our ability to work, get educated or simply perform everyday activities like shop and visit the doctor for simply refusing the experimental jab. I introduced legislation that would allow doctors to prescribe ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid. | | | Our Constitutional rights were being violated and I had to take a stand, no matter the cost. Wearing a mask or not should have been a choice, not a mandate. | | | My colleagues complied with the mandates. I did not. I was both isolated and ostracized by my colleagues for standing. The Senate Clerk staff put my desk at the back of the room in a far corner. They tried to break me, but I stood strong. | | | During the height of Covid, I was running for Governor. During the day I would serve in the Senate of Virginia. In the evenings, I campaigned across the state. No mask. No vaccine. People were desperate for someone who would stand up for them under the Constitutional mandates. | | | Here's a picture of the Virginia Senate in 2021, during the height of Covid. We were forced to meet at the Science Museum of Virginia so that we could comply with social distancing mandates, which we've now discovered were a hoax and nothing more than political science. | | | During the height of Covid, who stood up for you? Who fought the unconstitutional mandates? I did. And it came at a cost. | | | Who can you count on to stand with you in the future? Who has had the courage, fortitude and history of standing with you in the past? Standing wasn't easy. Even comedian Jimmy Kimmel mocked me nationally for refusing to wear a mask. They wanted to break me, but I stood strong in the midst of isolation, being mocked and ridiculed. I continued to challenge the mask and vaccine mandates. They were making decisions based on political science, not science. Today, 4 years later, we know know the truth. You can count on me. I've stood with you in the past. I will stand with you in the future. | | == | I STAND FOR MEDICAL FREEDOM | I did not get the jab. And I fought for your right not to get the jab. The government should not mandate an experimental "vaccine." | | | | | | Dr. Sheila Furey, the President of VAMFA Virginia Medical Freedom Alliance and I worked very closely together on legislation that I sponsored to push back against onerous and unconstitutional mandates. | | | | Pictured: Dr. Robert Malone, Senator Amanda Chase and Dr. Paul Marik. Dr. Robert Malone was the inventor of the Covid vaccine. Although he took the jab, he later withdrew his support and is now actively exposing the truth about the side effects of the vaccine, to include death. Dr. Paul Marik spoke as a subject matter expert on several of my medical freedom bills. People want choice not mandates. | STANDING FOR THE 2ND AMENDMENT | Many of you heard me speak at the 2020 VCDL Legislative Day at the Capitol when there were well over 50,000 gun loving Virginians who arrived in Virginia. You can trust me to protect your gun rights. To me it's personal. You can trust me to stand up for the 2nd Amendment. | | | | == | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Some politicians say that they support the 2nd Amendment. I have both a public history and legislative record of opposing gun control. Action should trump rhetoric. I've actually introduced legislation to repeal the gun control laws that the Democrat controlled General Assembly passed in 2020. | | | After I was assaulted on multiple occasions on Capitol grounds, I decided to open carry. It worked. The national protestors that flooded our state capitol finally stopped laying hands on me. I believe with all of my heart that guns save lives. I also believe an armed society is a polite society. | | | | | Many have taken this picture out of context. My team and I were standing on Bank Street in front of the Virginia Capitol in Richmond with hundreds of pro-2nd Amendment supporters from all walks of life. | | | July 4, 2020, I was asked to be speak at a Pro-2nd Amendment Rally in downtown Richmond at our state capitol. I was told it was too dangerous to go. Both Antifa and BLM were supposed to be there. My security team and I made the decision to go anyway. Keep in mind the Richmond Police and just been demoralized by Democrat Mayor Levar Stoney. This picture was taken in the streets of Richmond. | The Democrat Trifecta of 2020 passed scores of gun control legislation like one gun a month, universal background checks, red flag laws and gun free zones could not be created by localities. I spoke out against these bills that were a violation of both our U.S. Constitution and our Virginia Constitution. The Democrats controlled the Virginia Senate, the Virginia House and Governor Ralph Northam was Governor. Legislatively, there was nothing we could do. We didn't have the votes. So I chose to go public and expose to the American people what the Democrats were doing. | | Bloomberg and others nefarious actors were dumping millions of dollars into Virginia. It was an all out war on our 2nd Amendment rights. While I knew we didn't have the votes, I chose to be creative and get vocal. | | To implement socialism, I knew they would first come for our guns. And they did. Instead of protecting individual rights for people to protect themselves, the Democrats were more interested in protecting the criminals, including violent offenders. | | | STANDING UP FOR INNOCENT LIFE THOSE WHO CAN'T SPEAK UP FOR THEMSELVES | The Pro-family, non-profit group, The Family Foundation issues a legislative scorecard so that Virginians can see how their legislator scores on pro-family issues. For my entire 8 year legislative career, year after year from 2016 through 2023, I received a perfect score of 100%. You can trust that I will stand for life, because I have a voting record you can trust. Not just my words. | | | Life begins at fertilization. Even 98% of scientists agree. I introduced a Life Begins at Conception bill. The Senate Rules Committee refused to make a motion to vote up or down on the bill. If they voted for the bill, they would have to agree that life begins at conception. If they voted down the bill, they would oppose the opinion of 98% of scientists. | | | I've been honored to speak at Family Foundation organized pro-life rallies at the Virginia State Capitol. After SCOTUS overturned the Landmark Roe vs Wade Case, CNN asked for an interview. I'm not afraid to stand for life. | | | | | | == | I led the effort in the Virginia Senate to defeat the so called Equal Right Amendment, a failed amendment that was resurrected from the 70s. The false claim was that it should be passed to give women equal rights and codify it in the Constitution. The real agenda was to promote gender fluidity, a concept that seemed so foreign until today. I was an outspoken leader against the so called Equal Rights Amendment. Listen as I speak against SJR 284 on the floor of the Virginia Senate. | | == | I've worked under two Democrat governors and one Republican governor. There are different strategies that have to be used for each. Under a Democrat governor, we know pro-life legislation will not pass. So do we continue to introduce legislation even when we know it will not pass? I believe that we should and I do. It's important that we put legislators on the record so that voters know how they will vote when we do have the votes and it does count. | | | | | | | The late Virginia Senator Eva Mae Scott (R-Amelia) and I speak at a press conference organized by The Family Foundation against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment. | STANDING UP FOR SECURE ELECTIONS MAKING SURE YOUR VOTE COUNTS | | When voters in my senate district went to cast their vote in 2020, many said that they couldn't vote because someone had already cast their vote for them. I was determined to investigate and get to the bottom of this, despite efforts to be shamed into not questioning the 2020 Presidential Election results. | | | I flew to Arizona to witness the first ever full forensic audit so that I knew what legislation to introduce in Virginia. Clearly there was a national effort to steal our elections and what they were doing in Arizona was happening all across the country, but only Republican controlled legislators were able to investigate. I worked very closely with the Arizona legislature. My hope was to have a full forensic audit right here in Virginia, but the legislature was completely controlled by the Democrats. So I sought to expose what was happening across the country, and eventually right here in Virginia. | | | Pictured: Arizona State Senator Wendy Rodgers, Senator Amanda Chase, Representative Mark Finchem and Senator Sonny Borrelli. | | | The Voter Confidence Restoration Act was just one of many bills that I introduced to put the guardrails back on our Virginia elections and restore voter confidence in our elections. While my goal was ultimately a full forensic audit of the 2020 election, I knew that wouldn't happen with a Democrat controlled legislature. So, I led the effort to simply go back to our Virginia Election Law best practices prior to covid, back when we required photo ID to vote, we had an election day instead of an election season and there were no drop boxes. | | | While in South Dakota at the Mike Lindell Cyber Symposium I founded the National Election Integrity Caucus for legislators across the country. Together we worked on and shared legislative ideas and bills to assist with our election integrity efforts. | | | STANDING UP ON JAN 6 | I was there on January 6. But I did not go into the nation's Capitol. Many of us believed the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and joining the protest at the Capitol in DC with President Trump to exercise our First Amendment right to free speech and to contest the election results. We were counting on Vice President Mike Pence to do the right thing. Unfortunately, he did not and his political career is over. I stand up for true election integrity. As a result, I was censured by the Virginia Senate with 3 Republicans joining. | | | | | | STANDING UP FOR SAFER COMMUNITIES LOCKING UP VIOLENT CRIMINALS | Over the past 8 years, I have introduced legislation to support our law enforcement to include the Law Enforcement Bill of Rights. I voted against repealing qualified immunity. | | | | | YOU CAN TRUST ME TO STAND | When you are considering who you are going to support for Governor, ask yourself who has a history of standing up for the people? Who can best beat Abigail Spamberger in November? Please commit to collecting signatures to get me name on the ballot. We only have until April 3 to get over 10,000 signatures, 400 in each Congressional District. Please be sure to reach us at craig@chaseforva.com or me at amanda@chaseforva.com if you have any questions. You know that I'm pro-life, pro-gun, pro-school choice, pro-medical freedom, pro-election integrity because I have a history of fighting for you and have a voting record you can trust. I have 8 years of experience as a Virginia Senator. Plus I have an 8 year voting record you can trust. Please join Team Chase today and help us collect signatures today! | | | Virginia State Senator 2016-2023 | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025 | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase 2025 | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Another day another...secret?
body:
Dems move to BLOCK the will of the voters
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQfCMunmtx24IDMdf3o_Dx_8PKxTtk2hOYgfxqo11voJOY8vNUopOWXE8tr_kbE09GXEuAU2zzobKN4gZ4yqmyuV0Up6GM4QHu3giiW8CmDZaqtBRzsv4Nqv1xH5TMcALSMBw5lOggmR98LGe37p6w==&c=A04u22_6tcQbeX8-mNcHf_1b_jVCSJ7_iUnhyGcgEtKgFXA9IldN3Q==&ch=pH2G1ajMaN-rzvvYLrBwW3vGZmxBz0KoO6xvAWxuwx5s9ec15MSNIA==)
---
| Dear Peter,
In a blatant rejection of government accountability, the Democratic Supermajority blocked a Republican-led rule change that would have required the chamber to undergo an audit by Auditor DiZoglio's office, as mandated by Ballot Question 1--an initiative overwhelmingly approved by voters.
Every. Single. Republican voted in favor of the rule change. Every. Single. Republican voted for transparency and good governance.
It's the Democratic Supermajority that stood in opposition in a deliberate attempt to shield themselves from scrutiny.
This is a classic power grab! Instead of respecting the democratic process, House Speaker Ron Mariano and his allies are stonewalling Republican efforts to uphold the will of the voters.
Democrats claim to support transparency, yet at every turn, they block oversight, consolidate their power, and keep taxpayers in the dark. What are they so afraid of?
Republicans are committed to real solutions, transparency, and putting Massachusetts families first.
It's a winning position - and part of the reason why Republican candidates have won every special election since I became State Party Chair.
We must continue elect commonsense Republicans at all levels of government to fight back against the Democrats' insanity.
The MassGOP has the plan, the candidates, the winning formula, and the determination. But it's you and your support that will make it a reality.
---
| | [FUND CANDIDATE TRAINING WORKSHOPS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQfCMunmtx24IDMdf3o_Dx_8PKxTtk2hOYgfxqo11voJOY8vNUopORqQd92yDcFJi1HllWi1GulLuUPxUjZbfB_wLaCmYk1Y97oIUW6FItJZHP9EFwU8Q0p0SjuFmtqK9o2PncBpxe4wmNp2f9cGNtb8Arj_MNDrlONP3FBvkEcJkza3OUFum4rHSsDEjyXu&c=A04u22_6tcQbeX8-mNcHf_1b_jVCSJ7_iUnhyGcgEtKgFXA9IldN3Q==&ch=pH2G1ajMaN-rzvvYLrBwW3vGZmxBz0KoO6xvAWxuwx5s9ec15MSNIA==)
---
Thank you,
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP
| |
---

clean_body: Dems move to BLOCK the will of the voters | | | | | == | Dear Peter, In a blatant rejection of government accountability, the Democratic Supermajority blocked a Republican-led rule change that would have required the chamber to undergo an audit by Auditor DiZoglio's office, as mandated by Ballot Question 1--an initiative overwhelmingly approved by voters. Every. Single. Republican voted in favor of the rule change. Every. Single. Republican voted for transparency and good governance. It's the Democratic Supermajority that stood in opposition in a deliberate attempt to shield themselves from scrutiny. This is a classic power grab! Instead of respecting the democratic process, House Speaker Ron Mariano and his allies are stonewalling Republican efforts to uphold the will of the voters. Democrats claim to support transparency, yet at every turn, they block oversight, consolidate their power, and keep taxpayers in the dark. What are they so afraid of? Republicans are committed to real solutions, transparency, and putting Massachusetts families first. It's a winning position - and part of the reason why Republican candidates have won every special election since I became State Party Chair. We must continue elect commonsense Republicans at all levels of government to fight back against the Democrats' insanity. The MassGOP has the plan, the candidates, the winning formula, and the determination. But it's you and your support that will make it a reality. | | == Thank you, | | Amy Carnevale Chair, MassGOP | | | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Get Voter ID on the ballot
body:
Peter, Are you ready to take back Trenton this November? We urgently need your help. The 2024 Election was such a huge win
|
---
| Peter, Are you ready to take back Trenton this November? We urgently need your help. The 2024 Election was such a huge win for conservatives, partly because we were more vigilant on election integrity. Making sure our elections are fair and free of fraud is vital to our electoral system. That’s why this year, Citizens for NJ Election Integrity is focused on ensuring only citizens vote. Common sense, right? We have the opportunity to get voter ID requirement questions on the ballot in municipalities across New Jersey. How? In towns that are organized under the Faulkner Act, residents can get questions on the ballot with petitions from 15% of the registered voter population. If we can get a common sense voter ID question on the ballot in multiple towns, residents will have the chance to vote on this popular legislation and we can crack down on non-citizen voting (critical when you consider that approximately 10% of New Jersey’s population is illegal). The Left loves to exploit loopholes in our election laws and we’ve got to close them up, one by one, starting with voter ID. This step is critical if we’re going to take back Trenton and continue to win. This is where you come in. Will you volunteer to gather petition signatures and help Citizens for NJ Election Integrity recruit others to expand this effort in your area? Here are the areas of focus:
* Robbinsville Township
* East Windsor Township
* West Windsor Township
* Hamilton Township
* Bradley Beach Borough
* Belmar Borough
* Keansburg Borough
* Highlands Borough
* Bridgewater Township
* Franklin Township

In or near one of these towns? Interested? **Reply to this email and say “I want to volunteer.”** I know we can make big changes in November–but we need all hands on deck. Thank you for your efforts! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
| Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/26187568/80aed0dd2a559077) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

---

Hey Reader,

A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...

After months of grinding, they came out with this prototype that blew everyone's minds.

It uses this patented military tech that makes it 20X more badass than anything as regular Joes can buy.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20527/6374453/fbbda548ed3a7a82fb2691dba5740ab0fa3f1eac/8e22cb4a90e65654082db5562ed6055a20142092)
---
Literally, you can spy on SWAT teams with this.

It looks just like you’re shining a spotlight on your targets...

It uses military-graded nanotech to magnify 10X more than any other IR monoscopes out there.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer this monoscope optic to you at an **[INSANE discount...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20527/6374453/1d0a5a57025789a2af5a3d04e6f3df0c666dc71a/8e22cb4a90e65654082db5562ed6055a20142092)**

These won’t last long at this price.

In fact, I’m positive these will run out soon.

**[Check here to see if NightVision Monoscope are still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20527/6374453/1d0a5a57025789a2af5a3d04e6f3df0c666dc71a/8e22cb4a90e65654082db5562ed6055a20142092)**

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: We need your voice to make a difference.
body:
We’ve developed a range of impactful projects and content aimed at driving change during the off-year and leading into the midterms. Your insights on these initiatives would be instrumental in keeping our base informed and motivated.
| | | | | |
---
**Share Your Input to Shape the Future!**
---
|
---
friend, The fight for a government that truly represents working people starts with **you**. The political establishment has spent decades ignoring the voices of teachers, nurses, farmers, and everyday workers—the very people who keep this country running. **It’s time to change that.** That’s why we need your input. **Real change begins when working-class voices are heard and empowered.** By taking a few minutes to complete this short survey, you’ll help us: ✅ **Prioritize the issues that matter most to working families.** ✅ **Create real opportunities for people—not billionaires—to lead.** ✅ **Strengthen our grassroots movement to take on corporate power.** Your feedback will shape the future of this movement as we fight for a government that works **for the people, not the elite.** Will you take a moment to share your thoughts?
---
| [Share your input to shape the future!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wn8k3-vcmf55-kyd76rh2/)
---
Thank you for your time and commitment. -The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| | | | |
---
__ONE__ donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in __EVERY__ major battleground. **Maximize your impact this cycle →** **No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wn8k3--15aab-kyd76rh7&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wn8k3--15aab-kyd76rh7&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

That’s why we need your input. Real change begins when working-class voices are heard and empowered. By taking a few minutes to complete this short survey, you’ll help us: ✅ Prioritize the issues that matter most to working families. ✅ Create real opportunities for people—not billionaires—to lead. ✅ Strengthen our grassroots movement to take on corporate power. Your feedback will shape the future of this movement as we fight for a government that works for the people, not the elite. Will you take a moment to share your thoughts? | Thank you for your time and commitment. -The No Dem Left Behind Team | | | | | ONE donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in EVERY major battleground. name: Riley Gaines
subject: The trans-lobby is coming back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project](https://go
body:
This fight isn’t over. We need to keep pushing.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, we were on the brink of destruction. Women’s _sports_ , women’s _rights -_ our very identities - were teetering on the edge of erasure.
But because of **YOU** and **THIS MOVEMENT** that we built together... **We fought back and we won**.
Now? The radical left is furious.
If you’ve got a moment, I want to explain why it is that they’re doing this, and why it’s so important that we never, ever surrender an inch of ground to them.
The radical left isn’t just confused. They’re not just “wrong” about gender. This isn’t some well-meaning misunderstanding. This is a Marxist revolution, and it is about power.

[CRUSH THE MARXISTS – DON’T LET THEM REGROUP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
They are waging a Marxist war on reality itself.
They want a future where God’s creation, biology, reality itself can be dictated by their whims.
And once they’ve finished tearing down anybody that doesn’t believe that biology is up for debate, they’ll tear down anybody that would disagree with them about anything.
They NEED to dismantle the biological truth of _male_ and _female_ because it is the foundation of their entire twisted belief system. Without it, their whole house of lies collapses.
**That’s why they’re regrouping and plotting their counterattack as you read this.**
They know they can’t seize that power as long as basic biological truths still stand.
**If men and women are real, distinct, and unchangeable, then there are basic Universal truths.**
There are natural mandates, given to us by God, that no human being can defy... And if that’s the case, then their backwards Marxist ploys will always come crashing down.
**They are desperate to destroy those truths.**

[CRUSH THE MARXISTS – DON’T LET THEM REGROUP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
They want a world where they can tell you that men give birth, that women can compete against men and win, and that sex is just an idea rather than a fundamental reality. ****
**They demand that you accept it****or else.****They don’t care who they hurt.******

Women, children, families, anyone who stands in their way is collateral damage. Just like in Eastern Europe, China, and South America throughout the 20th century.

They will destroy careers, ruin reputations, and even physically endanger those who dissent because to them, the cause matters more than the consequences.

This is not over. _**It will never be over unless we finish the fight.**_

[CRUSH THE MARXISTS – DON’T LET THEM REGROUP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We must strike now, before they regain their footing. They are already building their counterattack.
**__[That’s why I need you to step up TODAY. Every dollar we raise goes to furthering our cause – a cause that will never bow to Marxist garbage – and desecrating the cause of the demons so committed to pushing Marxism that our daughters and the harm that can come to them are mere collateral damage in the pursuit of their brave new world](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
Don’t let them steal our victory. Donate now.

_In the fight,_

**Riley Gaines**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a5rH/?__vbtrk=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3ODYyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! ## Panic at Dallas Cheerleading Event
A fight that broke out during a cheerleading competition at the Kay Bailey Hutchison Convention Center in Dallas on Saturday [sparked a “panic”](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAUhZ_GdEbXfwEXLrahy7ZbImPfwJWMHWFvSN5-xGja6T6dIx0dff_u891Torz-9Tu69n6UWYI0HBQHNUdP6TPrLroFohUdOjFoAaDkaLrNobBWjVaBB6m1MGhwHAGDXoRCaWNH7hoDBUoIMxjRDzdjIQxxsP4WTECmASO1cvRtw4ZvXx_pU1549KHsXXJba8_K1B8mJyan8zz7vISMZ716JqcLmZz-V_5DiV7Il1RWJqfoU_KVhw3xSOgj5ZWHsj-xUaOSed1KaVdIOVDE3PgRshdWK227w8XnSSlRvQ1Mw7p7St-n2q-WXk5-BQAA__-zVGsa) when noises caused by falling poles were mistaken for gunshots. Attendees fled the building in a “stampede,” and [10 people were hospitalized](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp_G7rD4NXZBcRt3ue2W1jHg-KwwWEBC8varbL_dV3wajebrtt4AA8b7fzi9qa89rZxyRaggVKwOMLxX2TuzUTez3humJaNU8En1h4FpnqwAu9FNjmqfRu0V905ugoPgm-7RfGBUUMGY0ooNelQztdrpGUarrO8k9Q5rykM9fPUvKHt4p6fPg01nH8xR61U68a_jS8eX1tqwp5eMvpXPoePLZ3Z8YZRg_H5k74h7ZIx3UqA-soN3IdECgRBIqZBJhIopQiD2gPPCFMuBF3GpxZpaJA5CgNJn466GIWAZdSfp_QQMv0b1z0RPw38CAAD__4C1bBA) with non-life-threatening injuries. Activities were canceled for the rest of the day but resumed Sunday “with enhanced security measures.” [No arrests have been made](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OIyEQhJ-GybCav2EICC6ZbC-90GqgWSNhsGa4Zf32J1uXblj6pCrV9-fj-oGllvb5G-_kx3fuVwnScFAc1DVhqc-rXpIPkJxYyAurBYCSm1luHoJw2hlaTUwYVNpshihDDmENzjm9FP8qAwVKCGONuNjVOIg2WYdrNJGYBkpl9OMybjToG89cn_2Ljkvs96X62xiPk6lfTO5M7nPOy8yIL8jkjscosRKTe6N5MrnXHrEyuSesFU8e-982nq_cZxt9Nv4fvId4i8jjjeiohIkOHvv9QaOM0hsvLZZEbTC5y81yQ9sqgDI3wWqupSEeQGaeUCXIWxarweXw6TFLreVcLdPwecdS3zfGj16_vPwXAAD__-tNepU) in connection with the incident. The National Cheerleaders Association All-Star Championship was expected to bring 58,000 people to Dallas for the weekend. While Dallas has hosted the annual competition [for the past 30 years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u2zAMBeCnsTcG-rHs60FDFqPLLdCpY8BIVKxCkgOJjpO3LxKgY-ePPMA5v78v3xhTLLefmMnyM2wXJZQBoUHoi8eYXpeh9_Yq_Cx7snIapBBafZl-tRj8rL0K4joHKcIQhPnSGMIVNY04Uh_tO0xooaU0k5GnaTSzcJOfZhydcdQNgnzkrZ54JaYntpBe24PqyW25T3ZlvrdOnzu1dGo5juOUW3lbpxYqsLdOLff9mqKDhoH4BVg8UKZ6o-IivX0lTLx-4N9NospvKg7BbflOHDluBSq1PVODI_IKVFYsjjw0cnuN_IJM2PZKDZDBY0rYwG3lQeXz7Kgw1U4tWOF8lmfz48-vvlp_P2JKsY1TN4hbxpg-3fi_Yz-s-hsAAP__GNGHLw), next year’s championship will be held in Houston.
## Texas Company Puts Lander on Moon
Blue Ghost One, a lunar lander developed by Cedar Park’s Firefly Aerospace, successfully touched down on the moon yesterday morning after a 45-day journey, becoming the [first commercial spacecraft](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7tuwyAYRp8Gb1g_9zAwdPGWrh0trgEJm8iQi9--Svcu3_TpHJ2f63q1pZb99m23aMY7tZUCFRgYBrYGW-q58ikYB0GTKRqiOAFg9CKmbAihnMsERHvPg7OcSu24kkEHZ5mzUzEfGDBghAglyKyk0OBVUNpKL3xEHGIoox3zyHHEt-2pnu0Zj9m3baomj3HviH0huiC6pLLb3cf5tLm1zwPRZY-vjujy6DiVY_tMTPXs2NVHxLfc-sCgOBUKLpc5j61Ohwn3V6m1dKkQh9tmS_3TjX_7n4b-BgAA__-wMFzN) to achieve the feat. The lander will [conduct several experiments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOhCAYhZ8GOwwXkaGg2MZutt3S_MKPkqAYYcfx7TdOv91JziUn389zfEJMcZu_YUVb3yGPgglFmaRMjh5iusau8XZi3vAGLdcdZ0yKh2oWG3o5ee16VF5j6LrgzMOgQjCGc-ZkE-09xiSTnCuteKt7ZZjTXhvonXJIOoY-1ny0dcGKbyghXfmFR-vy2iS71LoXIr-IGIgYzvNs3VQ2PMvtEzHckojh06QurztsFw3xwJAuCnjksoNDOqVfpPOSS71DKx4uQqJrzhtNsPm4zUQMzWH9fsaUYuk16di8QkyfH_VfMC8r_gIAAP__qyBoaA) for NASA’s Commercial Lunar Payload Services (CLPS) initiative, including collecting samples and testing a machine designed to prevent dust buildup. It will also capture images of a lunar sunset—the first since the Apollo missions—and take photos of a total lunar eclipse on March 14. Blue Ghost is expected to operate until the [end of the current lunar day](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O2zAQhJ9G6tbgj2TKBYs06i5tSmOPXJkLUKRA7lm-PH3g69MNMJgPg-_Px_0DOXN5_MadvLy2ejfKzKAsKHuPyPn7Po3Rf6p40yN57SatlDXLPCa_mC04q7Zp024x5BarlSU7uyUuQRkc2b9hyiqr9exmfXHX-aaCi-6G1zAHGiZFkaW2iyQSemHf8nd9UruEuo_ZJ5GjD_bXYNbBrOd5XvqBgd7tYNafDPQ6cm0oXMtg1p1751r6YFbCJgl64kId3lDYay3ABXDHv1weoLvAkarUDlurOxyNnygEn_mL4JFqF8hYIjU4qRFgzu-1JBQ4OMhXo7H5eJycM_erGyb12JHzz3n5r82nN_8CAAD__8Mhe2E)—about two weeks from now—when its solar panels will stop providing power. A lander developed by Houston-based Intuitive Machines is scheduled to join Blue Ghost on the moon this Thursday. One of the company’s landers [reached the moon last year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQAJ_GdEbG5rdwcQ1drr0SLet1WMlgZJuQvP0pX__1o9Fo_j2WB3Dg4_kXdrLl7eOile6kMlKZxQGHz9JWzq7KTU1FthnaRimjx67arPGNn1ARoF9h1eM6rmZQsPYGW40jVWy_MmWUaZpu6Jp66LtJ4eCGCXrskESryHGJqS4bFXpD9uETX5RqjHsV7FbKmYX5I_Qs9Hzfd52R6SjsGWGnxAjHFxV6hlQYAwk9r-Ei-dxiLhLkmfgFheQls8wnIGECX2S-EClnf4XwkQEOl2U8ZNlI7jEeQs9Vsu68OQTO_SBa9dyBw09V-XXTy-r_AQAA__8dNm3p), but it was damaged on impact.
## NASCAR Visits Austin
NASCAR’s [third Cup Series race of the 2025 season](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0ULuO4zAQ-xq5k6G37ELFNe5y7ZXGnDSOB5BjQ1Li5O8XyW67DQuSIAn-u8wXoEy361_YMLTnss9KKMuF5kLPCSi_ZtOl8F-kUXYYpDdSCK0G261hEc4uA7g0LCZpHJ2XQwQp0aBC48aOwjtMaKGltN7K3js7iuiTH8FFG5EZgYnaXvq2YsMn1CW_9geWPu5bl8Pa2lGZ_sPUxNR0nmd_gxrhIzM13fCsfMNEwNT0rmJqEvoN6ofg334e7wevWAgrj1TinRrfF95W5LBhoQiVF4jIC0Y4mJq6EtJxUs5UnWdGXDeg_BnVfn3pEdRXAAAA__-a1WgO) was held yesterday at the Circuit of the Americas track in Austin. Christopher Bell earned his second consecutive and 11th career win during the 95-lap, 228-mile contest. It was the fifth year NASCAR held a race at the 3.4-mile course completed in 2012 to host Formula 1 contests. This year’s course was [shortened to 2.3 miles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GSgyAURb8GOpwHiGhBsY1dtt3SQXgosygZZGP8-52kT3_nnnN-btPNxhT35dtuaOoz5EmAUAwkAzl5G9M1tdSbGfzAKRquWw4gRa_oalQvAfthVoF3vecB9AwKpeLAheIeaTSvM5AgOVda8UZ3agCnvR5s55RD0gL6WHNp6ooVn_YI6coPLI3LG01mrfV-EPlFxEjE-Nbx-dxDLg5fEyLG3R7OFrZgPdiOJ6vFul-W7JX_Kgu5MJerJWKkxfj7GVOKR6dJC8tmY3pj6sfuhxH_AQAA__-qslrO), eliminating the track’s longest straightaway. After finishing second at COTA last year, Bell took the lead in the final laps of the race and held off the previous winner, William Byron, to get the win. Connor Zilisch, 18, made his Cup Series debut, [finishing last](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQhJ8Gd1hrsE1cUFxDl2uvtPaWdYyETQQkTvL0p6S_ZpqR5uf7Oc9nDDHsl2_c2NbHkmYFapCgJejZY4jPuW-8_QU_dQ3bzvQdgFanoVnthMygx94YGCY6UX8C6r2eFuJuGv3SBPsOAw266wYzdK0ZhwnIeDPhSAOx6IF9qCm3deXKDyxLfKY755bS1kS71notQn8J5YRyx3G0OxbCjy2U2_kocmMfUCj3rhLKgX6LEsrR7SoL58BFfj5Rqigp7XvK8hViKLRKj3vgKMsNM78kZSyrUK7J1l-PEGMooxE9XDYM8TOp_svobtVfAAAA___mIme6) after winning the Xfinity Series race the day before.

clean_body: A fight that broke out during a cheerleading competition at the Kay Bailey Hutchison Convention Center in Dallas on Saturday sparked a “panic” when noises caused by falling poles were mistaken for gunshots. | | | | | | Monday, March 3, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1837, President Andrew Jackson appointed Alcée Louis La Branche to be the to the Republic of Texas. A Texas company celebrated the first successful commercial moon landing over the weekend. Check out and more in today's edition! Expect an email from us soon on behalf of our partner, , with insights on protecting your retirement savings. We hope you find their message useful! Tax Season is here, and you can maximize your refund right now with special deals from today's sponsor, . Abilene 🌩️ 84/54° | Amarillo 🌧️ 75/40° | Austin 🌩️ 77/65° | Brownsville 🌦️ 80/70° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 78/67° | DFW ☁️ 72/56° | El Paso ⛅ 77/46° | Houston 🌩️ 78/64° | Laredo 🌦️ 87/69° | Lubbock ⛅ 81/44° | Midland 🌤️ 83/48° | San Antonio 🌩️ 78/65° | Tyler 🌩️ 69/53° | Waco 🌩️ 76/62° | Panic at Dallas Cheerleading Event A fight that broke out during a cheerleading competition at the Kay Bailey Hutchison Convention Center in Dallas on Saturday when noises caused by falling poles were mistaken for gunshots. Attendees fled the building in a “stampede,” and with non-life-threatening injuries. Activities were canceled for the rest of the day but resumed Sunday “with enhanced security measures.” in connection with the incident. The National Cheerleaders Association All-Star Championship was expected to bring 58,000 people to Dallas for the weekend. While Dallas has hosted the annual competition , next year’s championship will be held in Houston. Texas Company Puts Lander on Moon Blue Ghost One, a lunar lander developed by Cedar Park’s Firefly Aerospace, successfully touched down on the moon yesterday morning after a 45-day journey, becoming the to achieve the feat. The lander will for NASA’s Commercial Lunar Payload Services (CLPS) initiative, including collecting samples and testing a machine designed to prevent dust buildup. It will also capture images of a lunar sunset—the first since the Apollo missions—and take photos of a total lunar eclipse on March 14. Blue Ghost is expected to operate until the —about two weeks from now—when its solar panels will stop providing power. A lander developed by Houston-based Intuitive Machines is scheduled to join Blue Ghost on the moon this Thursday. One of the company’s landers , but it was damaged on impact. NASCAR Visits Austin NASCAR’s was held yesterday at the Circuit of the Americas track in Austin. Christopher Bell earned his second consecutive and 11th career win during the 95-lap, 228-mile contest. It was the fifth year NASCAR held a race at the 3.4-mile course completed in 2012 to host Formula 1 contests. This year’s course was , eliminating the track’s longest straightaway. After finishing second at COTA last year, Bell took the lead in the final laps of the race and held off the previous winner, William Byron, to get the win. Connor Zilisch, 18, made his Cup Series debut, after winning the Xfinity Series race the day before. | Flying together with our sponsor . () ➤ League City: Thieves stole the wheels from 11 Teslas in a parking lot earlier this month. Surveillance footage from nearby businesses has not yielded any leads. () ➤ Brownsville: A Cameron County jailer was arrested Thursday after allegedly instigating a fight with an inmate and later filing a report claiming he was injured during a fall. () ➤ Greenville ISD: Several students at Travis Intermediate School gave each other tattoos using the same needle. The teachers responsible for the students have been suspended. () ➤ Dallas: Federal agents arrested eight alleged gang members found with weapons, drugs, cash, jewelry, and a live alligator, which was transferred to the Dallas Zoo. () ➤ Allen: Republican State Rep. Jeff Leach has asked Attorney General Ken Paxton to investigate plans to develop a Muslim-centric neighborhood in Collin and Wise counties, stating that implementing Shariah law would be unlawful. Last week, Gov. Abbott said the community, as portrayed in a viral video, “is not allowed in Texas.” () ➤ Corpus Christi: Naval Air Station Kingsville held a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Friday for the nation’s first aircraft protective enclosures at hot pit refueling sites, providing shelter from the elements during aircraft refueling. name: History Facts
subject: The year didn't always start in January
body:
Today’s modern calendar comes with a lot of quirks, not least of which are the names of the last four months.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dg1pbvprquc246jw3hs7xokc1bpe4p16o7ktlu9b3bvj4hegmqm62tomlbu7lpffesvojwj5wn996box80zzklwwrvdngi5wcoufiiz5racv1pbu433uhrhf24dy0z75il39lmocwd2g0pg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The ancient Roman calendar started the year in March.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T oday’s modern calendar comes with a lot of quirks, not least of which are the names of the last four months. Although September, October, November, and December seemingly begin with numeral prefixes, the numbers don’t match their place in the calendar. October, for example, is not the eighth month of the year, but the 10th. So what’s going on here? Well, [blame the Romans](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---
Ancient Rome’s original calendar, which according to myth was created by the city’s legendary founder Romulus in the eighth century BCE, contained only 10 months. The year lasted 304 days, beginning in March (named for the Roman god Mars) and ending in December, the 10th month (marking the annual harvest). But because this calendar woefully underestimated the true length of a year, it was replaced with a new calendar by the Roman king Numa Pompilius around 713 BCE. The new calendar put the year at 355 days long, divided into 12 months, based on the cycles of the moon. It added the month of January to the start of the year and tacked on February at the end, though the latter eventually moved to its current position between January and March. This change threw the numerically named months (which at that point also included Quintilis and Sextilis) out of whack. Strangely, no one seemed to mind, and this quirk of the calendar has been with us ever since.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A German librarian deciphered the Maya calendar.
One of the most complex calendars in history is the timekeeping system created by the Maya thousands of years ago. For centuries, scholars didn’t know what to make of the ancient calendar — in fact, they didn’t even know how to read it. That changed with [the arrival of Ernst Förstemann](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssjqp8&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a librarian at the Royal Library in Dresden, Germany. Although he had no background in Maya history or culture, Förstemann _did_ have an appetite for mathematics and, luckily, access to the Dresden Codex, one of the earliest surviving books written in the Americas, which is filled with Maya hieroglyphics. With help from a 1566 book detailing the inner workings of the Maya writing system, Förstemann decoded the culture’s complex system of three interlocking calendars — the Sacred Round, Solar Round, and Long Count calendar. Building on his work, scholars eventually concluded that August 13, 3114 BCE — known to the Maya as _4 Ahau 8 Cumku_ — represented the beginning of creation in the Mesoamerican civilization.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zin42p0r5uuf41h7aant9k18hus7mta7935o6br0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj4c3h2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_

Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend.
