name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zahgtde8usj650ot9dj9fjhhu8m2v6dv7t7hnkh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zas85gmdqi595mdv2s2t2d04v8m6fdprhdjnfqc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj6c9h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr5m75orffnve0mo9p4r3m7ool7jsuvm5tqe2330_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj6c9h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf6fn12k4rvpj2untuie8u2mq0ts7i3cso9m8cog_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj6c9h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0nvkj8lvbf6u49g2ccd6kvvf3cqtq9pkc015ib0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c1jm6pb5c8gq48bi4bh28pr1chg64p32cph649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhf83rdp76ig70muejsb0i5ge6l8jmo5m4hlaks8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h68oj6c9h2bs)_

name: Courtney Brady, Evergreen
subject: TODAY: Help save clean energy programs
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Learn how to be an effective advocate in our current political landscape
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370229/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
|
## **⚡****EVENT ALERT****⚡**
Join us, Representative Melanie Stansbury, and Forward Together Wisconsin President Mandela Barnes, for a briefing on how Congress could destroy clean energy and climate programs this year—and what state advocates can do about it! We’ll share the tools needed to effectively defend key clean energy investments in the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). The conversation takes place **next Monday, March 3 at 2 p.m. ET.** [RSVP NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370230/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi friend,

While the Trump administration continues to prove they will illegally shut down federal programs, key climate and clean energy programs are also under threat from Congress.

Earlier this week, House Republicans narrowly passed their FY2025 budget resolution, which calls for slash-and-burn legislation **that would threaten vital climate programs, including tax credits for clean energy, clean transportation, and energy efficiency.** All to hand billionaires and corporations a massive $4.5 trillion tax giveaway.

Next up is the budget bill itself, and if the GOP succeeds in its efforts to gut the climate and clean energy programs, we could see devastating rollbacks to clean energy tax credits, job-creating incentives, and programs that help Americans save on their energy bills—**all programs that voters _overwhelmingly support._**

**Congress must push back against the administration’s efforts to stop lawful programs from functioning, AND defend those programs during the budget reconciliation process.**

To dig deeper into what is happening and what we (and Congress!) can do to effectively advocate for the programs that are on the chopping block, **we’re hosting a webinar on Monday, March 3 at 2 p.m. ET.**

[**Have you, your business or organization, or your community seen benefits from clean energy investments in the IRA? You should join!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370231/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[COUNT ME IN](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370232/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| During the webinar, you’ll hear from me and: |
---
|
* **Representative Melanie Stansbury** , New Mexico’s 1st Congressional District
* **Mandela Barnes** , President and Founder, Forward Together Wisconsin
* **Lena Moffitt** , Executive Director, Evergreen Action
* **Maisy Deans** , Government Affairs Advocate, Evergreen Action

|
---
| We’ll also have plenty of time for Q&A and share an advocacy toolkit afterward.

**Don’t miss this opportunity to understand what reconciliation means for these investments, learn the most compelling messages in today’s environment, and see the value of sharing YOUR impactful story.**[**RSVP today!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370233/87SdQ4wZ)

And bring your questions! |
---
| See you online, |
---
| | |
---
### Courtney Brady
Midwest Deputy Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3370234/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Mar. 3rd: Defund and Dismantle USAID *NOW*!
body:
Tell your elected officials that Americans do not want to continue funding the unaccountable, corrupt spending of USAID.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The deep state is fighting to maintain its grip on power, and USAID is a key resource they desperately need. That's why it must be defunded and dismantled immediately.
In a [recent Federalist article](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ec066f/1edb9794a9eb41ca "recent Federalist article"), journalist Larry Tauton describes his disturbing encounter with USAID in Egypt. When he investigated what their large Cairo office was doing after President Trump's funding cuts, USAID attempted to detain him--an American citizen--using Egypt's police as their proxy, all to conceal how our tax dollars are being spent.
Defunding and dismantling USAID is critical to stopping the deep state's corrupt, fraudulent spending. We urge you to contact your representative and both senators now and demand they turn off the spigot sending American tax dollars into the abyss.s can't hear from us enough because their default is to never actually cut spending, even when it's as unaccountable and outrageous as the spending at USAID.
Use our **[Align Act form](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ec066f/1edb9794a9eb41cc "https://alignact.com/go/defund-and-dismantle-usaid")** to send a message to the House and Senate and our other **[action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ec066f/1edb9794a9eb41ce "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/defund-usaid/")** to send a strong message to the committees that control USAID that says:
* We demand transparency.* We demand an end to government waste.* We demand the DOGE team be allowed to continue their crucial work.
Tell Washington officials and bureaucrats that it's time to put America first!

In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

|

That's why it must be defunded and dismantled immediately. In a "recent Federalist article", journalist Larry Tauton describes his disturbing encounter with USAID in Egypt. Defunding and dismantling USAID is critical to stopping the deep state's corrupt, fraudulent spending. We urge you to contact your representative and both senators now and demand they turn off the spigot sending American tax dollars into the abyss.s can't hear from us enough because their default is to never actually cut spending, even when it's as unaccountable and outrageous as the spending at USAID. Use our "" to send a message to the House and Senate and our other "" to send a strong message to the committees that control USAID that says: We demand transparency. name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvoh2trmotvqegbkqncdigi5eprannfb4ufvgpn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h6cp74c1h2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zalf8abk9sl5s1ilfn8t6tooec4c8llmfknrlclg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h6cp74c1h2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89b99rmmlkck5abuen1li3kj40ojme4bgku977o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h6cp74c1h2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3fmlajnhgv48r4feu4knn287dba69f7veftc6fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h6cp74c1h2bs)
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2t3c41ldmmbfpnm66m4bhbq469thpmn8pg7vnjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h62o76chh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zds4m1fhcirfi1k4m630q2c761p8hu995cb2f2p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h62o76chh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz

What we see today didn’t happen overnight. I’d know better than most. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. Photo by [National Cancer Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/ec7a37c5-2bab-4b89-a051-d7ac318b8bbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/99965f01-913b-4f36-9726-090b2858182b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Imagine you're at the pharmacy, picking up a prescription. You hand over your insurance card, and somehow, the price you pay is way less than the sticker price. Ever wonder how that happens? A big part of the answer is a Pharmacy Benefit Manager, or PBM. These companies act as middlemen between drug makers, pharmacies, and insurance plans, managing prescription drug benefits for everyday people like us. Let's break it down--what they do, their upsides, and the bigger downsides, especially for small pharmacies caught in their web.
What Does a PBM Do?
Picture a PBM as a dealmaker and organizer. When your insurance plan covers drugs, it hires a PBM to handle the logistics. PBMs negotiate with drug companies for discounts, saying, "Lower your price, and we'll push your drug to our customers." They build a "formulary"--a list of covered drugs, often favoring cheaper generics. They also partner with pharmacies, ensuring they get paid by insurance when you fill a prescription. PBMs keep the system moving, processing claims and managing costs behind the scenes.
The Pros of PBMs
PBMs can save money for insurance plans, employers, and sometimes you. By haggling with drug makers, they snag bulk discounts, which can mean lower co-pays at the counter. They push generics--drugs just as good as brand names but cheaper--saving everyone cash. PBMs also simplify things with mail-order options and refill programs, a big help for people with ongoing health needs. Plus, they use data to flag overpriced drugs or errors, keeping the system in check. When they work well, PBMs make drugs more affordable and accessible.
The Cons of PBMs: A Deeper Dive
But here's where it gets messy. PBMs aren't always upfront about their profits. They keep "rebates"--a slice of the discounts they negotiate with drug makers--but don't fully disclose how much they pocket. Critics say this secrecy hides whether patients and insurers are truly getting the best deal or if PBMs are just fattening their bottom line. Some estimate PBMs keep billions in rebates yearly, which raises eyebrows about who they're really serving.
Then there's the formulary power. PBMs decide which drugs get covered, and sometimes they pick pricier options with bigger rebates over cheaper alternatives that work just as well. This can jack up costs for insurance plans, trickling down to higher premiums or out-of-pocket expenses for you. It's like they're playing favorites with drug makers, not patients.
Now, let's talk pharmacies--especially the little guys. Independent pharmacies, the small family-run spots, are getting crushed by PBMs. These middlemen set reimbursement rates--the amount pharmacies get paid for filling your prescription. Often, PBMs pay so little that independents lose money on each script. They might buy a drug for $50, but the PBM reimburses them $45, forcing them to eat the loss. Over time, this squeezes them dry, pushing many to close shop. Studies show thousands of independents have shuttered in recent years, partly due to this pressure.
It gets worse when you realize who's pulling the strings. Big pharmacy chains like CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid don't just run stores--they own PBMs. CVS owns Caremark, one of the largest PBMs, while Walgreens is tied to OptumRx through partnerships. These giants use their PBMs to steer patients to their own stores with better reimbursement rates or exclusive deals, leaving independents out in the cold. For example, a PBM might tell you to fill your script at CVS because it's "in-network," even if the local pharmacy down the street could do it cheaper. This Vertical integration--where one company controls the supply chain--gives chains an edge, turning independents into collateral damage. Rural areas feel it most, losing pharmacies and access to care as independents vanish.
The Bottom Line
PBMs keep the drug system humming, cutting costs and simplifying prescriptions for many. But their lack of transparency, favoritism toward pricey drugs, and stranglehold on independent pharmacies paint a darker picture. When big chains own PBMs, it's a double whammy--boosting their profits while choking out the little guy. Next time you grab your meds, know a PBM's at work, balancing savings with some serious trade-offs.

NBC reporter Joe Kernen **[sounded off on Democrat Senator Elizabeth Warren](https://substack.com/redirect/fac64a04-1d12-4947-a769-7aa07ade21eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for making wildly false claims to his audience during a heated live interview on the cause of inflation.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fac64a04-1d12-4947-a769-7aa07ade21eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fac64a04-1d12-4947-a769-7aa07ade21eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Warren claimed that the government is effectively blameless when it comes to inflation, and the private sector is at fault for "price gouging."
"If you really want to help the middle class, if you really sincerely want to help people having trouble at the grocery store, it's not price gouging that's the issue!" Kernen snapped at Warren. "Why would you propose a flawed idea?"
Warren gave an example of an egg producer called Cal-Maine who she says raised their prices, increasing their profit margins by more than 700%. "That's not just passing along costs!"
"Senator, that is sophistry!" Kernen fired back, calling her out for making a dishonest argument. "Can I tell you why that is misleading at best?" Kernen interrupted Warren who would not stop talking. "The interview is only going to be 6 minutes!"
"Avian Flu caused the destruction of 40 million eggs. (Cal-Maine) has 20% market share but they don't control the market," Kernen began, trying to give a basic economics lesson to the senator. He explained that oil prices, for example are set by supply and demand, governed by factors like availability and supply chain factors. The price of eggs is no different. "The reason that Cal-Maine made that money is because that's what happened to the price!"
**[Watch Kernen tell off socialist Warren right to her face on live T.V.,](https://substack.com/redirect/fac64a04-1d12-4947-a769-7aa07ade21eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and give her the humiliating basic economics class she clearly skipped.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fac64a04-1d12-4947-a769-7aa07ade21eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Sen. Kennedy EXPLODES AT climate warrior who laughs at him during hearing**
Senator John Kennedy **[goes SCORCHED EARTH on PhD climate warrior Scott Kelly](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe6ea62-aeb3-4369-b4fd-642ad16c652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for laughing at him in the middle of a congressional hearing.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe6ea62-aeb3-4369-b4fd-642ad16c652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe6ea62-aeb3-4369-b4fd-642ad16c652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kennedy grilled the panel of climate activists on how much money the United States will have to spend to be carbon-neutral by 2050. After not getting a single straight forward answer, he snapped.
"I can't tell you how many of these hearings I've been to and you say, 'well the world is coming to an end'. Alright, how much will it cost? 'Uh, uh, we don't know, we need to get back to you...' No fair-minded policy maker is going to embark on something that might cost a minimum of $200 billion," he said. "And based on what I've read, that's low. **[I don't know why you just won't answer straight!"](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe6ea62-aeb3-4369-b4fd-642ad16c652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Kelly interrupted, "It's a difficult question to answer because technology advances at different rates so-"
Kennedy yelled, "Of course it's difficult, that's what you're here for! You want us to just go start and worry about the cost later?! Come on professor, this isn't Cambridge! These are tax-payers paying for all of this!"
A smirking Kelly responded, "We need to make hard decisions now to-"
Kennedy lashed out, "Well how much will it cost?! Huh?! You don't even know!" Angrily pushing his microphone away.
**[Watch the heated exchange here:](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe6ea62-aeb3-4369-b4fd-642ad16c652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

body:
There’s a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE.

|
---
| | | Friend,

There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE.

They can't stand the fact that someone is finally holding the bloated bureaucracy accountable and making the government work for the people of our country once again.

They'd rather spend **YOUR** tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia.

---
| | [TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgs169v1ngds2538mio2e7mf6qanhmg9s4lr1oig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h6epb4c5h2bs "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY")

name: Congresswoman Lori Trahan
subject: Celebrating Women's History Month- And Our Continued Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter, [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Lori%20Trahan%20Headshot.jpeg]
Happy Women’s History Month!
I’m honored to represent Massachusetts in Congress alongside incredible women leaders—Whip Clark, Congresswoman Pressley, and Senator Warren. And I’m proud to live in a state led by two powerhouse women, Governor Healey and Lt. Governor Driscoll, who are working every day to make life better for families across our Commonwealth.
Massachusetts has always been at the forefront of women’s history. We’re home to suffragette Susan B. Anthony, Red Cross founder Clara Barton, and the legacy of thousands of "Mill Girls" from Lowell and beyond who helped industrialize the country. It was here that Abigail Adams urged her husband to “Remember the Ladies”—and centuries later, Massachusetts remains a leader in women’s rights.
My own election marked a historic moment when a Congressional seat was passed from one woman to another as I succeeded Congresswoman Niki Tsongas, the first woman to represent our state on Capitol Hill in 25 years.
But we know that progress is never guaranteed. Over the past few years, we’ve seen relentless attacks on women’s rights. Like so many of you, I was outraged when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping women of the right to make decisions about our own bodies. And as an IVF mom, I was horrified when Republicans chose to demonize fertility treatments—lifesaving care that has helped millions of families, including mine.
Now, just weeks into this new administration, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the GOP are already working to roll back our rights and silence our voices. They want us to give up. They want us to back down.
But that’s exactly why we never will.
I’m proud to stand with you in the fight for reproductive freedom, for access to family planning—from IUDs to IVF—and for a government that truly represents us. I will never stop fighting, and I know you won’t either.
With you always,
Congresswoman Lori Trahan

Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d1584ad5fffd4d9d85f73324905cd947&_e=FDGvkTm6EX0Lq59dSIF0DNkEDXusY2-bxWpoCCAjZHR-QFcyBVLs74WukkhJgrmte_y5rbhSBzJGmCct9LU7xTEGKspnremA2N74BUP7k9wC33eqSpR6Qp2Bu5B-7jjUMMLteOHgEsVBj2cq8IonFY01pvE-UhlFCE6fQwAZsksoYnJJSTQWL9y5lHexT-uecxBTIzBKxY_IJaDrkcDDgnQjNmtvrl_fZz59YSI7sMweTM1fhTKYabIxXXsmcumjSuvx4ThBk0g3c2F2iF9zym79FJwXWIVYFAshXSKNeNmcDSafwiG-zsxxlRGcn_5itLtgV6HDzH2XWSCnQ2IN7sExq3Ao9YSA17LjRlZFLYieSyz8yBTd8SO4lh5hYZZOMZZgSqOJ0tk6U6xw_TWboA%3D%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=d1584ad5fffd4d9d85f73324905cd947&_t=SVux71EA-SOFI6jznDiWEeaeENY7DhOkXh-fjfxymTnCFufj5_VKfPpPCKA3gTxl3yR4MEgO4q6C1hhaCVciWhSxzsgH9QKhB-QuYQ2kkOyVMzkNheLPvASWeCFFKlFS)

body:

Attn: Friend,

Silence speaks volumes... _Have you really left the GOP?_

We were alarmed to see that you were marked **["NO RESPONSE"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziclqegp511u1fcs9nd4bq0orjk79se94uh8unt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h69pj0c3h2bs)** on the **["Official: Nationwide Flash Poll."](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj3e4sbea2ke0vsk9tu6p1fotfaqgb5bnum39cp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1h69pj0c3h2bs)**

After all, there's really just _ONE_ question that matters here at the National Republican Senatorial Committee's Polling Department:

name: Josh
subject: ‘the horrifying truth’ about me
body:
I’m a public school teacher and concerned father worried about my country and our future.

Whether you're clearing brush, chopping wood, or handling camp chores—**a machete is a survival essential**. But why settle for just one... When you can get **TWO badass machetes – absolutely FREE**? For a limited time, I’m giving away a **Steel River Cane Machete + Panga Machete**. These are **serious tools** —not some cheap knockoffs. Each one features: **✔ 18” stainless steel blades** – Tough, sharp, and ready for action **✔ Textured, no-slip handles** – Solid grip in any condition **✔ Protective nylon sheaths** – Keeps them safe and secure And to make this even better... **You're protected by a 60-day guarantee.** If you don’t love them, send them back for a full refund. |

| | | Friend,

There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE.

They can't stand the fact that someone is finally holding the bloated bureaucracy accountable and making the government work for the people of our country once again.

They'd rather spend **YOUR** tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia.

name: Senator Bill Hagerty
subject: Coming to you with a Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend - As one of my top supporters, I want you to hear this directly from me.

Friend,

**[I'm excited to announce that I'm running for re-election to the United States Senate.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkb78n9jikm0ceitdtl6otc4bg6ob1q18lvl1208_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)[It's been an honor to champion our conservative values in Washington, and I'm proud of the progress we've made.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zafh750gksqtprsgqu7vjvr63lsnbk9v3748bpmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs) _[But our work is far from over.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu7lqbe4hotvp32ldo7i1n3032jehf0nv3r0vt2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)_**

As a steadfast ally of President Trump and a champion of the MAGA agenda, I've worked tirelessly to defend our country and our way of life. And I'm not done yet.

_But I need your help. As one of my most loyal supporters, I'm counting on you to stand with me._

**[Will you join me as a Founding Donor with a contribution of $25, $50, or $100? Your support will send a strong message that we're not going to back down from the fight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh8r478rtjdmkre2l8qlrdg9fkuvaf5v9lubfkv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)**

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5j06j86a0a9t0i743e4c7275gmb0n8id114sikg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[RE-ELECT SENATOR HAGERTY>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb5a80mdat8810bp58dpftli2irj8dfh1m1868i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)******************************************************

The left is already gearing up to take me on, but I'm not intimidated. I know that with your support, we can take them on and come out on top. We've done it before, and we'll do it again.

As a Founding Donor, you'll join an exclusive group of supporters who are committed to our shared values and the MAGA movement.

**[Please chip in today, and let's do this - together.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8v10huece9smb4llpmssm6abosdm3uh1nuf75ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)**

******************************************************[KEEP SENATOR HAGERTY FIGHTING FOR US>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfbanb0g9l32fbg24uf83sh0vmdhjh5031lt61c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)******************************************************

With gratitude,
Bill Hagerty, United States Senator for Tennessee

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjng47um6cvkkqvqeh4k7s7o1c6n6vrp07vjamv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4gn2938uck2uekn2m1etdh6s1jro0orqpfpehpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6co74clh2bs)******************************************************

During Trump’s first term, Democratic legislators in statehouses across the country worked to protect our fundamental freedoms and keep our communities safe. Now, they need our support to continue resisting the MAGA movement.

[Can you rush $7 to help elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide to strengthen the blue firewall and stand up to Trump’s MAGA agenda? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd32IxiQ_JyaMLXX2eonyIr_5Lh-JTzXvaiRvOVARpuD0dum2LNn5DnEhjuMP_m_xn--k8qYQyMAmlKrlFRkamhp5c5nhuPAHkxy_69NyI4GW7WfZCIMCo8ALLsOKX8N2H_4LWbKzdHi2BLArV5JyrZ4JQu0UYY-ETuUQeRjlduhUsezbGgvEX9hrMJMCU6sGXYwggflAa65aM1FNpx2Uod2FhPpmfAbkfYwckPZ8jv73vix5yG9ZoHFBNfDW9W8J5hURy1AG5h3p3InWaOo7UE2zk1-z-CdDq9OdeMj2uVY7FPeKrlArq7UNYmhd5zmIdpv7PVAHosGpW6AmlehHq4EmyHLfjmSItABz1X0PCWmro4STbCSHX7dnQKwpe3q_a-r8fyr5P1mCfhPsN3MsGqjK9xoILl5wSNPpaCFEnUWHXolEpyVDU4wHZUvCM5qXdNdo4QrukiHBP2msOVR7E5CUxoHzjT5Ow1yB2rL2SH8NL/4eh/uOS0ZI7SRfawUGqaZJQN-g/h0/h001.T93ZI6WElXEBo1vNng5OL6f6l8OSakN5wrYWEYTo51A)

Here’s how state Democrats in places like your community are taking action to protect people like you →

1. **Democracy:** States like Michigan and Nevada have passed new laws to criminalize attempts to intimidate election workers or impede voting.
2. **Abortion Access:** States like California, Illinois, and Maine have passed laws to protect out-of-state patients seeking care and shield providers.
3. **LGBTQ+ Rights:** Democratic legislatures in Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada passed laws to ensure equal rights and ban conversion therapy.

_...And that’s just scratching the surface._

Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to build Democratic power in our statehouses to counter Trump and Republicans’ right-wing agenda.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I have exciting news, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9751c658-f89f-49cd-b871-40d516bef977/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter: I’m running for Governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. I’m humbly asking: [Will you join us by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Blue Amp Action now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T180ef914-3464-4d14-a389-bc180cf3764b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve. My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agricultural tradition that still continues today. I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him. I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn’t let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.) I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit? I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. [Will you join us by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T118287d5-1fa2-4b8c-a6d2-f44b4524db42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I would be honored to have your support. Many thanks to Blue Amp Action for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us, Peter! Be fierce, Deb
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T491579d9-5874-49a1-a7ad-2fb344bed76f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Senator Bill Hagerty
subject: Sharing this news with you specifically.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend - As one of my top supporters, I want you to hear this directly from me.

Friend,

**[I'm excited to announce that I'm running for re-election to the United States Senate.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvr5rou36vnc98domm7l39qnr80t7g58948m4080_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)[It's been an honor to champion our conservative values in Washington, and I'm proud of the progress we've made.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97grecoem738kjmk46k2ou065dnja4vmbdr423o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs) _[But our work is far from over.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbp91dutqof7b7dqkrvfm6efq4cef1pgaip6p18_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)_**

As a steadfast ally of President Trump and a champion of the MAGA agenda, I've worked tirelessly to defend our country and our way of life. And I'm not done yet.

_But I need your help. As one of my most loyal supporters, I'm counting on you to stand with me._

**[Will you join me as a Founding Donor with a contribution of $25, $50, or $100? Your support will send a strong message that we're not going to back down from the fight.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1iocercnh188ifr77ujei0mne6uli8cd6cgnt18_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)**

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi895p1nb0de5af8pkskt0q436ij4n21o7buom98_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[RE-ELECT SENATOR HAGERTY>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmund8bubqklmgr0irinu24jrdc54f3eigace5l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)******************************************************

The left is already gearing up to take me on, but I'm not intimidated. I know that with your support, we can take them on and come out on top. We've done it before, and we'll do it again.

As a Founding Donor, you'll join an exclusive group of supporters who are committed to our shared values and the MAGA movement.

**[Please chip in today, and let's do this - together.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1icbvaohmtt87gaj8gn9m1qt742ofjd73vem6d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)**

******************************************************[KEEP SENATOR HAGERTY FIGHTING FOR US>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4qebhq4ktdpi80mcrobfctgpjg2n7katck46a08_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)******************************************************

With gratitude,
Bill Hagerty, United States Senator for Tennessee

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3k469accgap5rbppjfelafpuue0rnkuq44tilo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j62pr0c3h2bs)******************************************************

name: Roger Lau (via Democrats.org)
subject: Sharing my story
body:
---
Derek, I’m Roger Lau, and I’m honored to share that I’m the new Executive Director at the Democratic National Committee. I’m reaching out this morning to tell you a little bit about who I am, and share some ways you can help us build a winning DNC. This is a long email, but please stick with me. **Like you, I’m fed up with watching the Trump administration trying to dismantle our democracy — and everyone I talk to is asking, “What can I do to help at this moment?” Well, here are two things you can do right now to help the DNC fight back:**
* [Share your feedback — and don’t hold back.](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/share-your-feedback-2025/?refcode=em_20250303_2885_fr&t=2&akid=2885%2E22930333%2EfzxfIz) Once we collect this information, our small but mighty team will analyze the feedback and put together a report that I will share with the DNC’s new Chair, Ken Martin, to help us make decisions about how to improve the DNC. This is a grassroots committee powered by grassroots supporters, and your input matters to us a great deal.
* [Donate to the DNC.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?refcode=em_20250303_2885_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2885_22930333_fzxfIz&akid=2885%2E22930333%2EfzxfIz) If you’re anything like me, I bet your inbox is full to the brim of emails from organizations asking for your support — and, trust me, I hate to ask you for more. But the DNC is powered by grassroots donations from supporters just like you who are pitching in $5, $10 at a time. In fact, the average donation to an email just like this one is $31.75. Every donation in the door will help us build a DNC you can be proud of — one that takes no election for granted, and one that’s on the front lines of fighting back against the Trump administration.

Now, to share a little bit about me: I’m the son of working-class immigrants who came to this country in search of a better life. They worked two jobs each — waiting tables, selling souvenirs and sewing clothes to support me and my siblings. I haven’t lived the easiest life or taken the most “traditional” path like others in politics, but after a few stumbles as a young adult, I got up, dusted myself off, and worked hard to get my GED. In college, I responded to a classified ad about an internship in a U.S. Senator’s office. I figured nothing would come of it, but I interviewed anyway and was told to start the following Monday. And that internship in John Kerry’s office is where my love for politics began. Since then, I’ve held a number of roles in politics and campaigns. I’ve managed six campaigns, from Congressional races all the way to Elizabeth Warren’s 2020 presidential campaign. In all of my previous roles, I’ve seen over and over again that an individual, a community, or a movement of people can collectively enact change for the better. **That’s what the Democratic Party embodies:_The belief in a country where stories like mine are not just possible but within reach for millions of people._** What we do next is important. I’ve spent more than two decades in this line of work. I’ve faced tough losses before and I’ve seen Democrats come back even stronger. I’ve seen us come together to protect people’s health care, to bring down costs for families like mine, and to fight back against extremists who want to roll back our freedoms. We have to fight back again now. That’s exactly what we’re doing at the DNC. We’re re-investing and doubling down on efforts like organizing 365 days a year in red, blue, and purple states; ensuring state parties have the support they need to propel Democratic candidates to victory; fighting Trump at every turn, and more. And this is the time we need you the most. Your feedback and support at this moment is extremely critical. So, if you can, please take a second to [fill out our feedback form](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/share-your-feedback-2025/?refcode=em_20250303_2885_fr&t=3&akid=2885%2E22930333%2EfzxfIz) (and don’t hold back!) and, if you can afford to, add a donation by [clicking here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?refcode=em_20250303_2885_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2885_22930333_fzxfIz&akid=2885%2E22930333%2EfzxfIz). I’m not backing down, and I hope you aren’t planning to, either. Thank you for everything, -roger Roger Lau
Executive Director
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250303_2885_fr&refcode2=2885_22930333_fzxfIz&akid=2885%2E22930333%2EfzxfIz)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Emily Scharnhorst
subject: Fwd: I was nearly brought to tears.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103143869/531298045/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250303fwd_N_ES_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NzM3NTkyLTQ4ZjgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l7qfSAHGhhxAFYhjfk5fTOLHAHwu29Uf8u2PXoIIfjA=)
---
Peter, did you see Madison’s story?

Last year, she ran for Congress in Oklahoma — a state ranked as the worst place in the US for women, with the strictest abortion laws and a staggering **_50% of women experiencing rape or domestic violence in their lifetime._**

**_It was our honor to support her in her courageous attempt to change the status quo in her state._**

At Her Bold Move, we believe it is our job to support women running for office EVERYWHERE in the country. We were thrilled to endorse Madison and give her the support she needed to run a successful campaign.

We refuse to accept the status quo that is leaving millions of women behind in our country. We refuse to allow rooms full of GOP men to make decisions about our bodies and _our_ lives. In 2024, I ran to represent Oklahoma’s 5th Congressional District. I think it’s important to share a bit about that experience with you today:

When I first connected with Her Bold Move, I had already reached out to nearly every major women’s organization in the country. It was disheartening. These were organizations with bold mission statements about empowering women. Yet, when presented with a woman bravely running for office in a red state, the response was silence. Time and again, I was left wondering: If the most well-funded organizations won’t stand by their missions, what is their purpose? name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: 💥 Leading Through a Crisis 🧨
body:
Crises exist all around us, and leaders face...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | 💥******Leading Through a Crisis** 🧨
---
Crises exist all around us, and leaders face a weighty burden in dealing with them. In the end, how a leader responds to the biggest challenges they face will be the thing most remembered by the members of the team. An organization will thrive or wither depending on how their leader rises to face the hurdles that will inevitably exist during their tenure. Thus, it is critical to get it right! The following key elements of crisis response should form a firm foundation to properly rise to the occasion. ** _Prepare_** Leaders at all levels should thoroughly consider the possible sources of loss, danger, or risk in their organizations and their environments. Then, they should role-play, exercise, red team, and table top those potentialities with their team in order to discover ways to avoid them if possible, mitigate them if prudent, and absorb them if necessary. While your preparation may not exactly match the crisis that comes, the methodology of thinking through possible crises will allow you and your team to be much more practically and emotionally prepared for whatever you may ultimately face. ** _Wind the Clock_** Breathe deeply! There is a concept taught in Air Force pilot training known as “wind the clock.” Even modern-day aircraft often have a small manual clock in their cockpit. Pilots are told from the earliest days of flight training that the first step they should take whenever they face an airborne emergency is to wind the clock. Pilots don’t do so because the clock actually needs winding at that moment. Instead, it is a metaphor for making deliberate and well-thought-out moves to respond to an emergency. A rushed response to a crisis will often exacerbate the problem and enhance the likelihood that it will get worse. Additionally, the demeanor of a leader, for good or bad, will be contagious within the organization. This is especially true when everything seems to be falling apart. A leader’s deliberate calmness during a crisis will create the organizational conditions to properly absorb and respond to it, and may even yield an ability to turn the crisis into an opportunity for your team. ** _Snap Back to the Basics_** The best way to make crisis decisions is to rely on the cultural foundation that has guided the organization during normal times, and that you should have carefully and deliberately cultivated. Guiding principles and organizational vision should provide beacons of light that will clear away the fog and friction of chaos. These beacons will allow all decisions to be better ones because they are rooted in something deeper than the immediate, the enticing, and the superficial. Furthermore, it will provide a shared rallying point for an organization that is looking for stability in the midst of uncertainty. ** _Embrace Your Team_** People are your greatest asset, most valuable resource, and highest priority. Unfortunately, they sometimes improperly fall off the priority list when a leader is distracted by a crisis. Don’t let this happen! Human beings endure a range of emotions during a crisis: sorrow, anger, concern, anxiety, uncertainty, and defensiveness. Even more so than in normal times, your people need your focus and attention as a leader. They were with you before the crisis, they are at your side during the crisis, and they will form the backbone of recovery after the crisis. A leader must never forget that regardless of the conditions, genuine care and concern for your people must be paramount. ** _Communicate, Communicate, Communicate_** There are various stakeholders that are eager for your time, energy, and attention during a crisis. A leader needs to prioritize these stakeholders and communicate proactively with them as much as possible. This will include communication to your team, to your boss, to your mission partners, and to your peers. It may even include communication to the government and to the media. People are quick to judge during a crisis, and the more proactively you communicate, the more trust others will have in you and your team as you endure the crisis and ultimately emerge from it. Prepare, Wind the Clock, Snap Back to Basics, Embrace Your Team, and Communicate, Communicate, Communicate! If you keep a careful eye on these core elements of crisis response, you will rise to the challenge and may even cultivate opportunities from a situation that at first seemed impossible.
Lead well!
* John

NOTE: These thoughts stem from an interview I did with Medium Magazine on May 16, 2023.
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**

clean_body: Crises exist all around us, and leaders face... | | | | | | | | 💥****Leading Through a Crisis 🧨 Crises exist all around us, and leaders face a weighty burden in dealing with them. In the end, how a leader responds to the biggest challenges they face will be the thing most remembered by the members of the team. An organization will thrive or wither depending on how their leader rises to face the hurdles that will inevitably exist during their tenure. Thus, it is critical to get it right! The following key elements of crisis response should form a firm foundation to properly rise to the occasion. Prepare Leaders at all levels should thoroughly consider the possible sources of loss, danger, or risk in their organizations and their environments. Then, they should role-play, exercise, red team, and table top those potentialities with their team in order to discover ways to avoid them if possible, mitigate them if prudent, and absorb them if necessary. While your preparation may not exactly match the crisis that comes, the methodology of thinking through possible crises will allow you and your team to be much more practically and emotionally prepared for whatever you may ultimately face. Wind the Clock Breathe deeply! There is a concept taught in Air Force pilot training known as “wind the clock.” Even modern-day aircraft often have a small manual clock in their cockpit. Pilots are told from the earliest days of flight training that the first step they should take whenever they face an airborne emergency is to wind the clock. Pilots don’t do so because the clock actually needs winding at that moment. Instead, it is a metaphor for making deliberate and well-thought-out moves to respond to an emergency. A rushed response to a crisis will often exacerbate the problem and enhance the likelihood that it will get worse. Additionally, the demeanor of a leader, for good or bad, will be contagious within the organization. This is especially true when everything seems to be falling apart. A leader’s deliberate calmness during a crisis will create the organizational conditions to properly absorb and respond to it, and may even yield an ability to turn the crisis into an opportunity for your team. Snap Back to the Basics The best way to make crisis decisions is to rely on the cultural foundation that has guided the organization during normal times, and that you should have carefully and deliberately cultivated. Guiding principles and organizational vision should provide beacons of light that will clear away the fog and friction of chaos. These beacons will allow all decisions to be better ones because they are rooted in something deeper than the immediate, the enticing, and the superficial. Furthermore, it will provide a shared rallying point for an organization that is looking for stability in the midst of uncertainty. Embrace Your Team People are your greatest asset, most valuable resource, and highest priority. Unfortunately, they sometimes improperly fall off the priority list when a leader is distracted by a crisis. Don’t let this happen! Human beings endure a range of emotions during a crisis: sorrow, anger, concern, anxiety, uncertainty, and defensiveness. Even more so than in normal times, your people need your focus and attention as a leader. They were with you before the crisis, they are at your side during the crisis, and they will form the backbone of recovery after the crisis. A leader must never forget that regardless of the conditions, genuine care and concern for your people must be paramount. Communicate, Communicate, Communicate There are various stakeholders that are eager for your time, energy, and attention during a crisis. A leader needs to prioritize these stakeholders and communicate proactively with them as much as possible. This will include communication to your team, to your boss, to your mission partners, and to your peers. It may even include communication to the government and to the media. People are quick to judge during a crisis, and the more proactively you communicate, the more trust others will have in you and your team as you endure the crisis and ultimately emerge from it. Prepare, Wind the Clock, Snap Back to Basics, Embrace Your Team, and Communicate, Communicate, Communicate! If you keep a careful eye on these core elements of crisis response, you will rise to the challenge and may even cultivate opportunities from a situation that at first seemed impossible. Lead well! John NOTE: These thoughts stem from an interview I did with Medium Magazine on May 16, 2023. | | | | Teichert in the Trenches** | Washington, DC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter. |

In a brazen display of corruption, fraudster, felon and conman Donald Trump has not only appointed and nominated five former lobbyists to his notoriously corrupt Cabinet but has also issued one of his first orders allowing executive branch employees to accept gifts from lobbyists and seamlessly transition into lobbying roles after leaving government service. Far from draining the swamp, Trump is actively filling it with more putrid rot. Able Dems is working year-round to STOP the MAGA madness, but we need your help to restore integrity in Washington! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. And that’s not all... Trump has issued another executive order, halting enforcement of the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act. Trump is encouraging oligarchs to engage in global criminal behavior, and it's time to take a stand against this disgusting corruption!** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Keep the USPS in public hands, where it belongs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project
Folks,
Donald Trump is attempting an illegal takeover of the United States Postal Service by firing the entire Postal Board of Governors and placing the USPS directly under the control of billionaire Trump donor Howard Lutnick, recently sworn in as Secretary of Commerce. Trump described it as a “ type of merger .”
But here’s the truth, the Postal Service is not a private business and it doesn’t belong to Trump or the White House, it belongs to the American people.
This isn't the first time we've faced such a threat. We've stopped Trump before, from privatization efforts in 2018 to attempted sabotage before the 2020 elections. Now we must stop Trump's unconstitutional power grab and keep the Postal Service in public hands, where it belongs.
Demand that the Postal Board of Governors to refuse Trump's illegal order, stand strong, stay on the job, and save the Post Office >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/stop-trumps-illegal-usps-takeover?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/stop-trumps-illegal-usps-takeover?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
This move is unconstitutional and blatantly illegal.
In 1970, Congress passed the Postal Reorganization Act , explicitly removing the Postal Service from presidential control . They established the USPS as an independent, self-funded public agency. Trump's executive order would blatantly violate the law and undermine the separation of powers essential to our democracy. The Postal Board of Governors must reject this unlawful attempt by refusing Trump's firing order, and stay on the job to fight back.
If Trump is successful, postal workers, seniors, and rural Americans will bear the brunt of the devastating consequences. Over 640,000 dedicated postal employees, including 73,000 veterans, will see their livelihoods jeopardized . Rural communities risk losing guaranteed delivery of medication, Social Security checks, ballots, and other essential mail.
Trump's illegal plan would pave the way for a possible privatization of our public postal system by chopping up USPS, selling off its parts, and putting profit margins over public service.
Together with our diverse coalition of labor unions, veterans, voting rights advocates, civil rights groups, and grassroots activists across the nation, we've protected our Postal Service and we can and will do it again.
Send a message right now and help stop Trump's illegal USPS takeover. Tell the Postal Board of Governors to stand strong >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/stop-trumps-illegal-usps-takeover?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/stop-trumps-illegal-usps-takeover?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Kc4HZYAUx9gqS8snK8VwyjkExyUdgyqUsQ3+qBLymtj54ts5KqpLe5CqENXJFCfmfZeLOq7urxzDM7TjjU0lZpkuRw7LjA8QBVkWpa45eTo=]

name: Senator Bill Hagerty
subject: Coming to you with a Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend - As one of my top supporters, I want you to hear this directly from me.

Friend,

**[I'm excited to announce that I'm running for re-election to the United States Senate.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkug4a3dl9fnne5lo9pelvcagk30fvbghl04o1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)[It's been an honor to champion our conservative values in Washington, and I'm proud of the progress we've made.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq1hnb4vcp3o0uq52oic00aehd7cn3b2p414264o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs) _[But our work is far from over.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6keile6jpm0k9lakrtck36d0cugk8rp76tvblu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)_**

As a steadfast ally of President Trump and a champion of the MAGA agenda, I've worked tirelessly to defend our country and our way of life. And I'm not done yet.

_But I need your help. As one of my most loyal supporters, I'm counting on you to stand with me._

**[Will you join me as a Founding Donor with a contribution of $25, $50, or $100? Your support will send a strong message that we're not going to back down from the fight.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztc2fcpamj13k2pgl6re9egh8b356j907b7pi5jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)**

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm85ovan4gi09qtm8jov545pfqp4cpgnjjk859k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[RE-ELECT SENATOR HAGERTY>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztp3jqluscf5hq72ap4r6palp5tfhu8ivb0hkjbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)******************************************************

The left is already gearing up to take me on, but I'm not intimidated. I know that with your support, we can take them on and come out on top. We've done it before, and we'll do it again.

As a Founding Donor, you'll join an exclusive group of supporters who are committed to our shared values and the MAGA movement.

**[Please chip in today, and let's do this - together.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrpi3nvtlqvcdlvih1cmr1fm5ndi6qc42m5d2n30_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)**

******************************************************[KEEP SENATOR HAGERTY FIGHTING FOR US>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrhl8sjmvhgnrmnjvuvm1cp03iucrque6052f2i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)******************************************************

With gratitude,
Bill Hagerty, United States Senator for Tennessee

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdeshieq6m7seo0rrlh3j6tr3sasrmmo3e3q18og_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)

******************************************************[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zto0f0sprmcugg619htpomjvhpumrm9bluvct0co_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j6aor2cdh2bs)******************************************************

body:
In case you missed it: The Florida Special Elections are officially ONE month away.

| |
---
| | | In case you missed it: The Florida Special Elections are officially ONE month away.

This is Majority Leader Scalise.

Our candidate, _MAGA Warrior Randy Fine_ , is facing an EXPENSIVE race in FL-06 and needs some extra support in these final days. _**[I STRONGLY urge you to read his message and consider pitching in today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za4e1ft2jc4lkkj3ael5lojp4q8novensos3qpio_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "I STRONGLY urge you to read his message and consider pitching in today.")**_

Remember:

_Supporting our Special Election candidates is the only way to SAVE our House Majority from the Democrat Machine! _
| | [READ THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmtkfcodvqt598pi9ga3ar54fvi3voo9ofvsg1o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "READ THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE")
---

To victory,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

**- ORIGINAL MESSAGE FROM RANDY FINE -**

Hi, this is Randy Fine.

This is probably the first time you've ever heard my name, so I'll get to the meat of my email:

**1) I just won the GOP nomination for the FL-06 Special Election, 2) I'm running to backfill for an American hero, Mike Waltz, as he joins Trump's Administration****, and 3) if the Democrats win this Special Election, they could sweep back into power in the House.**

I'm campaigning my heart out to make sure Republicans hold the House so we can deliver President Trump's MAGA agenda.

But the Democrats won't go quietly.

They're already unloading $10M into toss-up districts, they're raising money hand over fist to win the Florida Special Elections, and the Liberal Propaganda Machine is firing on all cylinders to attack President Trump.

_**[That's why we need your help today. I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $100,000 before the end of the day to help fight back, win key races like my Special Election, and win big for Trump!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zho99op1aeint8pheh5uck6s77nsh26h2kd1iem0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "That’s why we need your help today. I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $100,000 before the end of the day to help fight back, win key races like my Special Election, and win big for Trump!")**_

I'm humbly asking you to join us and pitch in a few bucks to help out:
| | [PLEASE JOIN US HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdndnlv8u2m8jf4f71vhds1dtlevck75i4q5m350_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US HERE")
---

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo2uejd49uo2crpgepunn67fjt6htk91sfr9l86g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "Randy Fine")
---

Look,

Special Elections are tricky. They're _expensive_ , the _stakes don 't get any higher_, and the timeline is very _tight_.

**On the first point:** Democrats typically unleash millions of dollars to win a single Special Election.

**On the second:** Republicans have one of the slimmest Majorities in a CENTURY - this race is critically important to stopping the Democrats from taking full control of the House.

**And on the third:** These move quickly - we only have a few short weeks until the election, so we need to move right here and right now.

We have THREE Special Elections this year alone. We need to win all three of these seats to save our House Majority and help President Trump usher in the Golden Age of America.

_**[So please: Would you be able to pitch in a few bucks to help Leader Scalise and I hit our goal today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zglhhujpdroh4tp4nj57uhfq4vtgd9punneco52g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "So please: Would you be able to pitch in a few bucks to help Leader Scalise and I hit our goal today?")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN US HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zit517q6e5hl44gqn8m6gekoji2a630d67tnvtvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c1j66pb4c3h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do.

To victory,
_- Randy_

**RANDY FINE**
GOP Nominee for the FL-06 Special Election

On the second: Republicans have one of the slimmest Majorities in a CENTURY - this race is critically important to stopping the Democrats from taking full control of the House. And on the third: These move quickly - we only have a few short weeks until the election, so we need to move right here and right now. We have THREE Special Elections this year alone.
