name: Gay Valimont
subject: It’s Time to Take a Stand for Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hello all,
I’m Gay Valimont, and right now, our democracy is under attack. We are seeing leaders like Trump and Elon Musk erode the very foundations that make America great, from dismantling laws to cutting essential programs that protect our freedoms.
Just like the nearly 200 people who gathered in Bangor, Maine, to protest these actions, I believe it’s time we all stand up and say: Enough is enough . We cannot let our country’s future be shaped by those who bulldoze our rights and divide us.
I need you to join in the movement against the destruction of our democracy.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7137384F6F2B5443366532694C647639616332316B65774E3249685142594E75375950705A784C314775344E467252533777524A6B2B544C4E4877594A725576/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-02%20at%202.48.34%E2%80%AFPM.png]
In my campaign, I’m committed to protecting our democracy, fighting for the rights of everyday Americans, and ensuring our government works for the people – not the powerful few. But I need your help to make that vision a reality. We’re in the final stretch before the special election, and every dollar counts.
There are 30 days until special elections. Time is running out, can I count on you to rush $5, $10, or whatever you can to my campaign to keep this fight up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7137384F6F2B5443366532694C647639616332316B65774E3249685142594E75375950705A784C314775344E467252533777524A6B2B544C4E4877594A725576/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-24%20at%209.54.45%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Join me and thousands of other Americans in fighting for a better future. Together, we can protect our freedoms and rebuild a government that serves us all.
Gay Valimont
Candidate for Congress, FL-1

clean_body: If we want to defend all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work the GOP right now. | Team, we already knew Michigan was a battleground state. Now with Senator Gary Peters announcing that he’s not seeking re-election, the attention on our state is turning up to level 1000. = While Gov. Whitmer isn’t running for the Senate seat, she is ready to do all she can to keep this Senate seat blue — = | = All eyes will be on Michigan Democrats next year. Not only will we have the Governor’s race and elections down the ballot — but now with an open Senate race, Republicans are going to spend big to flip all of these seats red. Fight Like Hell PAC’s work has never been more important. Last year, with your help, we elected Elissa Slotkin to the open Senate seat in one of the closest races in the country. If we want to defend Senator Gary Peters’ legacy and all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work the GOP right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, team! name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Humbly asking you to personally endorse Ilhan Omar today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)

Friend — We were so proud to reelect Ilhan in November with the tireless help of supporters like you.
But politics moves fast, which means we don’t have time to wait around before we start rebuilding this campaign and this movement.
Not only are we now more than a month into a chaotic second Trump term, but we are just a day away from Trump's address to a joint session of Congress, where he will lay out his vision for a far-right transformation of America.
So, with many important fights ahead, **[we’re asking you to take 60 seconds and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-march25-personal-endorse/?source=em250303-1-120&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-march25-personal-endorse/?source=em250303-1-120&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**
Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from tackling the climate crisis, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy.
But on each of these issues, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future.
**[So please: Add your name today and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she fights for us in Congress. Help us show the size and strength of this incredible movement.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-march25-personal-endorse/?source=em250303-1-120&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-march25-personal-endorse/?source=em250303-1-120&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1531_791427_vH9Usi&akid=1531%2E791427%2EvH9Usi)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Doug White
subject: Stop Feeding the Chaos: How Democrats Can Win Back the House and Defeat Do Nothing Dan
body:
Turn from the chaos, win back the house, own congressional district 4
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=wqWx-j3c9YFEuqlv2o6AoysapB7sY8tEkMcc3wiZX3o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmcvc28vYjRQTFNuSVY2P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)_**

| | |

| | [**Subscribe**](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=aLu4LkOOuqJbHcs0mQfJ19tAA5O0p2T6qCOcM4ZUYVI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmcvc28vYjRQTFNuSVY2P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwiciI6IjhjMzkwMzFlLTk0YTUtNDdiOS1iNmY0LTkyY2JlZmNmOWM1MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | In this edition:
* Stop feeding the chaos
* Winning back the House
* Democrats will own Congressional District 4

---
| | | |
---
| | I want to start by reiterating that we should not feed the negative attention seeking behavior of the President of Exploitation by Ruthless Villainy (PERV). Every time we post, like, share, or comment, we give the PERV power. We also encourage the media to keep focusing on the chaos, since their revenue depends on public reaction, whether positive or negative. Of course observe and learn, but save your energy and action for constructive measures.
There is only one thing in life worse than being talked about, and that is not being talked about.[Oscar Wilde](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=liuv9t6-pu-riTT4Xtx0uls3AS9NCRrjk2tVOhegn18.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJhaW55cXVvdGUuY29tL2F1dGhvcnMvb3NjYXItd2lsZGUtcXVvdGVzIiwiciI6Ijg5NzlkZjdkLWE4MWMtNDA5OS04NWRlLWZjNDZlNzkzYWU3OCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
Rural Americans United have long written about and led a [Campaign](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=QEqzmi_3RM7l0Log1uzJi4F7KW4rwvJI2_Dal_CiSQI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzI0UDBEWDVUUz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiI4OTc5ZGY3ZC1hODFjLTQwOTktODVkZS1mYzQ2ZTc5M2FlNzgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) discouraging the promotion of the PERV. Put no wind behind his sails, be the impassable headwind. So what can we do?
Now more than ever, we must continue to stand up and keep the pressure on. But to truly guarantee a change in direction, we must put barriers in place within the system to stymie the PERV. We must win local elections and take back the House of Representatives.The budget resolution that recently passed the House on a 217 to 215 vote ([NPR](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=XyCN_QIr4F5WxTezqlMshkWdn8aHdc3EO8Qg54q1DJ0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnByLm9yZy8yMDI1LzAyLzI1L254LXMxLTUzMDgwNjcvaG91c2UtcmVwdWJsaWNhbnMtYnVkZ2V0LXZvdGUtbWlrZS1qb2huc29uIiwiciI6Ijg5NzlkZjdkLWE4MWMtNDA5OS04NWRlLWZjNDZlNzkzYWU3OCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)) demonstrates how precarious the Republican majority is. But as long as they hold on to those two votes, it might as well be two hundred. They have a majority and that is all it takes.Take back the House
In Florida, there are two special elections in April: U.S. House Districts 1 and 6. In District 1, Democrat [Gay Valimont](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=BYXuel42YYzCrZ3koVC4795EpYOXHbQPmrrcAdbZVLk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nYXlmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vIiwiciI6Ijg5NzlkZjdkLWE4MWMtNDA5OS04NWRlLWZjNDZlNzkzYWU3OCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) faces Republican Jimmy Patronis, and in District 6, Democrat [Josh Weil](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=ucEnijrl_oWWSie4t29kH2Q8xLOqn-Egxkp64VGOkDc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qb3Nod2VpbC51cy8iLCJyIjoiODk3OWRmN2QtYTgxYy00MDk5LTg1ZGUtZmM0NmU3OTNhZTc4IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) is taking on Republican Randy Fine. This is an enormous challenge for a Democrat to overcome since Republican to Democrat voter turnout is two to one, but there is time. With sufficient support from across the country, this could shift.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | With an opportunity to take back the House and put the largest roadblock possible in front of the PERV, where are the Democrats?! These should be the loudest and best funded campaigns with money and media flooding in. But they do not fit the national Democratic Party’s profile for a race of interest. They are not deep pocket headline grabbing races, so they go ignored.For Senators Warnock, Kelly and Fetterman’s last races, hundreds upon hundreds of millions of dollars were raised and far less was at stake ([Rural Americans United)](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=tzYZc7mE-vYN6qybviCVh1NLIN0QG-02iE9gLpW0Z8s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzBkT3VrWkpCaz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJmN2Y2ZTRmNC0yODkwLTQyOTItOTMxYS0wNDg1NTAwMWM2ZjEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ). To date, according to [FEC](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=Uk3uw914y8P9d6jgxv2uxUyrd7Vpk6pkXZfBdp3QrFY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmVjLmdvdi9kYXRhL2NhbmRpZGF0ZS9INEZMMDExOTcvIiwiciI6ImY3ZjZlNGY0LTI4OTAtNDI5Mi05MzFhLTA0ODU1MDAxYzZmMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) filings, Weil and Valimont have raised 225,470 dollars and 103,639 dollars respectively. Their opponents are also in the low dollar range, meaning this race could be won and our nation saved!But again, the national Democratic Party fiddles as Rome burns. Central and Eastern Washington We have much local power. The upcoming House race in Washington’s Congressional District 4 has a clear path to victory. But to see this, we must shake off the 2022 debacle when our own party sabotaged good candidates. Looking at the facts, there is great optimism.Do Nothing Dan Newhouse has been on the verge of retirement for a cycle or two, and this next one could very well be his last. He has never been considered a good representative. The best comment I’ve heard about him is that “he isn’t that bad.” Not exactly a ringing endorsement.He still carries a stigma among Republicans for voting to impeach Trump, and that won’t go away. More critical to his future is the needle he must thread between the PERV’s administration, his party in Congress, and his constituents. Do Nothing Dan will never vote against his party again, which means he will fully support some of the most devastating policies that directly harm the people of Central and Eastern Washington, rich and poor, young and old alike.
---
| |
---
| | Facebook share courtesy of Diane Sundvik
---
| | While he votes to inflict harm, he tries to play a middle-ground game. These positions cannot be reconciled. His words fall even flatter when his voting record contradicts them.Central Washington depends on immigrants, and in Yakima County, one in ten residents are at risk of deportation under the PERV’s administration. Farmers are losing their foreign markets, subsidies, grants, insurance, labor, and purchase agreements. The loss of goodwill with allies puts our agriculture industry at risk. In many counties in Central and Eastern Washington the average family income is half the state average. In Yakima county there are over 130,000 people on Medicaid, and yet, we are seeing attacks on Medicaid, SNAP, education, and soon, Social Security and Medicare. Rural communities are being hit hard.Agricultural interests have kept Do Nothing Dan in office, but this support is now tenuous. Even if he runs again, he has slipped in the polls the last two cycles, and his support is waning.
---
| |
---
| | Phone numbers courtesy of Richard Badalamente
---
| | As Democrats, we’ve been given two once-in-a-generation opportunities to win Congressional District 4. The first was when I, Doug White, ran in 2022, when Loren Culp made a Democratic victory possible. A similar scenario played out in Congressional District 3, where Democrat Marie Gluesenkamp Perez captured the “not so crazy” vote against Joe Kent and won.A path to victory is becoming clearer for 2026, and I will write more on this because my vision forward is stronger than ever and I hope yours is too.
---
| | [](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PLSnIV6/c?w=X2i24Eigrtl6n0psVVV2PKHKYT05bOGivNbcvX3qIig.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiIyYmE0NDQwNC1iN2RmLTQwYTctYjIxMy1iYzAzNzMyMWNhZjIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | P.S. There are some potential candidates emerging already. This is encouraging.
Much success,
Doug

body:
Busy week in DC & at Home

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4baa8d17c90c/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a very busy week on the Hill and at home. Rob voted for the next step to move the budget process along and saved the Trump Tax cuts from expiring. Rob ran on doing what’s best for NEPA, and will continue fighting to protect the programs our neighbors rely on! He also had a jam-packed weekend in NEPA.
---
|
---
| Rob came back to NEPA for the weekend and was able to meet a lot of his constituents and be out in the community we all love. He marched in the Pittston St. Patrick’s Day Parade, attended the Wayne County GOP Dinner, and had meetings with constituents and activists throughout the weekend! Rob is back fighting for us in Washington, but you should see the team throughout the week before he gets back this weekend.
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=e81896a732&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is the Red Mill Tavern, in Pittston. Be sure to support local businesses like the Red Mill!
---
|
---
|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!

subject: In just 6 weeks:

body:
| | | Friend, it's Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC Chair.

**Trump's been back in office only 6 weeks, and from my front-row seat in the Senate, I can tell you it's every bit as bad as we thought it would be -- worse, even.**

**[We can't wait _another_ week to take action -- the fight to win back the majority and halt Trump's extreme agenda starts NOW. So please, will you donate $5 immediately to flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250303-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250303-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&akid=19696%2E9716520%2E7ZNVw6)**

In just those 6 weeks, Trump has _already_ pardoned over 1,500 January 6th insurrectionists, withdrawn our country from the Paris Climate Accord and the World Health Organization, and plunged our government and the vital services it provides into chaos and dysfunction -- all while doing _nothing_ to combat the surging price of essentials like eggs.

**We NEED a Democratic Senate majority to keep Trump in check -- and as DSCC Chair, it's my responsibility to deliver one.**

With our Social Security, our Medicare, our economy, our civil rights, our grocery bills, and so much more at stake, the moment demands that we act _now._ That's why I'm coming to you today to let you know: _I can't do it without your help._

**[The Republican majority will never stand up to Trump, so the ONLY way to stop him is to flip the Senate blue. Chip in $5 or more IMMEDIATELY to help us take back the majority -- and our future>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250303-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250303-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&akid=19696%2E9716520%2E7ZNVw6)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Friend, it's Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC Chair. Trump's been back in office only 6 weeks, and from my front-row seat in the Senate, I can tell you it's every bit as bad as we thought it would be -- worse, even. In just those 6 weeks, Trump has already pardoned over 1,500 January 6th insurrectionists, withdrawn our country from the Paris Climate Accord and the World Health Organization, and plunged our government and the vital services it provides into chaos and dysfunction -- all while doing nothing to combat the surging price of essentials like eggs. We NEED a Democratic Senate majority to keep Trump in check -- and as DSCC Chair, it's my responsibility to deliver one. With our Social Security, our Medicare, our economy, our civil rights, our grocery bills, and so much more at stake, the moment demands that we act now. That's why I'm coming to you today to let you know: I can't do it without your help. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | With gratitude, Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor

My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community mttns so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year. | | | | | I'd love to hear your thoughts, Friend. House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year. And you were identified as a top Republican supporter willing to share your feedback. "Will you please complete the 2025 House GOP Progress Report? " | | | "COMPLETE 2025 PROGRESS REPORT" Our GOP trifecta has been hard at work in 2025, and we've accomplished so much already. Cutting wasteful spending. Finding the fraud. Eliminating woke government programs. Ending the abuse of taxpayer dollars. Don't get me wrong, there's still PLENTY of work left to be done to save our country and make America Great Again. But I'd say we're off to a great start. Do you agree? "Let me know by completing the 2025 House GOP Progress Report today." Friend 's Secure Link: "" | | | "ACCESS PROGRESS REPORT" My team is reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please don't miss out on your chance to share your thoughts. I look forward to seeing what you have to say. Thank you, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Complete the DOGE survey today

|

| | | **Waste

Inefficiency**

Peter, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

clean_body: Complete the DOGE survey today | | | | Waste Fraud Inefficiency Peter, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country. Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, but it 's what we were elected to do. I need your help today, Peter. "Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\ Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?") DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY Issued By House GOP HQ PATRIOT: Peter STATUS: "INCOMPLETE" | | "COMPLETE NOW" The Democrats and their pals in the media are watching us closely, Peter. They want to see us fail. But we have a job to do, and I need your help to get it done. "Can I count on you to complete your DOGE Survey by tonight?" | | "Peter’S DOGE SURVEY" I can't wait to hear your thoughts. America always, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I will do everything I can to oppose the devastating cuts to life-saving programs and defend New Jerseyans from the Trump-Musk destruction.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103150458/531311280/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5MjIwMC00ZmY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmdc_61w5sNhqOPn-S6Fv8_jPCrvcpIxLy-paSwZ8fQ=&emci=59d2101e-4bf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=da092200-4ff8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=26261389)

| | Trump and Musk are firing scores of public servants, including thousands of veterans, in order to make way for their corrupt agenda of delivering tax cut handouts to the super-rich, while weakening protections for working families. **This is the Trump-Musk legacy.** To our public servants, I'm sorry you are being threatened and harassed by this administration. I remember how proud I was when I first swore my oath as a civil servant. It's the honor of a lifetime. Remember why you chose to serve. Stay strong. I and many others will be fighting right by your side. In addition to cruelly firing public servants, Trump and Musk are trying to dodge $2 billion dollars in payments for work already completed. **It's not business savvy, it's stiffing our partners. America should be a country that pays its bills. America should be a country that our own people and the rest of the world can rely on.** **This is all part of their plan.** Trump and Musk want to continue to gut programs, destroy jobs, and, in turn, make our country weaker. Next, they are taking aim at cutting Medicaid, Social Security, and things like support for housing and hunger programs with their Project 2025 budget proposal. 217 Republicans voted last week to support gutting health care to tens of millions of Americans to give massive tax cuts to the well-off and well-connected. **They want to make these cuts to pad the pockets of the ultra-wealthy with dollars that belong to working families.** **I will do everything I can to oppose the devastating cuts to life-saving programs and defend New Jerseyans from the Trump-Musk destruction.** More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: Josh Weil
subject: Russia’s Employee of the Month
body:
| |
---
Donald Trump is on track to win Russia’s highest honors at America’s expense. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODcwNDQ0NzUyNDcxODAyLFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3MDU2MTg4Njc5OTIyN30iLCJzIjoiZmJkYmY5MjJiNGQ5ZDY4YiJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODcwNDQ0NzU4NzYzMjU5LFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3MDU2MTg4Njc5OTIyN30iLCJzIjoiZWVhN2RjNTllY2ZlYWZhOSJ9)
---
|
---
Team,

When Ukrainian President Zelenskyy came to the White House, there is no reason he should have been treated as anything other than what he is: a hero.

Ukrainians have been opposing Russia’s unprovoked aggression and placing Vladimir Putin in check for years. They are fighting for their survival as a nation and a people. They are fighting for their lives.

Like so many of us, I was utterly ashamed at the childish show that Donald Trump and JD Vance put on during Zelenskyy’s visit to Washington. __America should be a beacon for freedom__ —not supporting murderous dictators.

Take it from me: as a lifelong public school teacher who has worked with kids at some of their most difficult moments, **Trump and Vance’s bullying of Ukraine’s president would be _unacceptable_ in any classroom in America**—much less in the Oval Office of the White House.

It’s pathetic and embarrassing—**but I am optimistic because right now we can actually do something about it.**

The House stands at 215 (D) to 217 (R). **_This special election could tip the balance of power in Washington, D.C. and put a stop to Trump’s strongman act._**

**[We need your help to do this. We have less than 30 days to accomplish this feat. But we can do it. America is waking up and paying attention to what is going on. With your support, we can rally the nation to our fight and stop Trump and Vance from selling out the soul of America:](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODcwNDQ0NzYyOTU3NTY0LFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3MDU2MTg4Njc5OTIyN30iLCJzIjoiOWQyZjc0ZWM1YTYyMWQ4NCJ9)**

Thank you,

Josh Weil
Democrat for Florida’s 6th District

clean_body: | | Donald Trump is on track to win Russia’s highest honors at America’s expense. | | | | | Team, When Ukrainian President Zelenskyy came to the White House, there is no reason he should have been treated as anything other than what he is: a hero. Ukrainians have been opposing Russia’s unprovoked aggression and placing Vladimir Putin in check for years. They are fighting for their survival as a nation and a people. They are fighting for their lives. Like so many of us, I was utterly ashamed at the childish show that Donald Trump and JD Vance put on during Zelenskyy’s visit to Washington. America should be a beacon for freedom —not supporting murderous dictators. Take it from me: as a lifelong public school teacher who has worked with kids at some of their most difficult moments, Trump and Vance’s bullying of Ukraine’s president would be unacceptable in any classroom in America—much less in the Oval Office of the White House. It’s pathetic and embarrassing—but I am optimistic because right now we can actually do something about it. The House stands at 215 (D) to 217 (R). This special election could tip the balance of power in Washington, D.C. and put a stop to Trump’s strongman act. | | | | | Thank you, Josh Weil Democrat for Florida’s 6th District | | | | | | | | | Mail Checks to : Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | |

This is a LIE with catastrophic implications for our nation. Republicans are scheming to slash Medicaid, impacting everyone—whether you’re a recipient or not. Even worse, to meet their arbitrary $2 trillion budget cut, they will also target Social Security and Medicare. Let’s call this what it is: THEFT. ** Seniors will be forced out of nursing homes, crippling the industry. Children will be deprived of essential care, and people with disabilities will lose life-saving support. Families will be devastated—all to fund another tax cut for the rich! body:
We’re missing your signature...
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS** We’re reaching to Democrats who have NOT added their signature to our exclusive petition to **STOP House Republicans from amending the Constitution to give Trump a 3rd term in the White House,** sent out on _January 28th, 2025._

**[Please confirm your signature is submitted before midnight:](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)** | [**25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SAY NO TO A THIRD TRUMP TERM! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)
---
**\- - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - -**
**House Republican Proposes Amending Constitution to Allow Donald Trump a Third Term** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP) | [**25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SAY NO TO A THIRD TRUMP TERM! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)
---
Look, this is one of the most terrifying headlines we’ve read all week...

**MAGA Republicans are willing to completely DESTROY the Constitution to make Donald Trump a KING.**

**[We’re gathering 25,000 signatures to show the GOP that the American people won’t stand for this attack on our democracy: Add your name by MIDNIGHT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)**
[**SIGN THE PETITION NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)
---
**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump’s MAGA trifecta will make him UNTOUCHABLE — even if it means tearing down every pillar of our democracy.

**_BUT IF we band together,_** we can fight back and stop this scheme before it gets off the ground!

**[So please, SIGN NOW: Say NO to a third Trump term! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)**
[**SIGN THE PETITION NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP)
---
Thank you for doing what’s right,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19112%2E878179%2E0hnFPP).**

trying to use his $400 billion fortune to BUY a key Supreme Court seat in
Wisconsin. Bernie and our movement are fighting back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22188?t=1060&akid=7782%2E5885482%2E-nbsVy ][IMG]

A group Musk is backing already dropped $1.5 million on this April 1st
election that will decide the majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. A
Musk win in WI will threaten free elections and abortion rights, and
benefit big corporations. It will also embolden Musk to believe he can buy
any election he wants.

But Bernie is heading to Wisconsin to rally the troops, and Our Revolution
is ramping up our organizing to help Susan Crawford win this crucial seat
on the court and defeat Musk’s attempt to buy another election. We need a
mountain of grassroots support right now to make it happen.

We need to raise $53,062 in order to execute our Get Out The Vote plan in
Wisconsin. Every dollar helps us reach voters with 3 calls and texts — to
make sure they cast a ballot by April 1st.

on the grassroots donations of our supporters — our GOTV push in WI will
be funded by YOU not billionaires like Musk.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22122?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250303nd&akid=7782%2E5885482%2E-nbsVy ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22122?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250303nd&akid=7782%2E5885482%2E-nbsVy ]CHIP IN $22

The current liberal majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court has protected
free and fair elections and voting rights in the state. As in every
battleground state, election laws in Wisconsin could decide the next
congressional and presidential elections — it's a big reason why Musk
wants to steal this seat from the people.

Bernie is headed to Wisconsin to fight the Oligarchy and prevent our
country from becoming the “United States of Elon.” Our movement will be
there too. And we need to focus our grassroots resources on this race
right away.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22122?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250303nd&akid=7782%2E5885482%2E-nbsVy ]Can you chip in today to help us defeat Elon Musk in Wisconsin?

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJvuZjM53sK0hw_1XqMPlJ7oum5mpYg2X65rJjW6Ze7YcCH7dDoZQLbzfGsz3AeeZnj2EELcPGCFWmgAHtPRJsP2lVqaIMXiifjXo8C9GIlQxmKzzuyzExXW8W3n_r06Gy3A5UDOV67XIC4GQ3ZCOH9o%3D)

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJtHsD_zAJtJA_pdjypIhHnBq3JMldM3SOAoqnLKUNa-No75st3Jnvohvw1hC4P64KBrvd1rDJABYv7ITruHdZDXCbGWU0Fmpks6XI8farHoFkgxNcm1Bi5ui7ZoDuieaQrKlxQ0xCdquDUyASqiUw9k%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJk8XP1Vrafw1F-mrGp5YyzYnlpsQxrZbIHiceGG5wST0Fo3TVYgF2B_d4tun0uE2nHh173kDHSCmgqwRCbkXsE3TKAN70FW6aFWKrVs3k5u30sj2FVnFeFNq2vo6-pPl41bjph6wLuom4JhQG-KsiU8%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuvWW-u2B6IMQuynZYWE27pXXdgg-LHmNuoPxsuVUO8Cl8dG5rppioN10JS07O4IzsKSUSQe_dy30j-guZev2Jrz6tPpb7SqxpgcIUisbgHxfcWr5KQM_JyAHO5mNKJ5sKXRC66VLrcOhrut-AQh1uBTC0oyMixdaTiWOfMpldUAPvHlnuVMG4brZ4t-_1h9zs%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJoi2DOvsTz_9DdNpLq_XKjjBjElo32nRYmkDDqIPW6sqr9Rg-lVOP9ljakHXSDDU2jmb15TmnB6IuTMpVKLTCRY85OA9ySIkE6aYtTUgZdJNNR0PhU8jLg8lAO1pDmhVUXB2gGmj2EUS4NDkggHsXmE%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJmFXnq3wkeRyTnif6jFVdQRgYpmqGBlwaxNEsP_lKWSJThxcRS4Oi5YLo6CqXrh4LjmpSXkgW83ZgHd56OAjHb_JrHz1TUdqpccSUW13hPycaZg_077no54sQoTC1oKsD5Si8ZheHsLvvzZKcdxCdcE%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJlxz3njkRU3Wol4j9NXOR0UssGMjsZ9SKASZbBuKy9flLmcge4oRB86qeLO1k3PyT0UYETALQVjrTGdpLFCn7Si4tGSD5C45MhwkeFQDYstUfAMlLPp5gv7CIpTiOTwK5zvywyPnypNOLsqy_UZ-7Kk%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJiKHy7kfcgJtPAZ2gbmyvbKMN1huXcEE-IbrHSJzkEQPR7mju8xzaO94W1bqLYnVr_wtv79Ttz9BVG9pPi0BJxhb0Xpz3Oh00oLP873ptSi8Jhq4q89oABPTI_a15hanB_IjViLPQpkTUvPnzp76bO8%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJpl_CuTJ8oaLh4LYjj7yrfGsNGlmDhzx6FsNK7izPUc9Ep2Ie4pPVeAH5qrmYa2uE46vyoJMIB7LwFqR_TTvZO9cxWrtKEbG16fU_6LKXcp0EDoTwQeE60UkCtWDdl1yaJrvKwwEIuNfd2pRJs5WQlI%3D)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dcaa09003c7b4d34a6f3badae6e49196&_e=gPqKBQlfCJFlVmTjI_bvYnzuIf_o54sh3v6CfnBYBeuRVLXYVJmGyQ4LCvnIhzS7XaItAYOOM9rCvdXRvvI1V4za_Mh-zSeMdiEUH7IrxUSkPxWUEJBDc9FGCMgRX5oJG0aapEp9yI_miXc-p85jjy2VLX2PxgPHboqvPZw5hpkKN2mpQVF5JyJER_wux6Op9gOj3Bp3vn_PIx69SvUKJvxDVaJg7jV7jIXT7LZeW596LONuyuW2_gfpBrbpAcg3d65UtHm7KFkErxDP-YUw5zD1D3jgo_hfSVbnWj5dWilXc8TW3XCRYDrSvx3lXoJGax_c8o7VKm_aWpM7nFunyi-2eYJ8jMdyKaHPjrPiIsY%3D)

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. clean_body: | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

Our GOP trifecta has been hard at work in 2025, and we've accomplished so much already.

_**Cutting wasteful spending. Finding the fraud. Eliminating woke government programs. Ending the abuse of taxpayer dollars.**_

Don't get me wrong, there's still PLENTY of work left to be done to save our country and make America Great Again. But I'd say we're off to a great start.

name: Team Mikie
subject: The last thing New Jersey needs is an Elon Musk wannabe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This race is one of our best opportunities to stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.
Peter —
Ever since Donald Trump was sworn in to his second term in the White House, he’s given Elon Musk — the world’s richest man — unchecked power over the American people.
Under the guise of promoting “efficiency,” Elon Musk’s DOGE team has thrown our country into chaos. He’s tried to gain access to the private financial data of millions of Americans, laid off federal employees who deliver critical services to New Jerseyans, and threatened to slash critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
The last thing New Jerseyans need is a governor who will put corrupt billionaires like Elon Musk and Donald Trump over the safety, freedoms, and pocketbooks of working families.
**But in the Republican race for governor, that’s exactly what’s on offer. Just last week, one GOP candidate publicly appealed to Elon Musk directly, promising a DOGE takeover of New Jersey “on day one.”**
**_And we don’t need to tell you what it would mean to be facing a candidate backed by Elon financially in November._**
We’ll say it again, Peter: New Jersey needs to elect a strong Democratic governor this November.
**[Mikie Sherrill is ready to be that leader. And if you’re ready to help her win this race and move New Jersey forward, a contribution of $10 or any amount, split between Heartland Patriots and our campaign, is the best thing you can do today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86600?refcode=em20250303-8797&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8797%2E614464%2EhczQb9)**

| | Peter, we have the narrowest majority _**in nearly 100 YEARS.**_ And to make matters worse, the Democrats are wasting no time building their war chest to flip it.

Here’s what you need to know: ➔ GOP control could shrink to just 215 seats with upcoming vacancies.➔ Not a single defection can be afforded to pass President Trump’s bold America First agenda.➔ The Democrats are ready to exploit every crack in our defense to block Trump’s policies and derail the conservative movement.

_**We can’t let them win.**_

Democrats are already pouring MILLIONS into their efforts to undo everything we’ve fought for. **If we don’t act NOW, we risk losing our ability to deliver the bold, conservative agenda voters demanded in November.**

If we’re going to put up a fight, we need to get ahead of the Democrats on fundraising starting RIGHT NOW.**[**If you can, please consider chipping in to defend our slim majority. Every dollar counts in a fight as critical as this.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._LilpnU_bQ)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.
I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.
| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBANHV4rVEZN0NRAVwJk4EdbrJlG2-QdCHjH4e3hfQ0dAeg1zvf6lS-28WHi1QPtt-l7kqaKwPN1Pq4qsuFFm7MfzHAEyFsL453OQEbN7O2QZrAPj2wWS47MBLZOwlWthG3OHPdK9J7VcyDN__x398As%3D)
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBGaKJq4FDaZ2Xs3Pxy1z8BWc_ElmsYywmnEHXNjwmZ4RoBCbR1M4AG8iftbqzFUmOyas7sO3wyjmkzZNIk24R_1FUncBRLWkEXRRsj9yYnF6ufZZ197djJBsb2CsTsdOMpgPEwgCxdb7UX8URVW7bbY%3D "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBEO_jaYLkx4k-x5_HIXCnBuz-aq6cmbJOZti_DzNHBwnlUdIKCcr2xefcHt9UOjse6EIP-W8y47_obT3ZRQwO71kXacuZE666sU4iSzzoUVYgsmdNAoGtqJ0UOJuvpsO9RpvtUmLKC50Vn888QWU_ZA%3D)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBKMlB8ojOx7VK-6H4TLWLOA6-D9Z4Sgq6oQYfcpO1EwOLRUyXth2n62ccBeRiAFMSGWXUR2PpdCtofIZHUP5dPof5gYEON-SFRQWYoa-QzdI781ypIr6qVyC-IMI9RKDYQJbWSUOCR9gmZ-DP2ZpDmk%3D)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBFLV9dRSPmLSSsFXIPL4r1R1cmm1a7kUmznYW9x5e2Or5pdmjuTtkYzxJWbrPCs8xH1HEvw8GaFzgeT656pbAolq17jyFKMtMhtih6rbdrSvzlbLkqEt68Aq-vhq3I6-gmaoukZJdkdX98NyPI0K7fA%3D)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBBTUTVk5K82vErMkgx0tn3iDMZvsJfDsqpLeUWclfK_sUW6mXE3648efayEWxbrEvveLs2C_TdB6Y0Kwr4ftkIz7yD_-LaSoHbcHmdfn6YFH2NetH67SYkCq0PQZCv6pKSWuR2Ny8z8IVn_drpH1mZU%3D "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBLNZEhc6ZaGVheX3tOHtzW-TSPJA4Vtx5KzG7IcJdDVYKDM2I7gSFojRjJsZtL2ciSZDVuly7ReBpKvgtWJEcHyMfLgM63u_mgXt_xJPOHhGLbcm-zB0zRcANxD0kLITMJ8NfaBBYSsb9g4CN7tHF_E%3D)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBFOn8rgHpxfqJzB6hRL-yAWRuL4wgn_SAgNmhYeLh0a54jWoll_egEJKoq_RXByxRYlymTakN8tEuTrR-qma7nDG1tx-c1HYjZKvxkQNRq1Y4k_qfXOYSYJZ6FgWBPAaLcbkiXnxLIWEx64NN3Vwtkg%3D)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBI_tq4gsHfudyGOIPbRU78knpzpn3CaUy5vx2uTL-4YrgDK3Lu6ZPLLO-mHxhs66HwpITCGVHYuDFQvfNfYOpcHOiUo3hbRSGfJmkEQPsZocTRMiQ58hfRsaUGTQtMdFcbvWMKeJfMXjSzdOyVgPtw8%3D)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. [I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBK25exWAeUpd2ASPhTc3c1tvGMRWMEb9fiInaW9Te29T6pJVZnH-UHGqjJBaV9zx9GGC_UTyE6_8WOfCoPMHMKS0GmAMVkAftpSnWyzqoIwAu3Zu8qnZkLF2-1SkeOrvZhvHkH4oiJAt-YG2dtkHQKI%3D "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.")

So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor.

**[It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I've officially launched my campaign. I'm humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a09a01733bb4467bbcc4e50124542fc&_e=AjKly-4TTSpKaI3mVCyrX_19qJEfvOZBzl8jtqMa69aVwZbUc22Lgk8Tf5xdOMgWH9NVIOmStyFuKnpE37ZdVG56KMSe0BxRbs7eE5UJDk7yD1UBWWPs1BGyFnK_nXvg4GuuSYA8ujm5mjCgl4Hd_5kLWyGRh-VDvlzAFTio8LI0V3-zg8RmWfmSVtJ0swY0fbCN77k-9Ymp7fK4CpMlqetV-Rxmwl5x-pq9U2jWpWQ3U9l52gDQCXsUzOPLZyYDJUwgImIsKx2gBjU3xs_CBLQ_dA5VMjgFkDiTPUXz3T0R6m_4WWg2dVmxtfdq6RGACe9_SAQLXlP3U9r9WSTX00RcIDZKa1bH_QbS32ou1jBAJD4nJXjH8Ja3sA18wusBhiWRSrWHUwsWEkJBspC_U7bSFYAgKWHRAtH3iJlOtkg%3D "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. clean_body: Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment. I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment. | | | | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy. I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. | "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment." WHY RUN NOW? President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote. | It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. | Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. | The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for." | WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. | We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country." So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor. "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size." | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201
