name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/Gljykvq9o4d15_oyu2j0K2GxW442Gf7vljQXo1ZkBcTwshP-eO01MTePbR5qBTm6AZsryKwz7bYtdImoS9aHe68at9N5H7lIMj1WjRZtU4CE3JPYEYnL8MTpe2OLO19uc-oc_6bKyIUd8_Gyo2Ic6kQ95lwKOkKhe_jOSdSRSHM8mnrSKowfySeVsmA2uCQNWiiclJkPFVaugOYX6bjL8hVdPs9A9X7h08xgq0Uy1ia-FLWpDHN5e4Xin5TYM9CS_PpUHTUqff_-3e_ngFy7qu0Igna7D483FGvopl0vU6DV5JCIx8f1gMMRmWIFIzyfg9etNP7484_mdVi8icODseLtIlZ3avKBM9nocxnrRT0IabKIlBKl4j9xzAD8HhwzrWELINR111fhsB3cWm2RWesFeoHFfTZ5IACEl-LsIRh4LRbhcV7J0wvJRDgQbjjbH_ori8KwoTr5XxWSirGD6h4SO4Ol-p3Ba8paToMquPU/i9UeDdPeRLRqBA0vd1XFD9PN3CbhXz5s/6)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/AWQp4OWsU6C_z1rrJi9JuEiDzBygpSrBlVgxKhyv1DovAf7rIMIKZ7kuDZXfEGeXkEoK4RLw8uRsY4qq-pUMoXWHSezbaVrGk5wszzsUIg4j1wcRxt8DTMy70jJ6SiTp_zljgtKSPr3aJZQZpt3wnhKpBDStLDaIzPWA4G0xzOHHnfpDd3b64n_sxTpDhbDNTu1NZ8f2-UhUuNNJHVSaAouFGTcj-DLQzVhGqdygiLqTKt0zL61kdyJJ_kRm3uNjpZpB39jvMDyW1E7eoMVSlqW2gITjL0Dv6zAXyMuxn1I8_sEAd3Mct6H8-6x5UtZpVoOJNu2KRwMWkBU_ELyQCuOoPejWeJ--zFxBKcLWbFrMQTOTxCHUFTWflZntWB5it-y3UFQ733IsR8S7nbKmyvXnWjtdvWs8KRcDJrPLNRZK8kW7EHLRKLl8PjMZYTaNrmDK5x56Dz4kwp5EEEe9Fuvq2ZySDcqzRr6tiZjgFo8/xmVAuJSuIHLrBn9r-UDbwooRcGx2Tbtz/6)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/ILBuOBv9ZdDNWiTCbKIrJUqzkBIh3h1aUpP21JS5sGV8nLgjTAo-8teV9b6OEJUK5S7zQucQQt_5-H5GF2wcksbpj-I_zHxGn8JdwyjZdj4ChCo_F6_ksuWvcGKR1kDujkICibXxaD0qfV0gdWURiG5_NGkRhidIBbGeHnEdYQniQWNSBrkBn_HXuj0a-IamBh5UAdSBrc9EpS7nm04Hb85xtLeKmW-VmGZEb3RuaIq_odO8q_CslpToBZ-tfWoF-bUQPUL4j_ITqY-ex_284jdnopyKuApgHZQs79Zc6M_BZtQ1P_nNSnH5sANlF1RCUylwpFqaN4G_Ng4U6nvcyv8d5IEbXs5ljle_FW9cu2fxAjW3hsZ6pdt5uSqHIv1jZuhQsV5eHRP1vXXv3udRrNUfPDcE89yKbttOH_eEv1RXl_adjEsWXMGm5SBCQfbvwBSAAKgXWk-pR2QkpWfvO4gBieH2f38sd_Yurl20NDI/f0K0ypnY2hjOW6wPg4PWioUBrX1ASoly/6)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/cqk8dP4D4libuBBScw1-Tmf393TrIvhzf7bCxhCbcCoo1EmrCoevW667gZ7j3MhaPYGUGTfeKzwLetgRc-6DqaBuKksYAd1NLBPYFCSnPvyQx15Ag2MZLv8YxsQCDps0sePjwQG9200P_ND72FZCiqXALGcjkVid2OHtlM7sEeCN_uBt-0cX0pqQGlgH12Z-6gBKyNCMeFAxCDnJ2uctBPElWYZj2Kc9gqVh-0iB4zutUnoeIXFARMyWjbYf4GyHNJ5JSWxPooaW7NAwAz8Nuwa1YTLLfNnKSFDxKamwJndCPCDiWPo-bpkjG6UorrL4vd3NbOd6OEakXaMptIuqhApC9d87ikQJpJ37JH3Vgl-hqHCXtYW3F8fR2EkdKtjCnjPXhI5fgPkqSupIX-Fcf7Csx8UbfmNnXvESLr1A4F6z4DDqDC7cyHYFWSeZ4z8PAgzhn0OAcisrXH5kfpBn9jUWHRm3r6q57p9Tt35P2tl-aFwsx-jILKdW/UPyc4XT-azsknMbJHd_z6_7kFOH5cGES/6) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/kt_l5peX6kKQs7TNJv6fmPORQV5sOaEteoXvLIYD8Z0oAjlmPQHuCsPH8vGkgQ6Q0A5P_9X0GZj5wGCp2vHSOMuvWQ_H2F3asPor0ynfaRjHNvNV1-zsjKTSnxJEz4U_oYsTQ7JxTPqNHZmJptzdopVcpkrd287ZPpmDiw67zEJwWjYNNZo0KxxQwzwTL6T7EJeV_9di3RSnEjQlmcCE_wrClrxVXy7vQIyjBsihdvpwtLmqF2v22mFwE7arOH1Emk8FUi3RO-qdWziVVW9EK9s60PzcAojqishks-EM_-5SzEwE6j9Pd6ARryvbgJw1HdZzkFNpkWUnYqfsLvfn6yn1xwDgCM6CtXMHUmw7EGi8v_D3nhnKcZQjxJ-Hrrkp3sfilLi_Cx_1kTfldHkHJNBy6YF31OO-yyt3r_ry72r2-SHRS5LT-wkAuE3gVPY-_UHm3cis0dnSaG_E3QlojqdOxZ6SII0zPRt0f1YoEeLxTXHms8wD0ogj/kjb40MdNxdfKDDP4HV7B5Qu85HK8sIs3/6) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/NgkcJZVr7VbJ_dc24r-XbWYDt8sV47PPEw7Ty4aDxBFeW5CW-j-puxot45AksmWESpBmR74Za9TFkR1Obzl2O_WmsJcQ3yzi29ZgnBUNah3QAJ9EmkAsiphTPoKyqB-BSsIYoCa9VnorDez_fwhPJxSdCPLKxST2zGsB24kOMlzalWeVpuWCYQwVAJlGRhjs1Y_0AZliAQG8kfukSwfOXz-0sQEXYGoSYNQ1iTb7Vs87eeKe2bADfY5V1bOGIwcDKEzoG9s1exdj4IaQ0E9pg8siIzsDt5iqjoDWmMellmg2K9xJLqPzVHE-kMz0_F4ULPFQiMIPSPekhdmqXBM5p9bmFNw9DjxpzAu0vMnktprV4XqAMIA53OHFxTIAqPreDrtGwlAXweATc9LgLBEa6TizUP1c3-G_Fm5u5k7MZx_9eFW4X59OMPFLgqPQh-7xIsId21jRBcgaIOO4KG9TLfpWFcl0xN5PNtSa8qqvJhg2r9X9FBqMP2m0/5dBCBEtykdukl1TbJyg64_nahgq2W6Aa/6). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Fh3Vey5YRCKYzzsI9fMV_EpVTOTovMXleAJJJzgpuEShQVAhDj0KrRTM1R-q2uXEgiSeOwbVlbwmBIfk84w8MmIU1WAlG6AEHnSBQUb04XRnH_0YRR4MBdRL40xlrzKlDDROAhw7RK1C_0SrnwDW4EodA3qyPqCnN7SpLXGnFBRMo8b3JCZK0XF0D7ZHiJ5TXoOr4gWPiYKovIVuEWV5B9MFGj41IIcJnc9XlhLCPg1n4c_keizfG8HSD2_AP6hS1-AoorNQkC1lwxQBIs-KQUSHViG1YJ72QgePirrqIB7clTuEDDcozuEl2ccjy5qlNkaYmxDbMCYuRkT1f5ixQzZBko42gHsS3Bi-8yAkxD-IV3KLgPU5IaWIRPZ96aV7udv5cKSV3I-Am2DD00RRPc6TPNKbQfLWoZDH4sge1jk4XB_MEXpF0zh366exx4U3blCcEmRUbydybdmK3l2oscNOgY5HUAdg5DcLPxwSwwYHrRX0EqVqmi0h/srYnvHAqiP3Rhbkq0vqai98hxsNQeJv7/6)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

clean_body: Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s “Theology 101” online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. “Theology 101” has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of “Theology 101” on DVD. Secure yours right now at: Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

## SAFE Colorado Co-Founder John Fabbricatore to Testify Before Congress Again on March 4
|
---
**Defending Public Safety: John Fabbricatore Returns to Congress**
|
---
SAFE Colorado is proud to announce that our Co-Founder, **John Fabbricatore, former ICE Field Office Director, has once again been invited to testify before Congress on March 4.** This Tuesday, J _ohn will provide expert testimony before the Cybersecurity, Information Technology, and Government Innovation Subcommittee of the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform._ His leadership and firsthand experience in immigration enforcement make him a critical voice in the fight to do away with sanctuary policies and make our communities safe. We encourage you to tune in, stay engaged, and support SAFE Colorado’s mission to ensure law enforcement is able to do its job and enforce the law. **You can tune it at 10am ET, 8am MT here: [https://oversight.house.gov/hearing/leveraging-technology-to...](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODc0NDA4NDc3NzU0ODcyLFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3NDQyMTE1MDg0NDc4NX0iLCJzIjoiOGM4ODI2M2E2OGMyMjZkNCJ9)** John’s testimony comes a day before Mayor Mike Johnston, who has been requested along with other Democratic mayors to appear for a hearing in front of the House Committee on Oversight on Wednesday, March 5 regarding their sanctuary policies. Stay tuned for updates.
|
---
| | [ **SIGN THE PLEDGE** ](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODc0NDA4NDg3MTkyMDU3LFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3NDQyMTE1MDg0NDc4NX0iLCJzIjoiNTJiYzk2ODhhOWRmOGNlZSJ9)
---
|
---
Now, more than ever, we need **your** support to ensure safety remains the top priority in Colorado. **Join us today** by volunteering, advocating, or donating to the cause.
To learn more, please visit [www.SAFEColorado.org](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ3ODc0NDA4NDk4NzI2Mzk2LFwiclwiOjE0Nzg3NDQyMTE1MDg0NDc4NX0iLCJzIjoiMzI1Y2NhZGM0M2ViZmU3NSJ9)
Thank you for standing with us for a safer Colorado. John Fabbricatore & Steven Monahan
|

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Our freedoms are non-negotiable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to finally get extreme politicians out of the business of telling us what we can and can’t do

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103156073/531329074/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmFkNmExMy01OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNX-o8AqZNnsDyiQ5p2jBVuOwC900frIpQ8wr6lbTNE=) It’s been nearly three years since the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ and took away the freedom to choose from millions of women across the country. In response to this extreme ruling, the people of Kansas overwhelmingly voted to protect abortion rights in our state. But that isn’t good enough. We need to finally get extreme politicians out of the business of telling us what we can and can’t do. **Unfortunately, those politicians haven’t given up their anti-freedom crusade. Instead, they’re threatening to restrict some of our most fundamental rights — including the freedom to choose, the freedom to marry who you love, and the freedom to live your life free from discrimination.** Last year, the Kansas GOP released a platform calling for the repeal of same-sex marriage. And this year, we’ve already seen new legislation in Congress to further restrict abortion rights across the country, roll back civil rights protections, and so much more. I won’t stand idly by as these extreme politicians work to drag our country backwards. **Our freedoms are non-negotiable** — and I’ll use my voice every day to prove that to Congress. [_**I believe every American deserves the freedom to live their lives how they see fit — without the government standing in the way. If you agree, will you chip in to help me fight back against every National Republican effort to restrict our freedoms?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103156074/531329075/-945380516?refcode=email_030325_Freedoms&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmFkNmExMy01OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNX-o8AqZNnsDyiQ5p2jBVuOwC900frIpQ8wr6lbTNE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103156075/531329076/-945380516?refcode=email_030325_Freedoms&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmFkNmExMy01OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNX-o8AqZNnsDyiQ5p2jBVuOwC900frIpQ8wr6lbTNE=)

clean_body: We need to finally get extreme politicians out of the business of telling us what we can and can’t do = It’s been nearly three years since the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade and took away the freedom to choose from millions of women across the country. In response to this extreme ruling, the people of Kansas overwhelmingly voted to protect abortion rights in our state. But that isn’t good enough. We need to finally get extreme politicians out of the business of telling us what we can and can’t do. Unfortunately, those politicians haven’t given up their anti-freedom crusade. Instead, they’re threatening to restrict some of our most fundamental rights — including the freedom to choose, the freedom to marry who you love, and the freedom to live your life free from discrimination. Last year, the Kansas GOP released a platform calling for the repeal of same-sex marriage. And this year, we’ve already seen new legislation in Congress to further restrict abortion rights across the country, roll back civil rights protections, and so much more. I won’t stand idly by as these extreme politicians work to drag our country backwards. Our freedoms are non-negotiable — and I’ll use my voice every day to prove that to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Josh Weil
subject: Ron Desantis didn't expect us.
body:
That was his first mistake. Now we need to capitalize on it.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wnhga-vczy40-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **Ron Desantis Didn't Expect Us**
---
| | | | friend, We aced our first test: We WON the Democratic primary in January, but now its on to April where we MUST take down Trump’s hand-picked crony. Gov. Ron DeSantis purposely set this special election on a tightly compressed timeline—only 4 months from start to finish—so that grassroots Democratic campaigns like ours would have significantly less time to fundraise and organize. **_But DeSantis underestimated the strength, resolve, and resilience of Americans from across the country coming together to fight back._** He didn't expect us to be able to build a strong, well-funded campaign that can win. Together, we have done just that—thousands of people like yourself have answered the call. **Our fundraising is what is keeping us afloat in this race—but only if we can count on thousands more supporters to give whatever they can by the end of the day**. [**_Will you split $5, $10, or whatever you can with No Dem Left Behind and our campaign to help us exceed our goals and start this general election contest strong and ready to defeat Trump's handpicked MAGA lackey?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wnhga-vczy41-kyd76rh9/)

body:
This headline disturbed our entire team when we read it...

| **This headline disturbed our entire team when we read it:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103157199/531332589/-2044937581?refcode=NDCAF_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZiYjY1Mi01OWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJVelG4jJD-nmngwo-f8V-1MFXnq_pjJGmZKEUKpC-Q=&emci=860b90ab-45f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=64fbb652-59f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=48524772) | [SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH THE LAW AND TELL DONALD TRUMP NO THIRD TERM »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103157200/531332590/-2044937581?refcode=NDCAF_20250303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZiYjY1Mi01OWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJVelG4jJD-nmngwo-f8V-1MFXnq_pjJGmZKEUKpC-Q=&emci=860b90ab-45f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=64fbb652-59f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=48524772)

name: Team Lateefah
subject: Tomorrow, Lateefah addresses the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Tomorrow night, Lateefah will deliver the Working Families Party’s eighth annual response to the President’s address to Congress. Tune in at 5:30 PM PT / 8:30 PM ET to watch her share her story. [https://www.mobilize.us/workingfamilies/event/758545/]
https://www.mobilize.us/workingfamilies/event/758545/ [https://www.mobilize.us/workingfamilies/event/758545/]
This moment couldn’t be more urgent, and Lateefah is ready to meet the moment.
Millions of working families are struggling under the weight of rising costs, stagnant wages, and relentless attacks on our most basic rights. And while Trump and Republicans scheme to dismantle Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, Lateefah knows firsthand what that would mean for families across this country. As a working mom who carried the crushing burden of medical debt and survived paycheck to paycheck, she’s lived these fights — and she never stopped standing up for those who need a champion in Congress.
Lateefah is honored to deliver this address on behalf of the Working Families Party — because we deserve a government that works for us, not just the wealthiest. We don’t have to accept a system that leaves people behind. We can build a country where everyone has quality health care, good jobs, and housing they can afford.
Make sure you’re watching. Tune in tomorrow at 5:30 PM PT / 8:30 PM ET. Let’s stand with Lateefah as she delivers a bold vision for the future we deserve. [https://www.mobilize.us/workingfamilies/event/758545]
WATCH LATEEFAH'S ADDRESS [https://www.mobilize.us/workingfamilies/event/758545/]
Thank you,
Team Lateefah
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250303_wfpsotu1_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250303_wfpsotu1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250303_wfpsotu1_act] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit
LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Be Fierce
body:
Let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103158268/531335737/1304804479?refcode=WUEFH304_20250303_DebSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055750&refcode2=ms-dh-em-EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDUyMGRiZi01YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7lIMizHdv0nW-r9fXINXwsN1UHC-v57h2dLTfXA1b0=) Peter, let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases: **Be Fierce.**

Why do I love it? Because it perfectly describes my outlook on life.

**It means rolling up our sleeves to do the hard things and fight for what's right.**

But being fierce doesn't come easy. It's earned through perseverance. It's realized by facing challenges head on — and helping each other overcome them.

It doesn't matter what's standing in our way if we're standing together, Peter.

That's why I'm asking you to be fierce and stand with me as we kick off this campaign. I'm running to be governor of New Mexico because I understand the challenges New Mexicans are facing. And I know we can solve them together. [**Will you join me by splitting a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103158269/531335738/1304804479?refcode=WUEFH304_20250303_DebSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055750&refcode2=ms-dh-em-EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDUyMGRiZi01YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7lIMizHdv0nW-r9fXINXwsN1UHC-v57h2dLTfXA1b0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103158270/531335739/1304804479?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFH304_20250303_DebSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055750&refcode2=ms-dh-em-EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDUyMGRiZi01YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7lIMizHdv0nW-r9fXINXwsN1UHC-v57h2dLTfXA1b0=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103158271/531335740/1304804479?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFH304_20250303_DebSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055750&refcode2=ms-dh-em-EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDUyMGRiZi01YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7lIMizHdv0nW-r9fXINXwsN1UHC-v57h2dLTfXA1b0=)

I'm so grateful to everyone who has already stepped up to show their support. If we keep up this momentum, nothing can stop us from winning this fight together.

clean_body: Let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases. | = Peter, let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases: Be Fierce. Why do I love it? Because it perfectly describes my outlook on life. It means rolling up our sleeves to do the hard things and fight for what's right. But being fierce doesn't come easy. It's earned through perseverance. It's realized by facing challenges head on — and helping each other overcome them. It doesn't matter what's standing in our way if we're standing together, Peter. That's why I'm asking you to be fierce and stand with me as we kick off this campaign. I'm running to be governor of New Mexico because I understand the challenges New Mexicans are facing. And I know we can solve them together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I'm so grateful to everyone who has already stepped up to show their support. If we keep up this momentum, nothing can stop us from winning this fight together. Be fierce, Deb = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Theology 101
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25c5148628244ba99c13b2b136f69814&_e=lUvRDtoUAynBjCNg1zX2QR-cNLF3QJXXhJCxdA04QMZ2n-itmtJ4K1RW6y8-d1qzjsm0Yih9VdPalRHepULer-9Brw27JpipmWxoenILHTdYVwtQevTeufF6hSVNRmLaO79V7YxUhOpjJjceovf7cl8JPu6Fm1c5DVVfoj97W5MdMNh-aiXReU2P3oYTpYyYjjH7qdjrTBLfStLjdQiaHt9AojIsg4666mePL_J8IRMhkq0L2jTB6SKn0zXVYD91y8S6ErK_ibqqzvbrpc4liiJQH-dfq8ET83j8ZfZsYbC200Nwr1yhpJw3RhV_zVYvemJR4icCmanUDQ8iqoYh1ELkDDJ-lBqsVuu9lF_Xl12s-ATqDU5E6Bb38xOXZzTRzJv0kZjEWJx4Qts_6vJsEDfu572DBlVwGc5KMi1wOCWwgg4Fl9Ho7M_01U8H5heL) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25c5148628244ba99c13b2b136f69814&_e=lUvRDtoUAynBjCNg1zX2QR-cNLF3QJXXhJCxdA04QMZ2n-itmtJ4K1RW6y8-d1qzjsm0Yih9VdPalRHepULer-9Brw27JpipmWxoenILHTdYVwtQevTeufF6hSVNRmLaO79V7YxUhOpjJjceovf7cl8JPu6Fm1c5DVVfoj97W5MdMNh-aiXReU2P3oYTpYyYjjH7qdjrTBLfStLjdQiaHt9AojIsg4666mePL_J8IRMhkq0L2jTB6SKn0zXVYD91y8S6ErK_ibqqzvbrpc4liiJQH-dfq8ET83j8ZfZsYbAb2WNfvxqMYj2kxhdm-IM-WGHga1Ie2Sh1R89b5_Ibxu08xB0hxy3wDzkDFrebJxxHBFvzrpA6EV76h1d9YMIwUiwtpVeulfuR_-J8MJgov0vMJmobihyR6n70Ftv8e_x-ONyotd3Gu_iYbBvZUC-f) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as "theology," has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what Hillsdale's **" Theology 101" **online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**" Theology 101"** has been a popular course, so I'm pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25c5148628244ba99c13b2b136f69814&_e=lUvRDtoUAynBjCNg1zX2QR-cNLF3QJXXhJCxdA04QMZ2n-itmtJ4K1RW6y8-d1qzjsm0Yih9VdPalRHepULer-9Brw27JpipmWxoenILHTdYVwtQevTeufF6hSVNRmLaO79V7YxUhOpjJjceovf7cl8JPu6Fm1c5DVVfoj97W5MdMNh-aiXReU2P3oYTpYyYjjH7qdjrTBLfStLjdQiaHt9AojIsg4666mePL_J8IRMhkq0L2jTB6SKn0zXVYD91y8S6ErK_ibqqzvbrpc4liiJQH-dfq8ET83j8ZfZsYbBnwiTWofpU90O1Rge2h-fcQmGyaL8aO-BfiFiR73-XwegHzUnojhDw2xYvmYpYCbJgRnbFXMlIfNeLQ_f98cGykNflhPZk1qqDCOdHgdIFYrb59Xoz0WSwodUO5_h4QNInWzv-DyDEODDnSERdZRti). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though--and they go fast--so don't delay in getting your copy of **" Theology 101"** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25c5148628244ba99c13b2b136f69814&_e=lUvRDtoUAynBjCNg1zX2QR-cNLF3QJXXhJCxdA04QMZ2n-itmtJ4K1RW6y8-d1qzjsm0Yih9VdPalRHepULer-9Brw27JpipmWxoenILHTdYVwtQevTeufF6hSVNRmLaO79V7YxUhOpjJjceovf7cl8JPu6Fm1c5DVVfoj97W5MdMNh-aiXReU2P3oYTpYyYjjH7qdjrTBLfStLjdQiaHt9AojIsg4666mePL_J8IRMhkq0L2jTB6SKn0zXVYD91y8S6ErK_ibqqzvbrpc4liiJQH-dfq8ET83j8ZfZsYbAJ7klWjJ9RZpd4cAYuiSZLZpr4ivBRXJ19j04FVncaLkagqabmaPtfS_8VaC9MgAt3HKISK1p2sw16ldcY_kdK0Jz3BXFb5_oENKee3R2JO41nmkPL_rKnSb3ctctxwZA1E6WfITdTCBq5vAhaQ27a)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Royce White
subject: Time to CLEAN HOUSE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I promote peace, truth, and justice as the bedrock of our shared American experience. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlauM0ylNCBSj5FtNegyk2FAjUgf81kOfFVG2DwmCHQjY-LJEJeNwvVEMXTPIuia6sOCtb8W_UyaGQUoZhTo0tlPenChFeuR-LTPc2-CK9ziSuxlT2ORTTgqADQ9CMlZT2CBxAYAdtrPPjNypc3xCj7KfA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

I want to make a big distinction between the Chinese Communist Party and the Chinese people.

I also believe that a people’s government reflects the will of the people.

There is little today to be proud of regarding the actions of my own government, so my efforts as Senator will be to rally an effort to **CLEAN HOUSE** here at home—replacing rampant corruption with sacred honor at every level of governance by the will of the Free People of America.

| [ **END CORRUPTION** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlauyrzkKaUFGvbOcwA9IBnoZR567CpyRmQKS2YcU5lwN9kyjZJwPyeop_2jO0KcYtu8__L2TiHCuutY2pOAnnAKHqj7urmDPQPP3OwKWiilYQOU9SS3v0s3cnWA2wh5PTIGYdTMN72IzzwZxEgBgpVBxA%3D%3D)
---

This is a special time in our national history, and I demand from myself the kind of change that restores moral values.

Valuing our Nation will naturally diminish the CCP's intentionally corrupting influences, and bringing our vital manufactured supply home will reduce conflict with China.

[ **RESTORE OUR MORAL VALUES** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlau-7zvR8tA0NlbhLbI_-dwoCp2Q6SYxV5Q5ym2Fye7h0v-RJ_dDPAaAu1F9Qtk7rjsLaeV7NaiDwy6vnChYU6PjBl9ddR3A3zyrxw-qmdLm6mbtMBqUaWtCbjH45nEv8tSvp6DLfR9OTd5SRfyLrEryQ%3D%3D)
---

I promote peace, truth, and justice as the bedrock of our shared American experience, but [**I can’t do it without you.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlauijWd1uuVEE7_pmWPguwuMb5nzpbgcp1Vm8gwSHEc5E7GcpOFXADUwi3onPIbOxL2IExXvJohWIzBmsA8ePnBXcG1fJFUeNpK5HaiHpXMcfMThHHJG3SRTQ0SrsG9KZyWQ8kKQnGhvS58Uwlh8x-5Yw%3D%3D)

I’m on a mission to defeat Tina Smith in 2026. With your support, I can lead the charge in Washington to take out the corruption in our government once and for all.

[ **JOIN MY TEAM!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlau3t5LnxWE6k6ys9j3b8DveWh86Ht4mStWPZAu746FFTGX4ktAtqr563suxpqHjIqVR1JgX_w5TAmtzJw0GTut_dY3W7-1d0pw-o86zQ6v00i5k2jr5z3Ri8zwgQBpO82_2y8Z0oztzbE2-tKnjo54Cw%3D%3D)
---

_Royce White_

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlaulkHB6J6EJ9s1h1JUdiZCz1fItjfF5rsLSfJ2P9iYlmnrnzmq-hA7QzH2uWCvAiTUQCpEMrfrAKrm7y5VuS0UAhhS9cN4V3iiTn36dgXIIFpqHRTblbwR-9jR3pV3fkcf6kU257ArCUwpPx-70iki3A%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2cfe9ba9a0e41d4b155773850ab48b9&_e=WFluvYJZbLcG56-jtxvaMecNC98jS1_ofOkafk5zGde9ZbTwODTBpQnugB9gZd54z0mX10bG9S860BYhLIZFIjkqpCY6J1WLF46eU_QJbZb6KG5opWHRVgHfHv2-VAxMc9DpSZRptdjDndLatz4wzqPfokE3Wt_rachr4tKzLEi71FoqMvZWPU1WdV-uDlauNdGAVjHqMQKfFn8RQNvy4e79Xc5as-S3we1yHIDmRfr4EkWQqSeSxEDFRQmtI7iHCfdNKumq52CuR8Mv2EyY3xL-Nh6vnhvXKZBunsnxR5GL9BDvV6VGG8bO3rvosDUj_RdrOPFLeACeKJNwCQcnMw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I promote peace, truth, and justice as the bedrock of our shared American experience. | Peter, I want to make a big distinction between the Chinese Communist Party and the Chinese people. I also believe that a people’s government reflects the will of the people. There is little today to be proud of regarding the actions of my own government, so my efforts as Senator will be to rally an effort to CLEAN HOUSE here at home—replacing rampant corruption with sacred honor at every level of governance by the will of the Free People of America. | This is a special time in our national history, and I demand from myself the kind of change that restores moral values. Valuing our Nation will naturally diminish the CCP's intentionally corrupting influences, and bringing our vital manufactured supply home will reduce conflict with China. I promote peace, truth, and justice as the bedrock of our shared American experience, but I’m on a mission to defeat Tina Smith in 2026. With your support, I can lead the charge in Washington to take out the corruption in our government once and for all. Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Breakup Notice
subject: It's not you It's your membership.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Peter.

|
---
| | |
Peter...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

name: Ted Lieu
subject: HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter,

I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 11 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 1pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, let me explain:

Raja is working night and day to:

-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
-- Protect our communities from gun violence
-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
-- And so much more

Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats.

Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you, TedRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: Liz Cheney
subject: Donald Trump, JD Vance and Elon Musk have made clear who they are.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Great Task, Inc
body:
| | | [](https://link.quorumtracking.com/f/a/M1GkgvcyYxKeUgo2DWtJ6w~~/AACYXxA~/HKiiZ8S2diClCxWFGKyzoAyEmEGfmlDvqSLpMSB3_zJjs_OAO03MOXkivzUPPe-MpjCA4pPzjCefXbAqZ7XkzAbdT75TAYtn9g7lvWcvcoEWYo8EvBZRcyF-nEqGH-Ijj8oRL1l4Rp8jm1uQkAL3e7mUC05D0wEf2ygcYGPmA9ljrIs0gg9DzeuECCyCyEM0)
---
| | Dear Peter, America is a good and a great nation. Because of the power of our ideals, we have been a beacon of freedom to the world. Today, much of what we hold dear is under assault. Too many leaders in Washington are afraid to speak the truth, afraid to stand up for the fundamental values and institutions that safeguard our Republic.

**And now, Donald Trump is attempting to put America on Putin’s side as he continues his brutal assault on Ukraine.** Here’s some truth: Putin invaded Ukraine. NATO is the most successful military alliance in history. Since 1945, American leadership has ensured freedom and security for ourselves and millions of others around the world. Together with our allies, we defeated the Soviet Union — an evil empire that had to build gulags and walls to keep its own people in. Destroying our alliances and abandoning the cause of freedom is morally and strategically indefensible. Putin will pocket Trump’s naive concessions and demand much more. Appeasement makes a wider war more likely, not less.

**Donald Trump, JD Vance and Elon Musk have made clear who they are. Only naive fools—or tools of the Kremlin—would abandon NATO, side with Russia, and demand Ukraine surrender in the face of Putin’s brutal aggression.**

We all have an obligation at this moment to be the guardrails of democracy, to speak truth to power to defend the rule of law, American freedom, and the Constitution itself.

**[Please join me today — donate now to help elect leaders of courage and honor, to show that the determination of those who love freedom is greater than the dedication of those who would destroy it.](https://link.quorumtracking.com/f/a/M1GkgvcyYxKeUgo2DWtJ6w~~/AACYXxA~/HKiiZ8S2diClCxWFGKyzoAyEmEGfmlDvqSLpMSB3_zJjs_OAO03MOXkivzUPPe-MpjCA4pPzjCefXbAqZ7XkzAbdT75TAYtn9g7lvWcvcoEWYo8EvBZRcyF-nEqGH-Ijj8oRL1l4Rp8jm1uQkAL3e7mUC05D0wEf2ygcYGPmA9ljrIs0gg9DzeuECCyCyEM0)**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=45e4cee636f645b18635aab4b872015d&_e=1b4DIPEbagkd74kOChZmIJjop2iXjgDN-QqJMJxlfaE4uNmSoKlzUEPLGvvNVk797krY9RxFQsdMNT4Tu11tLQ7vWqtUCYMaZVPAZsYwtlIlRsvu-MKUSMu4T2PDIMqoptv0QRZ1YgK-YFQZGWkKk6SSbfb9YCyYK-k_7R2yyCjT_InUnlxXYfeRLkAYQNFMgksv1oRaaEqhosd_MY7e0BaSs_GphA6oWBgak0JPc9gGmDSQir-FUzXscZwpQI8AqFPqsemdJzZ7i-WQibddv7cMrXaSQjw0_1aWxhz8s1o3Iza0L42ACrAWLD7DeuJ2BnHU0zg8jwKHsPeOeXX2kQ%3D%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/SwuIiznCRbwPAaFDv-UYZHbDkyowg-TryUWDiDpGRRb6yEyrKxgdvofPnKrqkG7V_r8RTe1Qf1XLSrXja_rJXU-ptvizg5DW55JfMh5kjJsn7fZe2FiR6Vskk9F-Y70Nd_3_JI89nZvaMvByHvIwX7GPUQ8aXeHaxWlTYgJNhi2tMsGKsX7yvjaMi3s3lkCtiagSeuQgm3VccXGmj9XLeVbq0iOH9tIvHmP1qzKvODvifn7VPuYkAIFNxzJNobV7BgYUtfKPfIAouJ0Gj-zgWGS1jR2t7ri7V9KN6QLwXGtd1JuSRMzPA-bTCnCGutXtnPNvazUWC9LepxH4NmgR2eLWnxwBuf94dyto8eKcBxX06K8-593Ot7VryrczrFsk22VuzpNV9LqFo87GI5x-rOL9Hlmywji4CFS3hoo7eTflB15JIkAelajFXXNo2UcUrNQtpf70gdJMhYPuWRnHFsKiFc_Cp4itq50N5WPO2usNrgfTKnB6eqKg/_ba3KYE8lSEgwG030-IEU8nWP2dcpDU7/6) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/gktlshJR3ddUYp6AG1s4Hot5qBsprbHP4_A2CSmsQUO5u5pozOcJ-AW6Y-vFfEUBvWrAkn3dSChGqJHb6bZEJnjexmMu3QxeT8bALGqzSBpGSnKa_OVE4r0ousZm89NbUmUXlJP1YLvqybUgK2zSVxIwoKcg2hMki5DZrVCNO_86BXUbSu5Qgu-ol7xxF5bL640sPqDCoFReMEQlx_jicH2TGgOFzEFXo-58yeMkHmNMFFdsOsRKUWkC51kczMYYzYEURTxqsEI6kzbFQWIx8dtXH9cU0JRYaSbd6f70zxjG8OKhPVWGoNOM_VaW3R-EdSzhWvomT-HHweHnPYUPrhIy8yb1R5LgzDMK97qsFqMJnRQydx1X55VfpgTdZjfhZhJE_OFGlBpShv1J4OFo-OTd2UTxJ6w5qVq6cyb0Ts27oKHJWSfaCHYQ8NkOEGQrw4_ncE249ttWF3cAI-lATP6au0uNNj_RNQmPksaT-tE71JREpymEdDY4/uRy2YqXwJ_L_6mxhcLYJwzl47REKr_YQ/6) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/IEY5pCAvBHaWHi7uDjyzJ4B-ZbGVj3nZWHCXlvWjaLPFySa07NWluCNH1yBnQpmHHgASxqFdhlIDKd4y1I97YGNE8MWkkRBr2uQ_B78kdcKaiuyVpV-ZlbITfVXeOxA3SCEvP2Ot27uOd34NkaoxefVb1xihauvPIi2TL4Kuq639TIxF3usHaI6AsY66AE0tFRIy0o6GK5QmP776daOs12qavY-fZqiVBojjrANT87VqmfAGzQ8OZehbuLJYT-6lCgcrA-fQWcYWFw8O2ih7EUiDj5L3eqwS-3mFQskf-5h8Whnrnongh_T6NuWlBzzRHL39hLSUVflwoHMmBCunioW-fjXFrLknXtKF6VBz95gR8n0DGSJwncQMOf5gswk3DFHialONkICEOM9FRTZu-qu5MYeylgpPK6fpRAmS4TuiFa3RVUvzRCIVuQYXn8EuOEQkuWS0Wu8AcrvbfITJG-xOoE4FtuM7Zx1FdGd-Av3qtcKxhjJyLWz6/ON1j5PDznAMuaL662HZE7GL8vUSz2Hpl/6). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Radical New York Attorney General Tish James has already tried to BANKRUPT President Trump by imposing an unconstitutional fine of nearly **_HALF A BILLION DOLLARS._**

While he serves as president, that fine is increasing by nearly $114,000 _every single day_ because the ruling is written in such a way that demands INTEREST!

She even threatened to seize his bank account and his home if he didn’t pay this absolute shakedown!

_**Since President Trump took office, she’s already joined _TWO_ frivolous lawsuits against him in an attempt to BLOCK his actions – and is threatening more! **_

Far Left radicals like Tish James, who abuse the law to target their political opponents and undermine the will of the American people cannot be allowed to keep practicing law, Friend.

If we don’t hold her accountable by ripping her law license to shreds, she’s going to continue her LAWFARE for all four years of Trump’s presidency – _putting his America First agenda in jeopardy!_

subject: These individuals have enormous power and zero accountability
body:
| | [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLtu4zAQRb-G6iyQM5QoFix2VysXizXSOEHc0XxYhClZ0YOO_j6w47i9ODP34OpuiMGviojfBKANdiIABH8RgGXGV73f_x_XzSGdxeaK4G45gT8PNMET7o0-794Xm_7tq0luy_ZALU_sic_r4J7wozR3nQ7xloo6s4qDZt5kTjHBGYUKCpm1Chg6yv3RVEIUruBMe-etLS06Tj2KLCigUFCkyKpCIOQInkltqERWajSScHovyv3o3NyG_uxGq0Ncc3PpsqjaeR6mu1hDoLnYY94vJrpl-r4yl45A81Am0CQCzYvTH6e2l_WOYHMfDevtp3ib0t9aZqOywzXEGKZSEE5PP2-ypOArAAD__wS3bpc)
| ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I'm asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEkctu2zAQRb-G2tEgh5QoLrSoQstFi3SRwG6bjUCRo4iIHoZejvv1hVXD3R4c3Du4Y7tzG-prRlROAJrgJwJAxBcCsMziZI_H5_FK39YPRS8C8MYJPN3VFR5y7-zHj9-LX78f00kfkuaNebnyhz5fz_iQ76U77Gxob1SZyGcSLK9dhBlXkjNIIdZRkzEuK-chTaWsa6zTyjqFzupUJyK23kUhAwYxE0zwNFYCdgJqrq1jWvDECqeJZFvRrh4R5yb0Hzh6G9rrzg1d1GbNPJ-n7bCCQDGhW0bc2R79MN8MAoW3a_C0GcbhEuY_9Jbjh4467GccCRTcY11VsaZWKEclJpxWuhI0VmmFaJXVlhNRTMMyOizd4JEI46v_idjxmDKQBJJl7sp_IhEmNwf6sj_dcYc-LB0RZv98J852ZxveeyLMNgIwWebmUJqvxVO5Pxxfy5f9qTQ5NTmBpOzb4Ikw3z5_vebzSdjLBrenC3P4VD-ndW90NGb-fAltG6ZEEcnet_FuW60Z_A0AAP__pbGrwg)**
---
| | I'd be willing to bet you've never heard of Everett Kelly before. He's not a member of Congress. He's not a governor. He doesn't hold elected office of any kind. And that's the problem.
---
| [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEkU2P2jwUhX-NszOyrxMbL7J4GRNeqaKLqaAtm8ixbyYW-Wq-KPPrK1JEt48enXN1rm36OpT3lKgdAaiCHwkAEf8RgHkSZ3s6HYc7vSxXRW8C8MEJvD3VBV5y6-z168_ZL19O21EfZHVhPl74S5_uPb7kZ-kGGxvqB1Um8mkMlpcuwpSrmDPYQqKjKhXItS5ZIeW2UFxJ9L6UifNQFjp2gFFIgUHCBBN8mygBGwEl19YxLbi0wmkSs7VoUw6IUxXaKw7ehvq-cV0T1Wk1Tf24HpYRyEZ084Ab26LvpodBIPN2CZ5W3dDdwvRJHzm-a6jDdsKBQMY9lkWRaGqFcjRGyWmhC0ETtS0QrbLaciKysZsHh7nrPBJhfPEvERueUAYxATlPTf5XJMLszIG-789P3KAPc0OE2R-fxNmmt-GjJcKsIwCL85055Ob_7C3fH07f8vf9OTc7anYEZN7WwRNhPo-_lnH-0V-SFa5PF-bwW30fl73R0ZD6_hbqOoxSkZh9rOM9tlpS-BMAAP__NpOr0g)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees-the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers-who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left... ...the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump's hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEkctu2zwQhZ-G2tEQZyhRWmjxO7Qc4EcCNIVdxBuBIkcRYV1c3Vz36Qurhrv98OGcwRnTXhpf3TKmtgyg9m5kAAz_YwDzhEdzOLwNN35azopfEejOGbw81AWecmfN-f1zdsv_h2RM93F9Cp1cxFOfbhd6yo_SDbXGN3eqdOAyCUZUNqBMKClCSCBKgzqzERmVmsomiQwlSjRlKShxaK2kmGzgMwghCjFEkUQKYYNQidTYMEURG7Qpk-FatKkGoqn23ZkGZ3xz29i-DZqsnqbLuB6WM8hHsvNAG9OR66e7wSB3ZvGO1_3QX_30m99zXN9yS91EA4NcOKrKMkq5QWW5pFjwMi2RRyopiYwyqREM87GfB0uF7R0x1K78l0itiHgIkkE8T23xV2Sot3rPP3bHB27J-bllqHdvD2JNezH-q2Oo1xEglMVW7wv9mr8Uu_3he_GxOxZ6y_WWQVx0jXcMdfX6c_p8_xaf1ArXp6Pe_1I_xmWn02DI3OXqm8aPsWIy_FrHu2-1ZPAnAAD__4uqq4Q)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it's acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it's nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEkcuO2zoQRL-G2tEguylKWmhxPbR8gcEEyAR2kNkIFNkeMdbD0Mtxvj6wYjjbg4OqRrVtL0043XKWbBlAHfzIABj-xwDmCY_2cHgbbvxjOSf8ikB3zuDloS7wlDtnz19-zH55PaRjttf1h_BqkU99ul3oKT9KN9Ta0NxpYiKfK7Dy5CLKZaKkgBTiLKrzTIlYyEp7UE5oian2ldIxxAjkBMoo5CAgFihQpnGCsEE4ycw6kaHUFl3GlFiLNqeBaKpDd6bB29DcNq5voyavp-kyrocVDIqR3DzQxnbk--luMCi8XYLndT_01zD95vcc37fcUTfRwKCQnk5VFWfcYuK4Ii15lVXI4yStiGxiMysZFmM_D45K13tiaHz1L5FaGXMBioGep7b8KzI0W7Pn77vjA7fkw9wyNLu3B3G2vdjw2TE06wggVLk1-9L8X7yUu_3hW_m-O5Zmy82WgS67JniGJi2-6nqKX3--rnB9Opr9r-T7uOxMFg25v1xD04RRJ0yJz3W8-1ZLDn8CAAD__9iYqYQ)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation. In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who've burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”). CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn't the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn't members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn't any bureaucrat who can't respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn't it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability. It's bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey). But what's worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It's part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I'm intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960's and 1970's. I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood._ And, yes, the federal bureaucracy. Now, I'm working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left's tactics against them-tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky's “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Stand with Nikki to save the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
Sign the petition to stop Trump's plan to dismantle the USPS and protect this essential service for our communities. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103161492/531345110/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyNTliOS02MWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jgzCwNFBHtClPxA8vdO6euYuCbFKBCoItkC8A2DRThs=)
---
Team, Right now, President Trump is threatening to dismantle the United States Postal Service. This crucial institution connects families across America, especially in rural communities, to essential needs like medicine, paychecks, and messages from loved ones. This isn't just a postal issue; it's a lifeline. For decades, the United States Postal Service has been a trusted, non-partisan public institution. Now, President Trump is signaling plans to disband the USPS Board of Governors and place the agency under direct control of the Commerce Department. This is a blatant effort to diminish service, undermine postal workers, and move toward privatization. For regions like Central and Southern Illinois, these changes could mean more delays, more heartache, and more setbacks. We can't let privatization efforts strip away this vital service in pursuit of profit. I'm dedicated to protecting the USPS and its employees. With your support, I introduced the _Protect Postal Performance Act_ to stop the downsizing of crucial facilities like Champaign’s Processing and Distribution Center. But to truly safeguard this public good, I need you with me. I’m fighting to protect the USPS and its critical role in serving our communities. I’m fighting to protect the countless Illinoisans the USPS employees provide with critical benefits. But I can’t do it alone — I need your help. **[Will you stand with me to defend the USPS? Your support makes all the difference. Sign the petition today to demand that Congress take action to stop Trump’s plan to dismantle the USPS>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103161501/531345119/-1635337543?contactdata=lPtvQ1YHTrP6s/eVYWKgWeI1ZAQEFl69zBaojo/3CFQXSfaP3Yj0iY4Qwl6XsNJNiRzxq8zBV1DN+4OW67HKrikQTgzo65DQ84ys6cul64QGDWCMquYB6I/xQ46vB7MC+874OSvr2sWg84W/GNR96Q==&refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyNTliOS02MWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jgzCwNFBHtClPxA8vdO6euYuCbFKBCoItkC8A2DRThs=&emci=ad5ea127-49f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=471259b9-61f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=13891387)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103161509/531345128/-1635337543?contactdata=lPtvQ1YHTrP6s/eVYWKgWeI1ZAQEFl69zBaojo/3CFQXSfaP3Yj0iY4Qwl6XsNJNiRzxq8zBV1DN+4OW67HKrikQTgzo65DQ84ys6cul64QGDWCMquYB6I/xQ46vB7MC+874OSvr2sWg84W/GNR96Q==&refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyNTliOS02MWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jgzCwNFBHtClPxA8vdO6euYuCbFKBCoItkC8A2DRThs=&emci=ad5ea127-49f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=471259b9-61f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=13891387)

clean_body: Sign the petition to stop Trump's plan to dismantle the USPS and protect this essential service for our communities. | = Team, Right now, President Trump is threatening to dismantle the United States Postal Service. This crucial institution connects families across America, especially in rural communities, to essential needs like medicine, paychecks, and messages from loved ones. This isn't just a postal issue; it's a lifeline. For decades, the United States Postal Service has been a trusted, non-partisan public institution. Now, President Trump is signaling plans to disband the USPS Board of Governors and place the agency under direct control of the Commerce Department. This is a blatant effort to diminish service, undermine postal workers, and move toward privatization. For regions like Central and Southern Illinois, these changes could mean more delays, more heartache, and more setbacks. We can't let privatization efforts strip away this vital service in pursuit of profit. I'm dedicated to protecting the USPS and its employees. With your support, I introduced the Protect Postal Performance Act to stop the downsizing of crucial facilities like Champaign’s Processing and Distribution Center. But to truly safeguard this public good, I need you with me. I’m fighting to protect the USPS and its critical role in serving our communities. I’m fighting to protect the countless Illinoisans the USPS employees provide with critical benefits. But I can’t do it alone — I need your help. | Thank you for standing up for the integrity of the Postal Service and for your commitment to building a better future for Illinois and for every American relying on this fundamental service. Together, we can ensure the USPS remains a cherished public institution. — Nikki | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

Ukrainian President Zelenskyy represents a nation whose citizens have sacrificed their lives and shed blood for the freedoms they cherish. He deserved respect, not humiliation.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/uAWjkoiHDxaHaf6IC-ylvDu5dtH-OEwPoSd3wu7I34Nmdh_HA_8zy_wYCt8eMLpL-eLMUg18VXHJZ66ly5SQmym9FRIdkVg6-EEIg5wzf00NS-ooeM-h3BYtDQ4_co9EYOvx4G0xwbY8TDgD_bBztXHomiWP5b2BIRIAm7qXdOpvvrbUhUq74HzBnv_ICilTRUXC1iWxxKmLlkxp_e4sHaOKAT5Snx9zN49xm_WUKKpZAzMtHSzcoyP2S6GIWCzh8ua5EQ/AGqcZogsl9bR1TMVnfjAIAGokdoFCYFV/6)

Peter, What we saw happen last Friday in the Oval Office was shameful. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy represents a nation whose citizens have sacrificed their lives and shed blood for the freedoms they cherish. He deserved respect, not humiliation.

The real danger here is the Trump administration’s disrespect toward Zelenskyy, along with its wavering support for Ukraine, could undermine decades of U.S. leadership and embolden authoritarian regimes worldwide, sending a troubling signal to America’s allies about the country’s commitment to global security.

As experienced, common-sense Republicans go silent on the need to stand with Ukraine, there no longer appears to be a unified understanding of why supporting other democracies is vital to preserving our economic strength, national security, and global leadership. I discussed this during a MSNBC interview over the weekend. Please consider watching below and sharing your thoughts with me after:

name: Josh Harder
subject: Special education funding
body:
We can't let them cut it!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162846/531349268/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1OGEwODEtNjNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-caOVLcVx8AVPeYGyUkhMHRBJnuirChIO4sKwc9Xu5I=) | Peter, We recently had one of our first blockbuster hearings in the Appropriations Committee and I spoke about an issue that is near and dear to my heart: special ed funding. As you know, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are hell bent on shutting down the Department of Education and that includes massive cuts to special education funding. My brother received special ed services growing up and I had a front-row seat to the opportunities these amazing teachers gave to him. This fight is incredibly personal for me. **Special ed funding helps schools provide the best education possible to _all_ students, regardless of ability. If this program is cut, millions of kids with special needs will be left behind. It’s that dire.** If you’ve ever spoken to a parent of a child with special needs you know how passionate they are about their kid’s education. Cutting this funding makes NO sense. [_**I’m starting a petition to push back against these dangerous cuts. Will you add your name to call on Congress to protect Special Education funding today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162847/531349270/1289439073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1OGEwODEtNjNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-caOVLcVx8AVPeYGyUkhMHRBJnuirChIO4sKwc9Xu5I=&emci=622017a3-04f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=e358a081-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162848/531349272/1289439073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1OGEwODEtNjNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-caOVLcVx8AVPeYGyUkhMHRBJnuirChIO4sKwc9Xu5I=&emci=622017a3-04f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=e358a081-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=6455652) We’ve got to do what is right! \- Josh

body:
I’m sick and tired of watching politicians wrap themselves in the flag in campaign ads, but then stab veterans in the back like this

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162981/531349694/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmZjFmMS02M2Y4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWamZWgRc-4jmHslZ7TuUctvCgkMmjjV8JvUpu18FGM=&emci=9ceff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=a9eff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=13185894) Derek, This month, the Trump administration announced sweeping layoffs—and thousands of those who were fired were VA employees. On top of that, Elon Musk and DOGE have been eyeing big cuts to the VA and firing VA workers. These cuts could have a major impact on essential services from primary care and mental health care to cancer care and toxic exposure assessments. Look, I’m all for cutting costs and protecting money, but I’m not for Trump and DOGE taking a hacksaw to veterans’ healthcare. Caring for veterans is part of the cost of war, and the American people expect us to pay it. I’m sick and tired of watching politicians wrap themselves in the flag in campaign ads, but then stab veterans in the back like this. [_**I’m fighting back for my fellow veterans and the care they earned, and I need your support in this fight. Will you sign my petition demanding a stop to VA cuts?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162983/531349697/1437203396?refcode=email_030325_VA-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmZjFmMS02M2Y4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWamZWgRc-4jmHslZ7TuUctvCgkMmjjV8JvUpu18FGM=&emci=9ceff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=a9eff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=13185894) | | [Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103162990/531349702/-822444969?refcode=email_030325_VA-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmZjFmMS02M2Y4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWamZWgRc-4jmHslZ7TuUctvCgkMmjjV8JvUpu18FGM=&emci=9ceff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=a9eff1f1-63f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=13185894)

clean_body: I’m sick and tired of watching politicians wrap themselves in the flag in campaign ads, but then stab veterans in the back like this Derek, This month, the Trump administration announced sweeping layoffs—and thousands of those who were fired were VA employees. On top of that, Elon Musk and DOGE have been eyeing big cuts to the VA and firing VA workers. These cuts could have a major impact on essential services from primary care and mental health care to cancer care and toxic exposure assessments. Look, I’m all for cutting costs and protecting money, but I’m not for Trump and DOGE taking a hacksaw to veterans’ healthcare. Caring for veterans is part of the cost of war, and the American people expect us to pay it. I’m sick and tired of watching politicians wrap themselves in the flag in campaign ads, but then stab veterans in the back like this. | | 3.5 million veterans (like me) get their healthcare in-house at the VA—many of whom have service-related disabilities. Selling off the VA betrays veterans who sacrificed for this nation. We didn't serve only to come home and watch politicians dismantle the VA. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I asked Kash Patel if he would meet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I wrote a letter to Kash Patel - the person leading both the ATF and FBI - about the severity of the gun violence crisis in America.
#

Hello there.
I wrote a letter to Kash Patel -- the person leading both the ATF and FBI -- about the severity of the gun violence crisis in America.
I asked if he would meet with me and a small group of gun violence survivors, just like a FEMA administrator would meet with victims of hurricanes or the Secretary of Defense would meet with the families of fallen troops.
We cannot stop working on the issue of gun violence just because those we may disagree with are in power. I won't stop, but I cannot do it alone.
[**Please make a small but meaningful contribution to GIFFORDS to help us advance the work of gun safety across the country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar25.KlmT7F&refcode=em250303-1-b&t=1&akid=10071%2E3935704%2EXmxZTg)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar25.KlmT7F&refcode=em250303-1-b&t=2&akid=10071%2E3935704%2EXmxZTg)**
Here's the letter.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/60450?t=3&akid=10071%2E3935704%2EXmxZTg)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/60450?t=4&akid=10071%2E3935704%2EXmxZTg)
Thank you for reading.
[**Please make a contribution of $5, $50, or whatever you can afford to GIFFORDS today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar25.KlmT7F&refcode=em250303-1-b&t=5&akid=10071%2E3935704%2EXmxZTg)

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Stop Trump

body:
There are two ways to stop Trump before the next presidential election.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=435%2E2563979%2EXnOGIG)

If everyone reading this email donated $5 to the Democratic National Committee, they'd have the resources we need to elect a Democratic House and Senate in the next election.
Sadly, not everyone gives.
[**That's why Kamala Harris is relying on people who understand the stakes of this moment to donate to the DNC today. The best way to put a check on Trump is to elect a Congress that will.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250304&refcode2=435_2563979_XnOGIG&akid=435%2E2563979%2EXnOGIG)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250304&refcode2=435_2563979_XnOGIG&akid=435%2E2563979%2EXnOGIG)

We are writing to ask -- humbly -- if there's anything we can say to convince you to make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today?
Let us try:
There are two ways to stop Trump before the next presidential election.
First, to elect a Democratic Congress that will put a check on his unrestrained power.
Until then, we can mobilize voters in communities across the country to stand up and oppose his efforts to pass tax cuts for billionaires, paid for by cuts to programs working people need.
If you agree those two things are important -- and we think you do -- the Democratic National Committee is leading those efforts.
But they can't do it alone. They rely on donations from people who care about the future of this country. So please:
[**Contribute $5, or whatever you can afford today, directly to the Democratic Party and they will put your donation to work electing and mobilizing Democrats across the country. That is what we need at this moment.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250304&refcode2=435_2563979_XnOGIG&akid=435%2E2563979%2EXnOGIG)

Hi Peter, It’s mega energy affordability week for the Oregon state legislature! This week we’ve got hearings for all three bills in [Energy Affordability and Utility Accountability priority](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103163329/531350753/860011454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTE5ZGY2LTY0ZjgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFu7Z3rqr4V2-gLOcxgMNxWAga1cH7QKsdwowGGU9kc=&emci=ebbf0d56-5cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=eca19df6-64f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=2107230).**[Do you have a moment to help us get these bills passed?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103163330/531350754/26249128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTE5ZGY2LTY0ZjgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFu7Z3rqr4V2-gLOcxgMNxWAga1cH7QKsdwowGGU9kc=&emci=ebbf0d56-5cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=eca19df6-64f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=2107230)** Oregonians have seen their utility bills skyrocket in the past few years, which will only increase as we continue to face the ever-worsening climate impacts. All three of these bills in our Energy Affordability and Accountability package are set on increasing the energy affordability for everyday Oregonians, holding major utility companies accountable, and paving the way for more climate resilient communities.
---
