Hi Peter,
In the face of mounting threats to immigrant communities from the Trump administration — including many care workers and families — our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance, has put together a bilingual immigrant rights resource webpage.
**[**_Please read and share this webpage with your network, so we can ensure as many people as possible have the information and resources they need to protect themselves and their families from deportation >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170192/531372877/467336193?ms=030325_know_rights_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTI0MDA1MC03OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cixP-SMALpqz8OAJzf_JBH4oscijWgvP7NCk7ct7GHs=&emci=9cfade83-6ff8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=41240050-78f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=864787) **

Immigrant care workers are not alone. Amongst the fear and uncertainty of the moment, our new webpage is filled with important immigrant rights information, including:
* A run-down of legal rights, regardless of immigration status
* [**_Local legal service provider listing_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170195/531372880/-1660809177?ms=030325_know_rights_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTI0MDA1MC03OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cixP-SMALpqz8OAJzf_JBH4oscijWgvP7NCk7ct7GHs=&emci=9cfade83-6ff8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=41240050-78f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=864787)
* Creating a family emergency plan
* Care workers’ rights on the job

The Trump administration’s immediate actions threaten millions of care workers and immigrants in our communities. Together we are stronger, and it will take all of us to support our communities. You can start by sharing resources and staying informed.
**[**_Can you read and share this webpage now to help protect and support communities facing threats of deportation? >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170196/531372881/467336193?ms=030325_know_rights_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTI0MDA1MC03OGY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cixP-SMALpqz8OAJzf_JBH4oscijWgvP7NCk7ct7GHs=&emci=9cfade83-6ff8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=41240050-78f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=864787) **

name: help get trump out of the white house [FFR]
subject: Donald Trump IMPEACHED ?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=3&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn) | [**DEVELOPMENT FROM _NEWSWEEK:_ Donald Trump Impeachment Petition Gets 100,000 Signatures**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=4&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn) [**This is great news!! That 's why we're recirculating our own petition to demand Congress IMPEACH Trump and show him the door!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=5&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn) | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=6&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn)
---
Have you seen the latest with Donald Trump? ↘↘

⭕ Trump said that "He who saves his Country does not violate any Law" - implying that there's nothing he can do, no matter how bad, that will be illegal because he's trying to "save" America

⭕ He called himself King as he tried to meddle in local politics:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=7&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn)
Trump may act like a King because he thinks he has unlimited power and the backing of all branches of government. But the truth is he holds a narrow majority in the House, and we would only need two Republicans to do the right thing and vote in favor of his impeachment!

**Trump is NOT our king, nor can he do whatever he wants without any consequences! We NEED to put an end to this before it goes too far.**
[**_Please sign RIGHT NOW to demand Congress IMPEACH Donald Trump ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=8&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59891?t=9&akid=22898%2E4449941%2EzVKjFn)
---
Long live Democracy!

_Fight for Reform_

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, | | | Have you seen the latest with Donald Trump? ↘↘ ⭕ Trump said that "He who saves his Country does not violate any Law" - implying that there's nothing he can do, no matter how bad, that will be illegal because he's trying to "save" America ⭕ He called himself King as he tried to meddle in local politics: Trump may act like a King because he thinks he has unlimited power and the backing of all branches of government. But the truth is he holds a narrow majority in the House, and we would only need two Republicans to do the right thing and vote in favor of his impeachment! Trump is NOT our king, nor can he do whatever he wants without any consequences! We NEED to put an end to this before it goes too far. Long live Democracy! Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s official – I am running for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a “household name in the state.”
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=96eb94e506884e5d932e51f0a3ef9e92&_e=A5TcTFWeXpRKfT33NK7kc1s2mNMlhTO13sLXPlmwIxNfw3VnNBREElL487NcTyxxOl-GrD17QDUnwg3x4oC4b0ioMfkHTTChmSR5KBmHQ0cKGPRPuTs4YzCRlx5aFUFhSFdTkpxP-OHAD2DDFpLPNelM7tzv2TlKHIW3LlzAagu7cDaUzOG6UfcvbApDuSU9oCxlNIQdypL9td_rMpy8TUyEGa4oHZWU_S6vSXcDpJXp63ddlR_cln5hjYaj1h5wedo4eNvhu8vvmbC-wpAsj18SJw6d2mX9X89iB5HEcGLa_j29cZirN1BKwq76zTHjV-nMBE3IZbF2i9tTOTHABDcQitldVSGieO_Fo3GOjJ2lvXh9-opVMktR9SLa8PaPwzmvtNHjoHF6hL2375F7ApDdrI5QtSLccH41SO29IXs%3D)
---
My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

**[If that's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=96eb94e506884e5d932e51f0a3ef9e92&_e=A5TcTFWeXpRKfT33NK7kc1s2mNMlhTO13sLXPlmwIxNfw3VnNBREElL487NcTyxxOl-GrD17QDUnwg3x4oC4b0ioMfkHTTChmSR5KBmHQ0cKGPRPuTs4YzCRlx5aFUFhSFdTkpxP-OHAD2DDFpLPNelM7tzv2TlKHIW3LlzAagu7cDaUzOG6UfcvbApDuSU9oCxlNIQdypL9td_rMpy8TUyEGa4oHZWU_S6vSXcDpJXp63ddlR_cln5hjYaj1h5wedo4eNvhu8vvmbC-wpAsj99acpqYo3H-Ra_KDRMi8ve9RsQ_SD_6WeFUUmglgC6gqSrztdh2KNiEvq6VZzXwfzKCDeEpTTgzU4aGUff9XWqXLyY96zT5PWAp59eZ-aqKhsKw4n9hHgYVuK9zRNURLB-WxK1oPjAEWBx3-cwkPS8%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**
---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=96eb94e506884e5d932e51f0a3ef9e92&_e=A5TcTFWeXpRKfT33NK7kc1s2mNMlhTO13sLXPlmwIxNfw3VnNBREElL487NcTyxxOl-GrD17QDUnwg3x4oC4b0ioMfkHTTChmSR5KBmHQ0cKGPRPuTs4YzCRlx5aFUFhSFdTkpxP-OHAD2DDFpLPNelM7tzv2TlKHIW3LlzAagu7cDaUzOG6UfcvbApDuSU9oCxlNIQdypL9td_rMpy8TUyEGa4oHZWU_S6vSXcDpJXp63ddlR_cln5hjYaj1h5wedo4eNvhu8vvmbC-wpAsj_igRXvPoyXiCeWjyBsgIlEW7r6C43dvwkFh3PPaLo9lOGc5aYOHsHIpgYQ90AAOy1yi_nNr7qT6gFKgsofoEQgMLvpQgHXl1_ams90aNojYwPonffP3w0NzaSJVb0zdtv4-B6iOhtz8BqH-6lQ6JcU%3D)
---
My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** - he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** - our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio.

**[If you agree, I'd be honored to have you aboard.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=96eb94e506884e5d932e51f0a3ef9e92&_e=A5TcTFWeXpRKfT33NK7kc1s2mNMlhTO13sLXPlmwIxNfw3VnNBREElL487NcTyxxOl-GrD17QDUnwg3x4oC4b0ioMfkHTTChmSR5KBmHQ0cKGPRPuTs4YzCRlx5aFUFhSFdTkpxP-OHAD2DDFpLPNelM7tzv2TlKHIW3LlzAagu7cDaUzOG6UfcvbApDuSU9oCxlNIQdypL9td_rMpy8TUyEGa4oHZWU_S6vSXcDpJXp63ddlR_cln5hjYaj1h5wedo4eNvhu8vvmbC-wpAsjz1p0GFnMJ9YjOHpMOP3cP7BwLBFQJkdLgLQmtOXY87q29swhcXTMiuR9ho7rkmF5PdS1eqKYwgSyiRni_p04PLYO3Eri8a4e2l-SKloQ1Wic22Ypjy9B1mBOYE4ADLRFe_11Udodbn74zQTivUvJf8%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

So here's my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** **[So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=96eb94e506884e5d932e51f0a3ef9e92&_e=A5TcTFWeXpRKfT33NK7kc1s2mNMlhTO13sLXPlmwIxNfw3VnNBREElL487NcTyxxOl-GrD17QDUnwg3x4oC4b0ioMfkHTTChmSR5KBmHQ0cKGPRPuTs4YzCRlx5aFUFhSFdTkpxP-OHAD2DDFpLPNelM7tzv2TlKHIW3LlzAagu7cDaUzOG6UfcvbApDuSU9oCxlNIQdypL9td_rMpy8TUyEGa4oHZWU_S6vSXcDpJXp63ddlR_cln5hjYaj1h5wedo4eNvhu8vvmbC-wpAsj1qanfxA46aAk0DYKxRBSt1dMG8qNcF8WbmseNHiVmWHIWjoy7YR5H4YsT2cCkrU7pYcQnM-WyGVpPxW1RKvVVg7XgSDcg0IXukjGBJ0V_mkJott3IA5tq3tH-ATiTmmYoKuJKpoqXJ1g9CdmpFcUEM%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in.

_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? _

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Who's threatening repro rights this week?
body:
🚩Repro Red Flags: Agency Watch | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170638/531374548/1485890129?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237)
---
The Center for Reproductive Rights is previewing the Senate confirmation hearings for Trump nominees who pose a threat to reproductive rights. Research, legislative records, public statements, and more can be found at [**_Repro Red Flags: Agency Watch_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170639/531374550/1207998042?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237). **Confirmation Hearings This Week: 3/3 - 3/9** | **March 6: Food and Drug Administration Commissioner -[**Dr. Martin Makary**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170640/531374551/-1664897511?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237)**

**In This Role He Could:**
* Make it much harder to access abortion pills nationwide by reinstating old restrictions on mifepristone (including effectively banning telehealth for abortion services), or rescinding approval for the drug altogether.
* Rescind or restrict over-the-counter access to birth control, including Plan B, potentially removing these medications from pharmacy shelves.
* Restrict the ability of hospital staff to access misoprostol, a medication used to stop pregnant people from hemorrhaging and also used in abortions.
* Politicize the FDA approval process, which importantly is distinguished by its apolitical, independent, science-based rigor, and assist HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in carrying out Trump’s anti-abortion agenda.

| **Red Flags:**
* He has fear mongered about abortion on national television, spreading misinformation and stigma about people who have abortions.
* His nomination was celebrated by well-known anti-abortion organizations including CatholicVote and Focus on the Family, the former stating that "the appointment of a pro-life doctor to head the FDA comes as pro-lifers continue efforts to reverse the FDA's approval of the mail-in abortion pill mifepristone."

---

* * *
**At Last Week's Hearings:**
* [**Dan Bishop**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170641/531374552/1519692629?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237) (Office of Management and Budget Deputy Director nominee) agreed to help implement President Trump's anti-abortion agenda, including by enforcing the [**Weldon Amendment**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170643/531374553/586558728?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237)—a policy that gives health care workers free rein to refuse any medical care they personally disagree with—and funding fake clinics that deter patients from having abortions. **Bishop's second hearing is scheduled for March 5 in the Senate Budget Committee.**

[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170644/531374554/2141984067?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170646/531374556/-1245908844?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170647/531374557/589568587?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103170648/531374558/1393780475?sourceid=1150484&utm_campaign=25emeus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM0ODE5MC03YWY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbIN7RXvwgEvt_IsEEdU_7MBOwmpyOe98gKMolTnKSw=&emci=625b627d-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=5f348190-7af8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=954237)
---|---|---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I wrote you a note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment. I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment. | | |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _
---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63 "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63 "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. [I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63 "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.")

So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor.

**[It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I've officially launched my campaign. I'm humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63 "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.")**

---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-1369949c1d4742f898c0bd2620a840fd/63)
---
Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time.

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201
[Privacy Policy](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/abb7ae18ff97418396f80c98754388fc-0bf286a312644a77a4d586f64a4d75a1/63)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I wanted to reach out to thank you for all the incredible support over the last month.
#
I wanted to reach out to thank you for all the incredible support over the last month.
**We set some ambitious fundraising goals in February, and it’s thanks to neighbors and supporters like you that we absolutely _shattered_ them!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250303-1?refcode=em20250303-1792&amount=5&refcode2=1792_21716_HXfmPO&akid=1792%2E21716%2EHXfmPO)
From the unelected billionaires ransacking the federal government to the Republicans making personal attacks in an attempt to distract the public from what’s really happening, it was a busy month to say the least.
I’m working to hold the Trump administration accountable for the chaos and corruption while standing up for Delawareans in Congress, and I couldn’t do it without your support.
**So thank you again for your support.[And if you’re in a position to give, can you pitch in $5 today to help us have a strong start toward our March goal? Every donation adds up to make a big difference!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250303-1?refcode=em20250303-1792&amount=5&refcode2=1792_21716_HXfmPO&akid=1792%2E21716%2EHXfmPO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250303-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250303-1792&refcode2=1792_21716_HXfmPO&akid=1792%2E21716%2EHXfmPO)**
In gratitude,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250303-1&t=1&refcode2=1792_21716_HXfmPO&akid=1792%2E21716%2EHXfmPO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1792%2E21716%2EHXfmPO)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I couldn’t stay silent any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Not while our House GOP majority is under threat.
| **__Secure Correspondence Transmitted from the Desk of Rep. Elise Stefanik__**
---
Friend,
---
I haven’t reached out directly like this in a while, but given how urgent the situation is becoming, I felt I had no choice.
---
**Over the last few weeks, the Democrats have made it abundantly clear that they’re willing to shell out BILLIONS of dollars if it means stopping our America First agenda – and our House majority is their _TOP_ _TARGET_. **
---
_One Democrat super PAC has already created a $50,000,000 fund to target working-class voters – the backbone of the America First movement – with _LIES_ about the new administration! _
---
Last year, I fought tooth and nail to help Republicans win back the House majority...
---
I even transferred millions of dollars of my campaign’s own funds to battleground districts to help Republicans overcome Kamala’s Soros-funded Money Machine!
---
**Now, after all that we sacrificed, I REFUSE to stand by while Far Left extremists use their BILLIONS to silence the voice of the American people by BUYING the House majority out from under us at the first opportunity.**
---
_That is why I’m doing everything I can to ensure Republicans have every dollar we need to PROTECT and EXPAND our majority._
---
**And with two special elections in Florida just weeks away, your support has never been more important.**
---
**Given the urgency of the situation we’re facing, I’ve made some calls and secured a 500% MATCH on all grassroots contributions for the next 30 minutes!**
---
_(I know you’ve already done a lot. So if you can’t contribute, I completely understand – please don’t feel pressured to donate right now.)_
---
But if you can, I ask that you do just a little bit more to help the America First movement keep up our momentum and ensure the Democrats remain on the back foot.
---

name: USO T-Shirt Vote @ USO
subject: [YOU’VE BEEN SELECTED] Vote now >>
body:
We want your input!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-)
---
USO Supporter,
This year marks 15 years since we began our annual USO T-shirt campaign to honor the people who serve.
In that time, the USO T-shirt has become something like a uniform that gives military supporters the chance to show their gratitude for our service members while supporting the USO's mission to serve the people who serve.
**And because of how important the USO T-shirt has become, we 're now inviting top supporters like _you_ to help us choose the design for 2025. **
[**EXCLUSIVE INVITE**](https://links.e.uso.)
---

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: This witch hunt can’t go unanswered
body:
Protecting the public is a crime now
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G3hHZY-fBwgsoTRctFVJRabtzHAeMMiTYIYa_r6CU7cyZuUdXY9-65qJIPicAO1cHAkDEjAAcvyP60x5fXyY-dnFyzN4xvW7h6Y6O8IAPRn8tZx-rt1WYB8t_1v3mfBz5Ax8uvX3A99DEonbtdZovaK1EUzNJreK55EyyKRd0p3KTFdqYtMjBcskbmQIUWWGrqpbTqsqoU8AgZYIJAChgmkhpOeimkXUhjdaaSHbLSTRa74zmYYja-67DxHRIW7Ubhj7cxEoCZfRdcjiZ1p7C35npkEB5VyZQjgRK3J83vbVrRCLKW2li8bm9bN2zTpfUq7qPrm1dyHIi2fb_DR0V_AYAAP__iatwwA)
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zstq6zAQxvGnkXcyo5F8W2iRnOCzOBcCLfSyKbI0blysyJGcuHn74hCynfnB_zN-Gof-qlm1ZYiHwSWGyOSGIZ7eFh_PX_7Pbx6XsPBT-d8X6xd_3ekFH_hozeu_zdP-7z5tE4n35-nl-3QRDz5fJ3rgezQnb4ZxvVa7zGnZO1AZaVEpAQoaIbODFrYAIcqCurJvmgIdQgemquuy6yV0kA0aAQuQIBGxxiZXigSavleuVtYYwxTcOrnxFAdrRJoXE2MIPrfBZ6M-zPOUbsNahm0ie46UmyO5MK-CYXu0k2PYkvN8RsfJ8wY7JtsUztHShw2OmNy5jq-Qk2-w4wAyi9pNyzCOQyorpuDzNmONXjT-BAAA___PvnG8)
---
| | Friend,
I can’t believe I’m writing this.
Another police officer is under attack for doing his job—protecting the public.
Officer Alex Gaitan, a dedicated cop with six years of honorable service, is now facing **up to 99 years in prison** for subduing a violent suspect.
His real crime? Doing his duty while anti-cop activists and the media twist the facts for their political agenda.
And the worst part? Travis County District Attorney José Garza—backed by radical, socialist groups—is leading this witch hunt.
Make no mistake, Garza wants to destroy Alex’s life to make an example out of him.
Alex’s entire career is on the line. His family is terrified. His future hangs by a thread.
We cannot let another anti-police prosecutor ruin a hero’s life!
**[Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more to support Officer Gaitan’s legal defense.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zstq6zAQxvGnkXcyo5F8W2iRnOCzOBcCLfSyKbI0blysyJGcuHn74hCynfnB_zN-Gof-qlm1ZYiHwSWGyOSGIZ7eFh_PX_7Pbx6XsPBT-d8X6xd_3ekFH_hozeu_zdP-7z5tE4n35-nl-3QRDz5fJ3rgezQnb4ZxvVa7zGnZO1AZaVEpAQoaIbODFrYAIcqCurJvmgIdQgemquuy6yV0kA0aAQuQIBGxxiZXigSavleuVtYYwxTcOrnxFAdrRJoXE2MIPrfBZ6M-zPOUbsNahm0ie46UmyO5MK-CYXu0k2PYkvN8RsfJ8wY7JtsUztHShw2OmNy5jq-Qk2-w4wAyi9pNyzCOQyorpuDzNmONXjT-BAAA___PvnG8)**
Here’s what really happened:
In March 2021, Alex responded to a high-risk call at a building he knew well. He’d dealt with the suspect before—a violent, drug-addicted man known for resisting arrest. The last time Alex confronted him, it took three officers and a Taser to subdue him.
This time, Alex arrived to find **three officers struggling on the ground** with the same suspect. The man was violently resisting arrest and refused to comply. Alex knew the situation was spiraling out of control.
So, Alex used his non-lethal Taser to subdue the suspect.
The danger was over. Everyone got to go home safely that night.
But two years later, DA José Garza dropped a bombshell indictment against Alex, charging him with aggravated assault.
This is how radical prosecutors destroy good officers—they take lawful, justified actions and twist them into political scandals.
It’s wrong. It’s dangerous. And it cannot go unanswered.
**Please donate to Officer Gaitan’s legal defense.** He needs you now more than ever.
Friend, as someone who’s spent my life in law enforcement, this situation infuriates me.
Officers like Alex Gaitan put their lives on the line every single day. They don’t do it for recognition—they do it because they care about protecting you and your family.
But that sacrifice doesn’t matter to Garza and his far-left allies. They’ll happily destroy an innocent man’s life to push their anti-police agenda.
That’s why the National Center for Police Defense exists. We stand in the gap when officers like Alex are unfairly targeted.
We’ve helped defend officers like Betty Shelby, Anthony Federico, Hugh Barry Jr., and Mark Bessner. Now, we’re rallying patriots like you to stand with Alex Gaitan.
Time is running out. Alex needs a strong legal defense, but that costs money—money he doesn’t have. Without help, his family faces financial ruin.
**[Don’t let Alex Gaitan fight this battle alone. Click here to donate $25, $50, $100, or more now.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zstq6zAQxvGnkXcyo5F8W2iRnOCzOBcCLfSyKbI0blysyJGcuHn74hCynfnB_zN-Gof-qlm1ZYiHwSWGyOSGIZ7eFh_PX_7Pbx6XsPBT-d8X6xd_3ekFH_hozeu_zdP-7z5tE4n35-nl-3QRDz5fJ3rgezQnb4ZxvVa7zGnZO1AZaVEpAQoaIbODFrYAIcqCurJvmgIdQgemquuy6yV0kA0aAQuQIBGxxiZXigSavleuVtYYwxTcOrnxFAdrRJoXE2MIPrfBZ6M-zPOUbsNahm0ie46UmyO5MK-CYXu0k2PYkvN8RsfJ8wY7JtsUztHShw2OmNy5jq-Qk2-w4wAyi9pNyzCOQyorpuDzNmONXjT-BAAA___PvnG8)**
Alex’s family and future are counting on us.
Thank you for supporting our heroes in blue.
Gratefully,
Sheriff Joe Arpaio (Ret.)**
**National Center for Police Defense

clean_body: Protecting the public is a crime now | | | | | Friend, I can’t believe I’m writing this. Another police officer is under attack for doing his job—protecting the public. Officer Alex Gaitan, a dedicated cop with six years of honorable service, is now facing up to 99 years in prison for subduing a violent suspect. His real crime? Doing his duty while anti-cop activists and the media twist the facts for their political agenda. And the worst part? Travis County District Attorney José Garza—backed by radical, socialist groups—is leading this witch hunt. Make no mistake, Garza wants to destroy Alex’s life to make an example out of him. Alex’s entire career is on the line. His family is terrified. His future hangs by a thread. We cannot let another anti-police prosecutor ruin a hero’s life! Here’s what really happened: In March 2021, Alex responded to a high-risk call at a building he knew well. He’d dealt with the suspect before—a violent, drug-addicted man known for resisting arrest. The last time Alex confronted him, it took three officers and a Taser to subdue him. This time, Alex arrived to find three officers struggling on the ground with the same suspect. The man was violently resisting arrest and refused to comply. Alex knew the situation was spiraling out of control. So, Alex used his non-lethal Taser to subdue the suspect. The danger was over. Everyone got to go home safely that night. But two years later, DA José Garza dropped a bombshell indictment against Alex, charging him with aggravated assault. This is how radical prosecutors destroy good officers—they take lawful, justified actions and twist them into political scandals. It’s wrong. It’s dangerous. And it cannot go unanswered. Please donate to Officer Gaitan’s legal defense. He needs you now more than ever. Friend, as someone who’s spent my life in law enforcement, this situation infuriates me. Officers like Alex Gaitan put their lives on the line every single day. They don’t do it for recognition—they do it because they care about protecting you and your family. But that sacrifice doesn’t matter to Garza and his far-left allies. They’ll happily destroy an innocent man’s life to push their anti-police agenda. That’s why the National Center for Police Defense exists. We stand in the gap when officers like Alex are unfairly targeted. We’ve helped defend officers like Betty Shelby, Anthony Federico, Hugh Barry Jr., and Mark Bessner. Now, we’re rallying patriots like you to stand with Alex Gaitan. Time is running out. Alex needs a strong legal defense, but that costs money—money he doesn’t have. Without help, his family faces financial ruin. Alex’s family and future are counting on us. Thank you for supporting our heroes in blue. Gratefully, Sheriff Joe Arpaio (Ret.) National Center for Police Defense | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive Suite 200 Fairfax, VA 22030

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan’s office hours = one big joke
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
After years of dodging his own constituents, refusing to hold public forums, and hiding from real accountability –Job Killer Jim just announced “mobile office hours.”
Why now?
Because we got in his head.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250303_office_hours_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250303_office_hours_image]
Jim Jordan has spent 18 years in Congress without passing a single bill, without bringing real resources back home, and without lifting a damn finger to help families.
But now—suddenly—he wants to pretend he cares? Please.
This isn’t about serving Americans. This is about saving face.
So here’s what we’re going to do: We’re taking over this sham town hall.
I want YOU to submit the tough questions that Jim Jordan’s staff won’t answer—and I’ll read them out loud, on camera, and blast them across social media so he has nowhere to hide.
Reply to this email to submit your question and then rush a contribution to make Jim Jordan squirm. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250303_office_hours_link1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250303_office_hours_button1]
You and I both know what’s going to happen at these so-called “office hours.”
His staff will show up, not Jim Jordan, and they’ll nod along, scribble down fake notes, and then?
Nothing. No follow-up. No real answers. No action.
Meanwhile, Americans are losing their jobs, their healthcare, and their benefits—because Jim Jordan is too busy pushing conspiracy theories and doing Trump and Elon Musk’s dirty work.
He’s out here cheering on federal job cuts that are costing people their paychecks.
He’s pushing Medicaid slashes that will devastate 3.55 million Ohioans and many more millions nationwide.
He’s letting veterans’ services crumble, abandoning 830,000 in Ohio alone.
But now that we’ve got him feeling the heat?
He suddenly remembers he’s supposed to represent this district? Not a chance.
We’re making sure every voter sees through this fraud. I’ll be reading YOUR questions on camera and exposing his failures for all to see. Chip in now to help us hold him accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250303_office_hours_link2]
No more hiding, Jim. We’re coming for you.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

clean_body: alt [] Friends, After years of dodging his own constituents, refusing to hold public forums, and hiding from real accountability –Job Killer Jim just announced “mobile office hours.” Why now? Because we got in his head. [] Jim Jordan has spent 18 years in Congress without passing a single bill, without bringing real resources back home, and without lifting a damn finger to help families. But now—suddenly—he wants to pretend he cares? Please. This isn’t about serving Americans. This is about saving face. So here’s what we’re going to do: We’re taking over this sham town hall. I want YOU to submit the tough questions that Jim Jordan’s staff won’t answer—and I’ll read them out loud, on camera, and blast them across social media so he has nowhere to hide. Reply to this email to submit your question and then rush a contribution to make Jim Jordan squirm. [] DONATE NOW [] You and I both know what’s going to happen at these so-called “office hours.” His staff will show up, not Jim Jordan, and they’ll nod along, scribble down fake notes, and then? Nothing. No follow-up. No real answers. No action. Meanwhile, Americans are losing their jobs, their healthcare, and their benefits—because Jim Jordan is too busy pushing conspiracy theories and doing Trump and Elon Musk’s dirty work. He’s out here cheering on federal job cuts that are costing people their paychecks. He’s pushing Medicaid slashes that will devastate 3.55 million Ohioans and many more millions nationwide. He’s letting veterans’ services crumble, abandoning 830,000 in Ohio alone. But now that we’ve got him feeling the heat? He suddenly remembers he’s supposed to represent this district? Not a chance. We’re making sure every voter sees through this fraud. I’ll be reading YOUR questions on camera and exposing his failures for all to see. Chip in now to help us hold him accountable. [] No more hiding, Jim. We’re coming for you. name: Federal Gov.
subject: Musk and Trump HATE Me.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Greetings from Gay Valimont!
Friend, I’m deeply concerned about the systematic dismantling of our government under the Trump administration.
Reports show that Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has taken over the Office of Personnel Management (OPM), sidelining career employees and issuing directives to gut the federal workforce. Thousands of workers have been fired, with agencies forced to make drastic cuts that will impact Social Security, public services, and the everyday lives of Americans.
We have less than a month to turn this around via special elections. If I don’t have your support, Trump and Musk get their way.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4A4B614F4E2B57326A70454E77535A464136574E337947786746316D2B31724E4976696864705651656E49496179474A637053365437416D4372677154313333/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-03%20at%2010.33.08%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is not efficiency—it’s destruction. Our country depends on the dedicated civil servants who keep our government running. Whether it’s ensuring seniors receive their Social Security benefits, protecting our food supply, or providing disaster relief, these jobs are essential. If this trend continues, it won’t just be bureaucrats losing their jobs—it will be working families losing the services they rely on.
My campaign is built on accountability, compassion, and ensuring government works for the people, not billionaires and political insiders. I will fight against reckless policies that strip away public resources and put everyday Americans at risk.
We’re in the final stretch before the special election, and I need your support now more than ever. Can I count on you to donate $9 to my campaign, and rally our Dems to make positive change a reality? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

Stand up for American workers and the future of our country with me.

name: Becca Balint
subject: I never thought I would see the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
Russia invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine, and Vladimir Putin is the aggressor. Those are the facts. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103172411/531379879/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmY1MzZjMi03ZmY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dr0ggBivjrxTpHQMClEU8yFan5pQrJOnSuhYuAc1YA4=)
---
**It’s an undeniable fact that Russia invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine.** Peter, I’m not going to sit quietly while Donald Trump tries to rewrite history. **Vladimir Putin is the aggressor.** He has mercilessly waged this war against Ukraine for over three years now. His actions have led to immeasurable suffering for Ukrainians and a shockingly high death toll for Russia. Now, Donald Trump has positioned the United States to stand with Russia and North Korea _against_ Ukraine and the rest of our allies in Europe. Even inviting Ukrainian President Zelenskyy to Washington to shamelessly berate him, doing Putin’s bidding straight from the Oval Office. **It’s sickening, Peter.** I never thought I would see the day when our president would be a puppet for a dictator. And now, many of my Republican colleagues are also siding with that same dictator who kills journalists, assassinates his political opponents, and is accused of war crimes — **all because Donald Trump said so. ** It’s revolting to watch what the Republican Party has become under Trump’s leadership. Now more than ever, we need principled leaders willing to stand up to the powerful and fight for what’s right. Peter, **I can promise you that I will never stop supporting Ukraine as they fight for their livelihood, their democracy, and their country against Russia’s aggression. ** Thank you. — Becca | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103172413/531379881/-856240149?refcode=AU_RAB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmY1MzZjMi03ZmY4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dr0ggBivjrxTpHQMClEU8yFan5pQrJOnSuhYuAc1YA4=)

clean_body: Russia invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine, and Vladimir Putin is the aggressor. Those are the facts. | = It’s an undeniable fact that Russia invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine. Peter, I’m not going to sit quietly while Donald Trump tries to rewrite history. Vladimir Putin is the aggressor. He has mercilessly waged this war against Ukraine for over three years now. His actions have led to immeasurable suffering for Ukrainians and a shockingly high death toll for Russia. Now, Donald Trump has positioned the United States to stand with Russia and North Korea against Ukraine and the rest of our allies in Europe. Even inviting Ukrainian President Zelenskyy to Washington to shamelessly berate him, doing Putin’s bidding straight from the Oval Office. It’s sickening, Peter. I never thought I would see the day when our president would be a puppet for a dictator. And now, many of my Republican colleagues are also siding with that same dictator who kills journalists, assassinates his political opponents, and is accused of war crimes — all because Donald Trump said so. It’s revolting to watch what the Republican Party has become under Trump’s leadership. Now more than ever, we need principled leaders willing to stand up to the powerful and fight for what’s right. Peter, I can promise you that I will never stop supporting Ukraine as they fight for their livelihood, their democracy, and their country against Russia’s aggression. Thank you. — Becca | = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

GOP Rep. Tim Burchett **[did not hold back during a tense visit on CNN,](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** calling Jake Tapper a war monger to his face on live T.V.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burchett claimed that Ukraine had likely stolen the $100 billion that President Zelensky claimed he never received from the U.S.
"I don't think its accurate to say that Ukraine was stealing half the money over there," Tapper contested. "As you know, most of the money that went to Ukraine was military aid, weapons that were manufactured and purchased in the United States."
"So you're **[paying off the war pimps at the Pentagon?!"](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Burchett fired back at Tapper. "Young men are dying and old men are getting rich,..."
Burchett just couldn't hold back and **[sounded off at the unprepared corporate media hack.](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "We have no business being over there, except a lot of people's stock portfolios are going through the roof!!"
Watch the full clash right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ece67f27-9ce6-4008-af76-138b62d19e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Marco Rubio REFUSES to take any CRAP from a clown like George Stephanopoulos
Secretary of State Marco Rubio **[STEAMROLLED ABC's George Stephanopoulos](https://substack.com/redirect/de52a551-2ed7-47a0-8ac3-de01b5cb65df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing Trump of being a Putin 'puppet' following the heated Oval Office exchange between Trump and Zelensky.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/de52a551-2ed7-47a0-8ac3-de01b5cb65df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/de52a551-2ed7-47a0-8ac3-de01b5cb65df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Attempting to corner Rubio, Stephanopoulos read out Alaska Senator Lisa Murkowski's 'X' post, "This is what she said. 'Right now, I am sick to my stomach as the administration appears to be walking away from our allies and embracing Putin, a threat to democracy and U.S. values around the world.' What's your response?"
Ready Rubio fired back, "What have we done to placate the Russians? The only thing we've done is say, 'Are you guys willing to talk about peace?' We haven't given them $180 billion and weapons! We haven't given them an Oval Office meeting!"
Rubio continued with Stephanopoulos constantly trying to interrupt him, "Shouldn't we all be happy that we have a President who's trying to stop wars and prevent them instead of starting them? And I just don't get it, I really don't, other than the fact that it's Donald J. Trump. If this was a Democrat that was doing this, everyone would be saying, well, he's on his way to the Nobel Peace Prize! This is absurd!"
**[Watch Rubio PUMMEL Slopadopoulos' in the live smackdown here:](https://substack.com/redirect/de52a551-2ed7-47a0-8ac3-de01b5cb65df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/de52a551-2ed7-47a0-8ac3-de01b5cb65df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

I’ve said it before: **The outcome of an election can easily become a Rorschach test on which we project our own ideological priors.** In order to avoid substituting narrative for truth, _we must go where the evidence takes us._

That’s why I want to hear from you, the voters, about what your biggest priorities were in the 2024 election, and what you want to see more of going forward: | **— Peter's VOTER PRIORITY SURVEY —**

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Support Christian Legal Defense
body:
Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb92pELUcoTNERMgOZM8SS8d7H4of5MPt31AhiB4DxHTQH6bqF3Q-DQ862EOOh9JgW3FwriXAI1Thnp1Euwu4Y0iqJI7wbA7nTesnYeKozqH9rVotszdsmHtQTH00Ywf400O_1r6O1cXsYi52fuRvUTV)
---
Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Peter, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb-v67Ms_xASRRqjSE743Z3Rgzo1eNLAcV6p_HG9hpD_NZBi-PKCym0bGBSjs4rn2autpJ_KOD7bqInyvPqgFpuax7Y-WJeV839qWB44gNsegpyV1JaWf9J_gWkjTMLMBz_HaW_bNS3QCpWf2woh9rkg)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb8r9g6e9qpM_DGX5EY7knbPq_bKNTLC6TZqIqMpkf8S2LPMm80awmXEBMP4prHdUFA6c8Ok4piGxgxlIypgHdklsiaFsB2EPGCKvwO5pABZZKmttUogrVlCutLGGybZ310ZqEKwnyyGqAhDOgKtBXia)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Peter, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb9oXu7-Cq8y6OBikV5rl7nskAs1Fle4zAMtSPd1c1TTiQLEjs2qLeUsiJz_NXoMqc3AGC3mjIKYvz23XDTWIVlUJX_X4RcUxmw5yEBT3rS_el1vQYVy_gUo8_aQQJwxZfllBAtjktZBWY6cWe33YG5-)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb8T1SvolBXtBpzOb-57jhyobCd2w_OfyHxTzL72VQTKzvVYUUjU8-FEkuZBWDAE927kHiByxEGWN0RIfgOZXsdYjvSO_1Su3HZyhD2_Cbksg8DGSM-6mmHeo0P3f-T5TTJAQ7dqUMrFOgAJM1GWx_Lo)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb9uww-ymRNbPDn4b-4Nr3vAeyjYYTdgYcsT2QydHOChjxWj7BiCO4vIoI8Q-mR3_hRtcjpSIvD-IMIV5asEcOO66N9aF7pKMfmKfqMubfQe9eXFIo1S8h3WQcaqeBK8qU-frherB4aJwsmon-iqATmj)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_e=UcUx_iXdoI65NVx9xA_z4Rihc68er0RG0s2Jg6aizMy4cmpwVNt20M_pRGvnsQteFDDxNq7M2QL5akJESy835apVXDR5Pq-PIpgJ-hnNAYD5aEjDrk92APZ4RsTynxrDw5ocfCzEDSttzorLs1EXecZRxJZQtREe5tPIFh1kvb-emBKTTQAy83DuDTkmhqytUfBOtVd79lAbf0vPWeNMBZElowympIRQ7V4LtPYNK18Jke_sgtU0LxasXAdTaRi7EHFoqy5E7dHeLZO8nQ_xGt6B4-gune0IDBERbZjGKGznf7EDX8oDwznmTaQF4SYS)
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712

[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=8bfa15e19f62464a83dd09f950779ee9&_t=ivGabv5aBo6HN9QZDwOL9Dnp6tqwJr9YM4zNwJ0DbswvWlg4xf880cIURiYi0IRH5WFJi6RJR8MDFX6-8pf5xQpiwoCMXHFL8DDpvEoXzF8GlgdUVx6Z-OcTu67aC-1a)

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Stop the Far-Right MAGA Majority
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173050/531383088/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOTcxM2QtODNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kTC2pU2_nn0IVUTscP8vX0orBXoCGz3ns6ILw1lT9Yc=&emci=4abf82d8-7df8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=f9a9713d-83f8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
You can sit back and watch the dismantling of our form of government, or you can join a movement on the march to reclaim the essential institution of our democracy and frustrate Trump at the same time!
Trump is counting on his hand-picked radical right-wing MAGA majority on the Supreme Court to rubber-stamp his illegal firings, eliminations of crucial government agencies and programs, and assault on our Constitution.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, including Senators Adam Schiff and Sheldon Whitehouse, Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Dan Goldman, and many more to end lifetime appointments and enact 18-year term limits.
First, we need to win majorities in the House and Senate. Will you help us back candidates pledging to support the TERM Act?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173051/531383089/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOTcxM2QtODNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kTC2pU2_nn0IVUTscP8vX0orBXoCGz3ns6ILw1lT9Yc=)
The MAGA majority has already robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions. They created immunity for Trump so he can’t be prosecuted. They’ve set their sights on getting rid of marriage equality.
This is what happens when you have a job for life.
**[>>>Together, we will bring accountability to SCOTUS and send Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito into retirement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173052/531383090/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOTcxM2QtODNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kTC2pU2_nn0IVUTscP8vX0orBXoCGz3ns6ILw1lT9Yc=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173053/531383091/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOTcxM2QtODNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kTC2pU2_nn0IVUTscP8vX0orBXoCGz3ns6ILw1lT9Yc=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173054/531383092/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOTcxM2QtODNmOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kTC2pU2_nn0IVUTscP8vX0orBXoCGz3ns6ILw1lT9Yc=)

The fallout from President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's visit to the White House continues. The deal was set and ready to go for Zelenskyy and he instead came into the oval office to relitigate the deal in front of the world. Secretary of State Marco Rubio summed it up perfectly on Face The Nation, Donald Trump is trying to end this war and if a Democrat had taken the actions President Trump has taken the media would be showering them with praises and claiming they were on their way to the nobel peace prize. Longtime friend of the show and newly appointed Secretary of Veterans Affairs Doug Collins joins me today. The Biden administration over bloated the VA by $130 Billion dollars and 80,000 employees. Secretary Collins has already redirected $2 Billion back to actual veterans so they can get the healthcare and benefits they need. The Biden administration's approach of throwing money and people at a problem has not produced any results over the past 4 years, so doing things because "that's how we've always done it" has been banned at the VA. Secretary Collins is committed to overhauling the VA to get results and deliver for our veterans. 17 veterans per day lose their life to suicide which is 17 too many. Who do you know that might need a phone call or a cup of coffee or might be suffering in silence?
If you are a Veteran in crisis or concerned about one, the VA crisis line is available 2/7 to receive confidential support.
To reach the Veterans Crisis line dial 988 and Press 1.
You can also chat with them online at: http://VeteransCrisisLine.net/Chat or text 838255
Featuring:
Secretary Doug Collins
Secretary of Veterans Affairs | Trump 47 administration
If you want to help a caregiver providing critical support and care for our Veterans, please visit the Yellow Ribbon Fund: https://yellowribbonfund.org/
Watch President Trump address the joint sessions of Congress right here with us:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9dad8aa4-74eb-42e1-83b7-a727ee958556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Today's show is brought to you by these great sponsors:
**Beam**
For a limited time got 40% of Beam's Dream Powder. Dream Powder with Reishi, Magnesium, L-Theanine, Apigenin and Melatonin to help you fall asleep, stay asleep, and wake up refreshed. Just head to https://shopbeam.com/SPICER for 40% off.
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/

name: Shontel Brown
subject: GOP slashing Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the mega-wealthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
They are the party of wealthy people – not working people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173427/531383791/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250304slash_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE5NzEzZC04M2Y4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcsvhpX-lCGSXbG2SWk_vaMQCIjq5z5jemfz3qNW6xU=) Peter,

Last week, House Republicans passed one of the most shameful budgets of the century. It was an immoral and illogical bill that robs the poor to give to the rich.

**Here is what the GOP budget includes:**

❌ **$4.5 TRILLION in tax cuts for the mega-wealthy.**
❌ **$880 BILLION in cuts to Medicaid** and the Affordable Care Act premium assistance.
❌ **$230 BILLION in cuts to SNAP** , the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.
❌ **$330 BILLION in cuts to federal education programs** , including student loans and school lunch programs.

If the funding levels established by this bill become law, **millions of people will suffer so that Mar-a-Lago elites can buy another yacht.** This includes endangering healthcare coverage for 250,000 Ohioans in OH-11 alone who rely on Medicaid and 180,000 Ohioans in OH-11 who rely on SNAP. It’s cruel, and it’s wrong.

Donald Trump and House Republicans are proving once and for all that **they are the party of wealthy people – not working people.** With your help, I vow to join my House Democratic colleagues in fighting this backwards agenda.

**I am so thankful for your support this past month. We have a long road ahead of us, and your contributions are essential to fueling the fight.** [**Will you join me in defending the American people against the extremist MAGA agenda by pitching in another $5 or whatever you can afford today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103173429/531383792/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250304slash_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE5NzEzZC04M2Y4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcsvhpX-lCGSXbG2SWk_vaMQCIjq5z5jemfz3qNW6xU=)

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

— _The New York Times_** **"An election for a single state Supreme Court seat becomes the ‘blockbuster’ political fight of 2025"

**Peter, this must-win race will decide the balance of power on the state supreme court — with serious implications for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. **
Here’s the thing: _We know how to win in the Badger State_. In 2023 — building on our work in the 2018, 2019, and 2020 races — our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body.
**But the far-right made it clear they’ll spare no expense to try and secure this open seat.**
So with stakes this high, we’re turning to supporters like you to help fight back against the extremist Republican forces that want to wreak havoc on our democracy.

clean_body: This is a must-win race with serious implications for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. | "Elon Musk is trying to buy the Wisconsin Supreme Court" — Mother Jones "Musk and his millions enter Wisconsin Supreme Court race" — The New York Times "An election for a single state Supreme Court seat becomes the ‘blockbuster’ political fight of 2025" — CNN Peter, these headlines say it all: As if dismantling the federal government weren’t enough, the richest person in the world is now exerting his influence on one of the most important elections of the year. Elon Musk’s political action committee and a conservative nonprofit he’s connected to are spending millions to defeat the NDRC’s endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford — and we can’t let him succeed. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Peter, this must-win race will decide the balance of power on the state supreme court — with serious implications for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. Here’s the thing: We know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023 — building on our work in the 2018, 2019, and 2020 races — our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. But the far-right made it clear they’ll spare no expense to try and secure this open seat. So with stakes this high, we’re turning to supporters like you to help fight back against the extremist Republican forces that want to wreak havoc on our democracy. = — NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Then, a hack at USA Today called her ‘noisy and uncontrollable.’ Other so-called “journalists” followed suit and insulted her 30-year career as a news anchor in Phoenix. I know she’s doing her job right when the lying liberal media attacks her like this. They wouldn’t come after her if she wasn’t such a big threat. But this isn’t the worst of it. Now the Left is gearing up for the next wave of lawfare, they abuse our courts. Install corrupt prosecutors, twist our laws into something unrecognizable, and – as a last resort – they use the full scope of their power to defame, sue, and financially destroy their enemies. The sham lawsuits could have financially destroyed her family. Now that the target on her back just gotten ten-times bigger, I need to know if she can count on you. **[That’s why I’m asking you to respond right away.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5e604775ec774b0e96968e71e00f2193&_e=v8jC7b-LmBIVlPcDwFj-Kc-oNsHGDfNCk9Jwg6YOriVKgyGBkSeNJRE7EUxUvB6iK5xUOfmKkLZwpXBKJ_cTKJEOpXXA5L5fFuurHEzMZaDSZEU68OJWRpXOYQiOyIj_Lvupf67uGhyx7DF7HHHDykoV-nsAAK3EYuovKlfcOJ91DNkMyPL-48sVs6Aj3zEa_Pnykxy64PIAoEhuX4qkZboEpkHbhmRDCfgDpWtZ8V4slfHPio5QRElPaONl3u_MirzCgKBz0e1sDYqh-mM37oYp62Vs0eCPLWzfxysoIzo6MbGky8C_Z9w_ve0DJGqplcLrfsIVoQRyqwotkMVdKOCfIAXZwSWGAOTZ5bsaFKVD8djeC9YfoxjYH9VxMC4EMEj3hHualASrzp_ScTTkVg6HK6QSLZkSt90rl6XqEHA%3D)** Frankly, with President Trump back in the White House, they are going to go to even more extreme lengths to derail his second term and shut down his allies... including Kari.
