clean_body: I know she’s doing her job right when the lying liberal media attacks her like this. They wouldn’t come after her if she wasn’t such a big threat. | | | You may have seen the Left’s new attack frenzy against Kari Lake... | | | | The Left’s lawfare is just getting started, You may have seen the Left’s new attack frenzy against Kari Lake...First, crony Brian Stelter at CNN called her an “Election Denier” and a “Trump Loyalist” (as if that’s an insult!) Then, a hack at USA Today called her ‘noisy and uncontrollable.’ Other so-called “journalists” followed suit and insulted her 30-year career as a news anchor in Phoenix. I know she’s doing her job right when the lying liberal media attacks her like this. They wouldn’t come after her if she wasn’t such a big threat. But this isn’t the worst of it. Now the Left is gearing up for the next wave of lawfare, they abuse our courts. Install corrupt prosecutors, twist our laws into something unrecognizable, and – as a last resort – they use the full scope of their power to defame, sue, and financially destroy their enemies. That’s what they are trying to do to her.She’s still facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees in Arizona and now that President Trump is back in the White House, the Left is going to come after conservatives even harder. When an Arizona Election Official promised to “make life hell” for her, we could have never imagined it would have been this bad. The sham lawsuits could have financially destroyed her family. Now that the target on her back just gotten ten-times bigger, I need to know if she can count on you. Frankly, with President Trump back in the White House, they are going to go to even more extreme lengths to derail his second term and shut down his allies... including Kari. The only way she will be able to take on the onslaught of attacks and lawfare over the next few months is if you still have her back. The American Media Council’s “First Amendment Fund” has run dry covering the outstanding legal fees she has left. Now, I fear we need to build a well of reserves ready to face whatever the Left decides to throw at her next. So, please know it would be an incredible gift and a true blessing. Your Contribution to this “First Amendment Fund” will help her finish this fight – without financially destroying her family. And with more lawfare on the way, I want you to know just how far your generosity will go in helping us prepare to take on the battle we still have ahead of us.Our fight to stop the Left’s lawfare is just getting started. I hope I can count on you to fight by our side once again.Thank you in advance for your support. Yours Truly,Lisa Dale | | | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The Week Ahead, Monday March 3rd
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

This past week, culminating in the ruthless ambush of Ukrainian President
Volodymyr Zelensky by President Trump and Vice President Vance in the Oval
Office, makes clear the stakes and terms of the fight we’re in. Even more
reason to do all we can with what we have where we are. Here are three
ideas for this week:

Support democracy over tyranny

Trump turns our foreign policy towards Russia as he turns his back on 80
years of U.S. global leadership. We can speculate on his motives, but the
result so far has been an almost nihilistic destruction of our traditional
alliances with fellow democracies, a near-fatal weakening of Ukraine (the
front line of our common defense against tyranny in Europe), and an
invitation to other authoritarian powers to invade and seize desirable
territory on or near their borders (e.g. Taiwan). Left unchecked, this
will destroy the world order that we have built, and which has
disproportionately benefited the United States. It will strengthen our
enemies and unleash chaos and war at an unprecedented scale.

If there are silver linings in the shameful attack that Trump and Vance
launched against Zelensky on Friday, they are the following:

* We now know beyond a shadow of a doubt where Trump’s interests and
sympathies lie. Not only did he openly ridicule and demean Zelensky in
an attempt to humiliate him on the global stage, he also repeatedly
echoed Russian dictator Vladimir Putin’s talking points about the war.
And then, perhaps more bizarrely, he ranted about his and Putin’s
shared persecution at the hands of Joe and Hunter Biden. Trump is
clearly personally aligned with Putin and now he seeks to align our
country with him as well (if we needed any more official proof, the
United States voted with Russia against Ukraine and all of our
democratic allies last week as the United Nations sought to condemn
Russia’s invasion of Ukraine). This clarity should give us renewed
purpose and perspective in our fight against this administration. No
one can now pretend it is anything other than what it is. The lines
are drawn, the choice is crystal clear.
* The European democracies have begun to rally in earnest around
Ukraine. The reaction across the Atlantic to Trump’s behavior has been
forceful and unified. The Europeans understand that Ukraine is the
frontline in the fight against authoritarianism and further Russian
territorial expansion. Now that the U.S. is the least reliable partner
in the alliance, they will step up defense spending and the intensity
of their resistance to Russia. They should have done this long before,
but in the breach they have finally found their resolve.
* Everyday Americans, Republican and Democrat, are galvanized and will
do what they can to support Ukraine and stop Trump’s mad march into
Russia’s arms. They will push on their elected representatives, they
will threaten political consequence at the ballot box, and they will
provide the backbone missing from so many in Congress today.

To that end, here are two things we can all do:

1. From the excellent Tim Snyder (whose recent article on this issue you
should read here
([ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64251?t=1001&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]https://substack.com/home/post/p-158182338): “If you are
thinking today about how to help Ukrainians, here are some
possibilities: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64253?t=1002&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]Come Back Alive, a Ukrainian NGO that supports
soldiers on the battlefield and veterans; [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64254?t=1003&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]United 24, the Ukrainian
state platform for donations, with many excellent projects); [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64255?t=1004&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]RAZOM,
an American NGO, tax-deductible for US citizens, which cooperates with
Ukrainian NGOS to support civilians; and [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64256?t=1005&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]BlueCheck Ukraine, which
aims for efficient cooperation with Ukrainian groups and is also
tax-deductible.” Amy and I have made donations, and I hope you will
too.
2. Call your member of Congress. Demand that we stay true to our
democratic values and to our allies who are fighting for their lives
right now. 202-224-2131

Protect Kids from Measles

There is an out-of-control measles outbreak in Texas and surrounding
states. Unvaccinated kids are getting sick and one has tragically died.

The response from America’s Health and Human Services Secretary? Don’t
worry about it, this kind of thing happens all the time. (Except, this is
the first death of a child in America due to measles in more than 20
years.)

The response from the Governor of Texas? Crickets. Maybe too scared of the
“MAHA” movement to show the leadership that the moment requires.

So, in the absence of any kind of responsibility from those in positions
of power and public trust, let’s all of us spread the word.

With only rare exceptions, every child should get the MMR vaccine against
measles. It’s safe, it’s effective, and it’s necessary not only for your
child’s health but the health of other children and vulnerable people in
your community.

If you live in the South Plains of Texas (the epicenter of this outbreak)
or know people who do, here are some community resources: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64257?t=1006&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]United,
Market Street pharmacies to offer MRR vaccine amid growing Texas measles
cases

I interviewed one of the leading virologists and immunologists in the
world, Dr. Paul Offit on these issues last week, please feel free to share
our conversation [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64258?t=1007&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]here.

Volunteer on the ground with us

We had a big volunteer gathering last week, lots of people signing up to
register voters, stay in touch with those targeted for suppression and
intimidation and hold our elected leaders accountable.

Sign up to become a Powered By People volunteer if you haven’t already. We
believe in person-to-person organizing — meaning, human physical presence
where young and low-propensity voters are. It’s not too soon to begin the
work for the 2026, 2028 or 2030 elections. In fact, it is absolutely
necessary that we start now.

Here is the link: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1008&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX ]https://poweredxpeople.org/

Action is the key to victory and the antidote to despair. See you out
there.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=240002%2E444211%2EkSHIQX

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Sending a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Next month we’ll have to publicly report all of our campaign’s fundraising activity for the first quarter of 2025.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250303-4817-footer&t=1&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)
Hey Peter, Team Jayapal here with an important request.
Next month we’ll have to publicly report _all_ of our campaign’s fundraising activity for the first quarter of 2025.
And since it’s the first report since Trump re-entered the White House, Pramila and our entire team are aiming to break records and prove to _everyone_ that **working people are fed up** with Trump, Elon, and their entire corrupt administration.
**We have an ambitious goal of raising $100,000 in the first quarter from emails like this one, and we won’t be able to make it without your grassroots support.[If you’re in a position to pitch in, will you donate $3 to Pramila’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250303?refcode=em20250303-4817&amount=3&refcode2=4817_420207_uB3DsY&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)**
Fundraising numbers, in addition to polling and calls from constituents, are one of the biggest factors that a lot of Republicans in Congress look to when they’re judging how the public feels about a given issue.
And with such a razor-thin majority in the House, all it will take is a couple Republican defectors to bring Trump’s agenda to a screeching halt. That’s why it’s _critical_ that we have a strong showing when the next FEC reports are published.
But we can’t do it without you, Peter. Pramila doesn’t take a cent from corporations or their PACs, and she doesn’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs.
**In fact, our average online contribution so far this year is just $27.40!**
That’s because Pramila isn’t in Congress to fight for billionaires like Elon Musk. She’s in Congress to fight for poor and working people in Seattle and across the country, and no amount of billionaire campaign donations can change that.
[**Peter, if you’re with Pramila in this fight, will you pitch in $3 to help us reach our $100,000 goal and send a message that working people are fed up with the MAGA agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250303?refcode=em20250303-4817&amount=3&refcode2=4817_420207_uB3DsY&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250303?amount=3&refcode=em20250303-4817&refcode2=4817_420207_uB3DsY&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250303-4817-footer&t=2&refcode2=4817_420207_uB3DsY&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4817%2E420207%2EuB3DsY)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: ImpeachTrumpNOW.com (Cedar Key Progress)
subject: Trump has stolen our nation’s greatness. Help us reclaim it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

Dear Peter,
For years, Save the Redwoods League has worked with our conservation partners and passionate forest lovers like you to assemble and conserve a jigsaw puzzle of wild lands and waterways.

Monte Rio Redwoods is nestled deep in west Sonoma County, sharing a border with public lands to the east and west. Take a look at the map and you’ll see how this acquisition will fill a crucial gap between conserved lands.
This property is the missing piece of a puzzle that will create a thriving, connected future for the forest and waterways of Sonoma County.

clean_body: A thriving, connected future Dear Peter, For years, Save the Redwoods League has worked with our conservation partners and passionate forest lovers like you to assemble and conserve a jigsaw puzzle of wild lands and waterways. With the upcoming acquisition of Monte Rio Redwoods,, stretching from the Bohemian Highway to the Pacific Ocean. This is a high-priority acquisition, and we must act quickly. Make your gift for Monte Rio Redwoods today and it will be matched 3X! Monte Rio Redwoods is nestled deep in west Sonoma County, sharing a border with public lands to the east and west. Take a look at the map and you’ll see how this acquisition will fill a crucial gap between conserved lands. This property is the missing piece of a puzzle that will create a thriving, connected future for the forest and waterways of Sonoma County. Connect California redwoods! The League is proud to partner with so many like-minded, trusted conservation organizations to make this purchase possible. This united front has allowed us to move quickly on such a high-priority acquisition – . If we can successfully acquire this property, the League will transfer all 1,517 acres to Sonoma County Regional Parks, enabling an expansion of Monte Rio Redwoods Regional Park and Open Space Preserve from 515 acres to 2,032 acres. This would be an incredibly meaningful increase in access to recreation and outdoor spaces for local Equity Priority Communities (EPCs) and Environmental Justice Communities of Concern (EJCOCs) who have been historically underserved and disproportionally affected by poor land use practices that began in the 1850’s. Photo by Max Whittaker Crucially, acquisition of this property provides an amazing opportunity to restore the health of the ancestral lands of the Kashia Band of Pomo Indians and the Southern Pomo territory of the Federated Indians of Graton Rancheria. This land is diverse and rich in history and culture. Monte Rio Redwoods is far more than a parcel of land. It is a diverse habitat brimming with life, a space loved by outdoor enthusiasts, and a key investment in a thriving, resilient future in the iconic redwoods of Sonoma County and its people. Every dollar you give will be tripled and bring us one step closer to connecting and safeguarding this landscape for generations to come! Thank you, | Jeff Stump Director of Land Protection ---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | ---|---|---|--- |

Another Trump nominee is confirmed. Linda McMahon is set to lead the Department of Education. _The department Trump wants to dissolve._

McMahon wants to defund public schools and privatize the education system. Access to quality public education is the foundation of our kids’ futures. We won’t stand by as McMahon puts their futures at risk.

**_[Every child deserves equitable, high-quality education. Fight with us by signing our petition today to protect public education.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Wh3eyFHawWhdjVFjduwP6DIfmK-GUZovHP8Rh_7RM00FqBjUTauZLuWHGfY1YfontPcGjOHXttvauKbxan_N0sgQ3iMnqFJWtZegFeyFMocy2dqiVagwwwqZmsksIAFsL2jEJ_OHFyq_HEB4pliBKu1lHHsz_oqvRb_iAA7-W5fwuNGt5XO2igKcMH0oJJrN370PRyiVx-itnY4J2h_uVsOg7xCDiFHfoVNJVBGA6DCTxAuNHQRZzAhafmhdBfwgvStMDrSuBL8N7poKEK0pfpelM53_GWa5dHTg1gOTv5NCzhn9WIUPSmVzUQtZ2y78ILJkB04HdSQRYc9u_mBLm/4eh/QLM1bTmNQr2DAHmXUtR3vQ/h2/h001.HyWnbZi0AAZltpxoDtfKVqkm_ZKYhsknzpEXHtLl8u0)_**

Public schools are where children fuel their passions, spark their creativity, count on a meal, and receive opportunities to realize a life where they can thrive (not just survive).

McMahon is not the leader our children deserve. McMahon advocates funneling dollars to private schools instead of public schools through school voucher schemes. We cannot let far-right extremists gut our education systems.

**_[It’s time to defend public education. Please sign our petition to oppose Linda McMahon and protect our education system.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Wh3eyFHawWhdjVFjduwP6DIfmK-GUZovHP8Rh_7RM00FqBjUTauZLuWHGfY1YfontPcGjOHXttvauKbxan_N0sgQ3iMnqFJWtZegFeyFMocy2dqiVagwwwqZmsksIAFsL2jEJ_OHFyq_HEB4pliBKNbi-TrQAwCCwrFfIjbKjpDJJIxej_L1o20LwVl9Ntx-4PoKaekkO-tcm2eA6AoIbfIZia8lBw01YdzB-R2D2xESuUwHeAjk6RtnhvkOaewr4uOZjo4TtyTOMgH1gP09u131V2CjVF_9hSbeJlAwbfhLhMwrdvvpV-ju0tQszjPvDzFQfdLHf4_ZXqo1bk-Pi/4eh/QLM1bTmNQr2DAHmXUtR3vQ/h4/h001.BBnHSUDKKWgYlJ-8fDd5k0_XDLaFkufAxLNrVBfYSiU)_**

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Trump is attacking transgender and nonbinary Californians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250303&t=1&akid=1672%2E1088799%2E9_QSmI)
Friend,
In his first month back in the White House, Donald Trump launched multiple bigoted attacks on transgender and non-binary Americans. So far, he has:
* Banned transgender and non-binary people from serving in the military;
* Ended federal funding for lifesaving gender-affirming care for those under 19;
* Attempted to move transgender women into male-only prisons;
* Signed an executive order banning trans women from participating in women’s sports, a policy that was immediately adopted by the NCAA;
* Banned people from changing their gender identity on passports.

**But know this: Rob has and will continue to do everything possible to protect the rights and well-being of LGBTQ+ Californians.**
**[Will you join Rob in standing up for ALL Californians by signing our petition opposing the Trump administration’s attacks on the LGBTQ+ community today?](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/20250303-signup-TrumpLGBTQAttacks/?source=em20250303-1672&akid=1672%2E1088799%2E9_QSmI)**
**[Sign On](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/20250303-signup-TrumpLGBTQAttacks/?source=em20250303-1672&akid=1672%2E1088799%2E9_QSmI)**
Thanks for speaking out,
Bonta HQ
